  • жҺ©и”Ҫж—¶еәҸиҖҰеҗҲ
  • е°ҒиЈ…иҫ№з•ҢжқЎд»¶пјҲжҜ”еҰӮlevel+1гҖҒlevel-1пјү
  • еҮҪж•°еә”иҜҘеҸӘеңЁдёҖдёӘжҠҪиұЎеұӮзә§
  • еңЁиҫғй«ҳеұӮзә§ж”ҫзҪ®еҸҜй…ҚзҪ®ж•°жҚ®

Java

  • йҖҡиҝҮдҪҝз”ЁйҖҡй…Қз¬ҰйҒҝе…ҚиҝҮй•ҝзҡ„еҜје…Ҙжё…еҚ•пјҲimportпјү
  • дёҚиҰҒз»§жүҝеёёйҮҸ
  • дјҳе…ҲдҪҝз”ЁжһҡдёҫиҖҢдёҚжҳҜеёёйҮҸ

еҗҚз§°

  • йҮҮз”ЁжҸҸиҝ°жҖ§еҗҚз§°
  • еҗҚз§°еә”иҜҘдёҺжҠҪиұЎеұӮзә§зӣёз¬Ұ
  • е°ҪеҸҜиғҪдҪҝз”Ёж ҮеҮҶе‘ҪеҗҚжі•
  • ж— жӯ§д№үзҡ„еҗҚз§°
  • дҪңз”ЁиҢғеӣҙиҫғеӨ§зҡ„еҗҚз§°йҖүз”Ёй•ҝеҗҚз§°пјҲиҢғеӣҙе°Ҹзҡ„еҸҜд»Ҙз”ЁзҹӯеҗҚз§°пјҢжҜ”еҰӮеҫӘзҺҜеҸҳйҮҸiпјү
  • йҒҝе…Қзј–з ҒејҸе‘ҪеҗҚпјҲжҜ”еҰӮеҢҲзүҷеҲ©иҜӯж Үи®°жі•зӯүпјү
  • еҗҚз§°еә”иҜҘиҜҙжҳҺеүҜдҪңз”ЁпјҲжҜ”еҰӮcreateOrReturnOosдјҳдәҺgetOosпјү

жөӢиҜ•

  • жөӢиҜ•дёҚи¶і
  • дҪҝз”ЁиҰҶзӣ–зҺҮе·Ҙе…·еҢ…
  • еҲ«з•ҘиҝҮе°ҸжөӢиҜ•
  • иў«еҝҪз•Ҙзҡ„жөӢиҜ•е°ұжҳҜеҜ№дёҚзЎ®е®ҡдәӢзү©зҡ„з–‘й—®
  • жөӢиҜ•иҫ№з•ҢжқЎд»¶
  • е…ЁйқўжөӢиҜ•зӣёиҝ‘зҡ„зјәйҷ·
  • жөӢиҜ•еӨұиҙҘзҡ„жЁЎејҸжңүеҗҜеҸ‘жҖ§
  • жөӢиҜ•иҰҶзӣ–зҺҮзҡ„жЁЎејҸжңүеҗҜеҸ‘жҖ§
  • жөӢиҜ•еә”иҜҘеҝ«йҖҹ

entry.title: еҶҚиҜ»Springжәҗз Ғд№Ӣдёү еёёз”Ёжү©еұ•зӮ№
entry.content:
жң¬жқҘжү“з®—йҖҗдёӘиҜҰи§ЈSpringзҡ„жү©еұ•зӮ№пјҢдҪҶзҪ‘дёҠе…ідәҺжү©еұ•зӮ№зҡ„жңүе…іиө„ж–ҷе…¶е®һе·Із»ҸйқһеёёеӨҡпјҢжІЎеҝ…иҰҒйҮҚеӨҚйҖ иҪ®еӯҗгҖӮдәҺжҳҜпјҢжҲ‘еҶіе®ҡз”ЁиҝҷзҜҮж–Үз« жүјиҰҒжҖ»з»“еӨҮеҝҳдёӢSpringзҡ„еҗ„дёӘжү©еұ•зӮ№зҡ„еҺҹзҗҶе’ҢдҪҝз”ЁеңәжҷҜгҖӮ

BeanFactoryеҶ…йғЁжү©еұ•зӮ№

BeanFactoryеҲқе§ӢеҢ–жү©еұ•зӮ№йЎәеәҸпјҡ

  • BeanNameAwareвҖҳs setBeanName
  • BeanClassLoaderAwareвҖҳs setBeanClassLoader
  • BeanFactoryAwareвҖҳs setBeanFactory
  • EnvironmentAwareвҖҳs setEnvironment
  • EmbeddedValueResolverAwareвҖҳs setEmbeddedValueResolver
  • ResourceLoaderAwareвҖҳs setResourceLoader (only applicable when running in an application context)
  • ApplicationEventPublisherAwareвҖҳs setApplicationEventPublisher (only applicable when running in an application context)
  • MessageSourceAwareвҖҳs setMessageSource (only applicable when running in an application context)
  • ApplicationContextAwareвҖҳs setApplicationContext (only applicable when running in an application context)
  • ServletContextAwareвҖҳs setServletContext (only applicable when running in a web application context)
  • BeanPostProcessorsвҖҳs postProcessBeforeInitialization methods
  • InitializingBeanвҖҳs afterPropertiesSet
  • a custom init-method definition
  • BeanPostProcessorsвҖҳs postProcessAfterInitialization methods

BeanFactoryе…ій—ӯжү©еұ•зӮ№йЎәеәҸпјҡ

  • DestructionAwareBeanPostProcessors postProcessBeforeDestruction methods
  • DisposableBeanвҖҳs destroy
  • a custom destroy-method definition

BeanFactoryPostProcessor

жҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү

/**
 * Factory hook that allows for custom modification of an application context's
 * bean definitions, adapting the bean property values of the context's underlying
 * bean factory.
 *
 * <p>Useful for custom config files targeted at system administrators that
 * override bean properties configured in the application context. See
 * {@link PropertyResourceConfigurer} and its concrete implementations for
 * out-of-the-box solutions that address such configuration needs.
 *
 * <p>A {@code BeanFactoryPostProcessor} may interact with and modify bean
 * definitions, but never bean instances. Doing so may cause premature bean
 * instantiation, violating the container and causing unintended side-effects.
 * If bean instance interaction is required, consider implementing
 * {@link BeanPostProcessor} instead.
 *
 * <h3>Registration</h3>
 * <p>An {@code ApplicationContext} auto-detects {@code BeanFactoryPostProcessor}
 * beans in its bean definitions and applies them before any other beans get created.
 * A {@code BeanFactoryPostProcessor} may also be registered programmatically
 * with a {@code ConfigurableApplicationContext}.
 *
 * <h3>Ordering</h3>
 * <p>{@code BeanFactoryPostProcessor} beans that are autodetected in an
 * {@code ApplicationContext} will be ordered according to
 * {@link org.springframework.core.PriorityOrdered} and
 * {@link org.springframework.core.Ordered} semantics. In contrast,
 * {@code BeanFactoryPostProcessor} beans that are registered programmatically
 * with a {@code ConfigurableApplicationContext} will be applied in the order of
 * registration; any ordering semantics expressed through implementing the
 * {@code PriorityOrdered} or {@code Ordered} interface will be ignored for
 * programmatically registered post-processors. Furthermore, the
 * {@link org.springframework.core.annotation.Order @Order} annotation is not
 * taken into account for {@code BeanFactoryPostProcessor} beans.
 *
 * @author Juergen Hoeller
 * @author Sam Brannen
 * @since 06.07.2003
 * @see BeanPostProcessor
 * @see PropertyResourceConfigurer
 */
@FunctionalInterface
public interface BeanFactoryPostProcessor {

    /**
     * Modify the application context's internal bean factory after its standard
     * initialization. All bean definitions will have been loaded, but no beans
     * will have been instantiated yet. This allows for overriding or adding
     * properties even to eager-initializing beans.
     * @param beanFactory the bean factory used by the application context
     * @throws org.springframework.beans.BeansException in case of errors
     */
    void postProcessBeanFactory(ConfigurableListableBeanFactory beanFactory) throws BeansException;

}

еә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜ

BeanFactoryPostProcessorз”ЁдәҺеңЁBeanе®ҡд№үдҝЎжҒҜеҠ иҪҪе®ҢжҲҗд№ӢеҗҺгҖҒBeanе®һдҫӢеҢ–д№ӢеүҚиҝӣиЎҢпјҢеҜ№Beanзҡ„е®ҡд№үдҝЎжҒҜиҝӣиЎҢдҝ®ж”№гҖӮ

еёёи§ҒдҫӢеӯҗпјҡPropertySourcesPlaceholderConfigurerпјҢз”ЁдәҺй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶зҡ„еҚ дҪҚз¬ҰжӣҝжҚўгҖӮ

е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

Springе®№еҷЁеҗҜеҠЁиҝҮзЁӢдёӯдјҡиҮӘеҠЁеҠ иҪҪе®һзҺ°дәҶBeanFactoryPostProcessorжҺҘеҸЈзҡ„BeanгҖӮ

е№¶дё”еңЁrefresh()дёӯиҝӣиЎҢи°ғз”Ёпјҡ

// и§Ғorg.springframework.context.support.AbstractApplicationContext
@Override
public void refresh() throws BeansException, IllegalStateException {
    synchronized (this.startupShutdownMonitor) {
        // Prepare this context for refreshing.
        prepareRefresh();

        // Tell the subclass to refresh the internal bean factory.
        ConfigurableListableBeanFactory beanFactory = obtainFreshBeanFactory();

        // Prepare the bean factory for use in this context.
        prepareBeanFactory(beanFactory);

        try {
            // Allows post-processing of the bean factory in context subclasses.
            postProcessBeanFactory(beanFactory);

            // Invoke factory processors registered as beans in the context.
            invokeBeanFactoryPostProcessors(beanFactory);
        // ...

е…·дҪ“и°ғз”ЁйҖ»иҫ‘и§Ғorg.springframework.context.support.PostProcessorRegistrationDelegate#invokeBeanFactoryPostProcessorsж–№жі•пјҢжӯӨеӨ„дёҚеҶҚиөҳиЁҖгҖӮ

жіЁж„ҸдәӢйЎ№

BeanFactoryPostProcessorжҳҜеңЁbeanе®һдҫӢеҢ–еүҚиў«и§ҰеҸ‘зҡ„пјҢеӣ жӯӨз»қеҜ№дёҚиғҪеңЁBeanFactoryPostProcessorжҸҗеүҚе®һдҫӢеҢ–beanпјҢеҗҰеҲҷдјҡз ҙеқҸе®№еҷЁйҖ жҲҗйў„дј°дёҚеҲ°зҡ„еүҜдҪңз”ЁгҖӮеҰӮжһңйңҖиҰҒдҝ®ж”№Beanзҡ„е®һдҫӢеҢ–йҖ»иҫ‘пјҢеә”иҜҘдҪҝз”ЁBeanPostProcessorгҖӮ

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷ

  • SpringжӢ“еұ•жҺҘеҸЈд№ӢBeanFactoryPostProcessorпјҢеҚ дҪҚз¬ҰдёҺж•Ҹж„ҹдҝЎжҒҜи§ЈеҜҶеҺҹзҗҶ
  • дҪҝз”ЁBeanFactoryPostProcessorвҖ”вҖ”иҝҷз§Қе§ҝеҠҝдёҚиҰҒз”Ё

BeanDefinitionRegistryPostProcessor

жҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү

/**
 * Extension to the standard {@link BeanFactoryPostProcessor} SPI, allowing for
 * the registration of further bean definitions <i>before</i> regular
 * BeanFactoryPostProcessor detection kicks in. In particular,
 * BeanDefinitionRegistryPostProcessor may register further bean definitions
 * which in turn define BeanFactoryPostProcessor instances.
 *
 * @author Juergen Hoeller
 * @since 3.0.1
 * @see org.springframework.context.annotation.ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
 */
public interface BeanDefinitionRegistryPostProcessor extends BeanFactoryPostProcessor {

    /**
     * Modify the application context's internal bean definition registry after its
     * standard initialization. All regular bean definitions will have been loaded,
     * but no beans will have been instantiated yet. This allows for adding further
     * bean definitions before the next post-processing phase kicks in.
     * @param registry the bean definition registry used by the application context
     * @throws org.springframework.beans.BeansException in case of errors
     */
    void postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry(BeanDefinitionRegistry registry) throws BeansException;

}

еә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜ

BeanFactoryPostProcessorзҡ„еӯҗзұ»пјҢз”ЁдәҺжіЁеҶҢиҮӘе®ҡд№үзҡ„BeanDefinitionгҖӮиҜҘжӢ“еұ•зӮ№еңЁBeanFactoryPostProcessorд№ӢеүҚжү§иЎҢгҖӮ

е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

е®һзҺ°иҝҮзЁӢе’Ң BeanFactoryPostProcessor й«ҳеәҰзӣёе…ігҖӮ
иҜ·и§Ғ org.springframework.context.support.PostProcessorRegistrationDelegate#invokeBeanFactoryPostProcessors ж–№жі•

BeanPostProcessor

жҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү

/**
 * Factory hook that allows for custom modification of new bean instances —
 * for example, checking for marker interfaces or wrapping beans with proxies.
 *
 * <p>Typically, post-processors that populate beans via marker interfaces
 * or the like will implement {@link #postProcessBeforeInitialization},
 * while post-processors that wrap beans with proxies will normally
 * implement {@link #postProcessAfterInitialization}.
 *
 * <h3>Registration</h3>
 * <p>An {@code ApplicationContext} can autodetect {@code BeanPostProcessor} beans
 * in its bean definitions and apply those post-processors to any beans subsequently
 * created. A plain {@code BeanFactory} allows for programmatic registration of
 * post-processors, applying them to all beans created through the bean factory.
 *
 * <h3>Ordering</h3>
 * <p>{@code BeanPostProcessor} beans that are autodetected in an
 * {@code ApplicationContext} will be ordered according to
 * {@link org.springframework.core.PriorityOrdered} and
 * {@link org.springframework.core.Ordered} semantics. In contrast,
 * {@code BeanPostProcessor} beans that are registered programmatically with a
 * {@code BeanFactory} will be applied in the order of registration; any ordering
 * semantics expressed through implementing the
 * {@code PriorityOrdered} or {@code Ordered} interface will be ignored for
 * programmatically registered post-processors. Furthermore, the
 * {@link org.springframework.core.annotation.Order @Order} annotation is not
 * taken into account for {@code BeanPostProcessor} beans.
 *
 * @author Juergen Hoeller
 * @author Sam Brannen
 * @since 10.10.2003
 * @see InstantiationAwareBeanPostProcessor
 * @see DestructionAwareBeanPostProcessor
 * @see ConfigurableBeanFactory#addBeanPostProcessor
 * @see BeanFactoryPostProcessor
 */
public interface BeanPostProcessor {

    /**
     * Apply this {@code BeanPostProcessor} to the given new bean instance <i>before</i> any bean
     * initialization callbacks (like InitializingBean's {@code afterPropertiesSet}
     * or a custom init-method). The bean will already be populated with property values.
     * The returned bean instance may be a wrapper around the original.
     * <p>The default implementation returns the given {@code bean} as-is.
     * @param bean the new bean instance
     * @param beanName the name of the bean
     * @return the bean instance to use, either the original or a wrapped one;
     * if {@code null}, no subsequent BeanPostProcessors will be invoked
     * @throws org.springframework.beans.BeansException in case of errors
     * @see org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean#afterPropertiesSet
     */
    @Nullable
    default Object postProcessBeforeInitialization(Object bean, String beanName) throws BeansException {
        return bean;
    }

    /**
     * Apply this {@code BeanPostProcessor} to the given new bean instance <i>after</i> any bean
     * initialization callbacks (like InitializingBean's {@code afterPropertiesSet}
     * or a custom init-method). The bean will already be populated with property values.
     * The returned bean instance may be a wrapper around the original.
     * <p>In case of a FactoryBean, this callback will be invoked for both the FactoryBean
     * instance and the objects created by the FactoryBean (as of Spring 2.0). The
     * post-processor can decide whether to apply to either the FactoryBean or created
     * objects or both through corresponding {@code bean instanceof FactoryBean} checks.
     * <p>This callback will also be invoked after a short-circuiting triggered by a
     * {@link InstantiationAwareBeanPostProcessor#postProcessBeforeInstantiation} method,
     * in contrast to all other {@code BeanPostProcessor} callbacks.
     * <p>The default implementation returns the given {@code bean} as-is.
     * @param bean the new bean instance
     * @param beanName the name of the bean
     * @return the bean instance to use, either the original or a wrapped one;
     * if {@code null}, no subsequent BeanPostProcessors will be invoked
     * @throws org.springframework.beans.BeansException in case of errors
     * @see org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean#afterPropertiesSet
     * @see org.springframework.beans.factory.FactoryBean
     */
    @Nullable
    default Object postProcessAfterInitialization(Object bean, String beanName) throws BeansException {
        return bean;
    }

}

еә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜ

BeanPostProcessor е…Ғи®ёиҮӘе®ҡд№үдҝ®ж”№spring bean factoryеҲӣе»әзҡ„ж–°beanе®һдҫӢгҖӮеҰӮжһңдҪ жғіеңЁSpringе®№еҷЁе®ҢжҲҗе®һдҫӢеҢ–гҖҒй…ҚзҪ®е’ҢеҲқе§ӢеҢ–beanд№ӢеҗҺе®һзҺ°дёҖдәӣе®ҡеҲ¶йҖ»иҫ‘пјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘжҸ’е…ҘдёҖдёӘжҲ–еӨҡдёӘ BeanPostProcessor е®һзҺ°гҖӮ

BeanPostProcessor йҖҡеёёжЈҖжҹҘеӣһи°ғжҺҘеҸЈпјҢжҲ–иҖ…дҪҝз”Ёд»ЈзҗҶеҢ…иЈ…beanгҖӮдҫӢеҰӮдёҖдәӣSpring AOPеҹәзЎҖз»“жһ„зұ»пјҲдҫӢеҰӮ AbstractAdvisingBeanPostProcessor пјүе®һзҺ°дәҶbeanеҗҺеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁпјҢжҸҗдҫӣд»ЈзҗҶеҢ…иЈ…йҖ»иҫ‘гҖӮ

еёёи§ҒдҫӢеӯҗпјҡ AutowiredAnnotationBeanPostProcessorпјҢ@AutowireжіЁи§Јзҡ„е®һзҺ°

е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

BeanеңЁе®һдҫӢеҢ–еүҚеҗҺеҲҶеҲ«дјҡи°ғз”ЁиҜҘжӢ“еұ•зӮ№зҡ„дёӨдёӘж–№жі•гҖӮ

дҫӢеҰӮпјҢеңЁзұ» org.springframework.beans.factory.support.AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory дёӯжңүеҰӮдёӢйҖ»иҫ‘пјҡ

protected Object initializeBean(String beanName, Object bean, @Nullable RootBeanDefinition mbd) {
    if (System.getSecurityManager() != null) {
        AccessController.doPrivileged((PrivilegedAction<Object>) () -> {
            invokeAwareMethods(beanName, bean);
            return null;
        }, getAccessControlContext());
    }
    else {
        invokeAwareMethods(beanName, bean);
    }

    Object wrappedBean = bean;
    if (mbd == null || !mbd.isSynthetic()) {
        // е®һдҫӢеҢ–еүҚи°ғз”Ё postProcessBeforeInitialization
        wrappedBean = applyBeanPostProcessorsBeforeInitialization(wrappedBean, beanName);
    }

    try {
        invokeInitMethods(beanName, wrappedBean, mbd);
    }
    catch (Throwable ex) {
        throw new BeanCreationException(
                (mbd != null ? mbd.getResourceDescription() : null),
                beanName, "Invocation of init method failed", ex);
    }
    if (mbd == null || !mbd.isSynthetic()) {
        // е®һдҫӢеҢ–еҗҺи°ғз”Ё applyBeanPostProcessorsAfterInitialization
        wrappedBean = applyBeanPostProcessorsAfterInitialization(wrappedBean, beanName);
    }

    return wrappedBean;
}

@Override
public Object applyBeanPostProcessorsBeforeInitialization(Object existingBean, String beanName)
        throws BeansException {

    Object result = existingBean;
    for (BeanPostProcessor processor : getBeanPostProcessors()) {
        Object current = processor.postProcessBeforeInitialization(result, beanName);
        if (current == null) {
            return result;
        }
        result = current;
    }
    return result;
}

@Override
public Object applyBeanPostProcessorsAfterInitialization(Object existingBean, String beanName)
        throws BeansException {

    Object result = existingBean;
    for (BeanPostProcessor processor : getBeanPostProcessors()) {
        Object current = processor.postProcessAfterInitialization(result, beanName);
        if (current == null) {
            return result;
        }
        result = current;
    }
    return result;
}

жіЁж„ҸдәӢйЎ№

ж— 

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷ

  • Springзі»еҲ—е…ӯпјҡSpring BeanPostProcessor

Aware

жҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү

еҸӘжҳҜдёҖдёӘж Үи®°жҺҘеҸЈпјҢжІЎжңүе…¶д»–еҶ…йғЁж–№жі•гҖӮе…·дҪ“е®һзҺ°йғҪеңЁеӯҗзұ»дёӯгҖӮ

/**
 * A marker superinterface indicating that a bean is eligible to be notified by the
 * Spring container of a particular framework object through a callback-style method.
 * The actual method signature is determined by individual subinterfaces but should
 * typically consist of just one void-returning method that accepts a single argument.
 *
 * <p>Note that merely implementing {@link Aware} provides no default functionality.
 * Rather, processing must be done explicitly, for example in a
 * {@link org.springframework.beans.factory.config.BeanPostProcessor}.
 * Refer to {@link org.springframework.context.support.ApplicationContextAwareProcessor}
 * for an example of processing specific {@code *Aware} interface callbacks.
 *
 * @author Chris Beams
 * @author Juergen Hoeller
 * @since 3.1
 */
public interface Aware {
}

еә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜ

Aware жҺҘеҸЈжҳҜдёҖдёӘж Үи®°жҺҘеҸЈпјҢжүҖжңүе®һзҺ°иҜҘжҺҘеҸЈзҡ„зұ»йғҪдјҡиў«Springе®№еҷЁзӯӣйҖүеҮәжқҘпјҢе№¶еҫ—еҲ°жҹҗз§ҚйҖҡзҹҘгҖӮжүҖжңүе®һзҺ°иҜҘжҺҘеҸЈзҡ„еӯҗжҺҘеҸЈйғҪжҸҗдҫӣеӣәе®ҡзҡ„жҺҘж”¶йҖҡзҹҘзҡ„ж–№жі•гҖӮеёёи§Ғзҡ„е®һзҺ°еҢ…жӢ¬пјҡ

  • ApplicationContextAware
  • EnvironmentAware
  • EmbeddedValueResolverAware
  • ResourceLoaderAware
  • ApplicationEventPublisherAware
  • MessageSourceAware

е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

Awareзӣёе…іжҺҘеҸЈе®һзҺ°BeanжҳҜеҖҹеҠ©дёҖдёӘ ApplicationContextAwareProcessor жқҘи§ҰеҸ‘зҡ„гҖӮApplicationContextAwareProcessor е®һзҺ°дәҶ BeanPostProcessor жү©еұ•зӮ№:

class ApplicationContextAwareProcessor implements BeanPostProcessor {

    private final ConfigurableApplicationContext applicationContext;

    private final StringValueResolver embeddedValueResolver;


    /**
     * Create a new ApplicationContextAwareProcessor for the given context.
     */
    public ApplicationContextAwareProcessor(ConfigurableApplicationContext applicationContext) {
        this.applicationContext = applicationContext;
        this.embeddedValueResolver = new EmbeddedValueResolver(applicationContext.getBeanFactory());
    }


    @Override
    @Nullable
    public Object postProcessBeforeInitialization(Object bean, String beanName) throws BeansException {
        // еҸӘеӨ„зҗҶAwareеӯҗзұ»пјҢжӯӨеӨ„жҸҗеүҚеҲӨж–ӯе№¶зҹӯи·ҜдёҚз¬ҰеҗҲжқЎд»¶зҡ„beanгҖӮ
        // дёӘдәәи§үеҫ—иҝҷдёӘеёғе°”жқЎд»¶з•Ҙдё‘пјҢдёәе•ҘдёҚз”Ё bean instanceOf Aware ?
        if (!(bean instanceof EnvironmentAware || bean instanceof EmbeddedValueResolverAware ||
                bean instanceof ResourceLoaderAware || bean instanceof ApplicationEventPublisherAware ||
                bean instanceof MessageSourceAware || bean instanceof ApplicationContextAware)){
            return bean;
        }

        AccessControlContext acc = null;

        if (System.getSecurityManager() != null) {
            acc = this.applicationContext.getBeanFactory().getAccessControlContext();
        }

        if (acc != null) {
            AccessController.doPrivileged((PrivilegedAction<Object>) () -> {
                invokeAwareInterfaces(bean);
                return null;
            }, acc);
        }
        else {
            invokeAwareInterfaces(bean);
        }

        return bean;
    }

    private void invokeAwareInterfaces(Object bean) {
        // еҲӨж–ӯbeanзұ»еһӢпјҢе№¶дё”и°ғз”Ёе…¶е®һзҺ°зҡ„еӯҗжҺҘеҸЈж–№жі•
        if (bean instanceof EnvironmentAware) {
            ((EnvironmentAware) bean).setEnvironment(this.applicationContext.getEnvironment());
        }
        if (bean instanceof EmbeddedValueResolverAware) {
            ((EmbeddedValueResolverAware) bean).setEmbeddedValueResolver(this.embeddedValueResolver);
        }
        if (bean instanceof ResourceLoaderAware) {
            ((ResourceLoaderAware) bean).setResourceLoader(this.applicationContext);
        }
        if (bean instanceof ApplicationEventPublisherAware) {
            ((ApplicationEventPublisherAware) bean).setApplicationEventPublisher(this.applicationContext);
        }
        if (bean instanceof MessageSourceAware) {
            ((MessageSourceAware) bean).setMessageSource(this.applicationContext);
        }
        if (bean instanceof ApplicationContextAware) {
            ((ApplicationContextAware) bean).setApplicationContext(this.applicationContext);
        }
    }

}

ApplicationListener

жҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү

/**
 * Interface to be implemented by application event listeners.
 *
 * <p>Based on the standard {@code java.util.EventListener} interface
 * for the Observer design pattern.
 *
 * <p>As of Spring 3.0, an {@code ApplicationListener} can generically declare
 * the event type that it is interested in. When registered with a Spring
 * {@code ApplicationContext}, events will be filtered accordingly, with the
 * listener getting invoked for matching event objects only.
 *
 * @author Rod Johnson
 * @author Juergen Hoeller
 * @param <E> the specific {@code ApplicationEvent} subclass to listen to
 * @see org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent
 * @see org.springframework.context.event.ApplicationEventMulticaster
 * @see org.springframework.context.event.EventListener
 */
@FunctionalInterface
public interface ApplicationListener<E extends ApplicationEvent> extends EventListener {

    /**
     * Handle an application event.
     * @param event the event to respond to
     */
    void onApplicationEvent(E event);

}

еә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜ

ApplicationListener дё»иҰҒз”ЁжқҘзӣ‘еҗ¬еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸдёҠдёӢж–Үзҡ„дәӢд»¶пјҢдёҚеҗҢзҡ„е®һзҺ°еӯҗзұ»жіЁеҶҢиҮӘе·ұж„ҹе…ҙи¶Јзҡ„дәӢд»¶гҖӮ

е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

дҪҝз”Ёж ·дҫӢпјҡ

@Slf4j
@Component
public class MyApplicationStartedListener implements ApplicationListener<ApplicationStartedEvent> {
    @Override
    public void onApplicationEvent(ApplicationStartedEvent event) {
        log.info("application started. event={}", event);
    }
}

InitializingBean

жҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү

/**
 * Interface to be implemented by beans that need to react once all their properties
 * have been set by a {@link BeanFactory}: e.g. to perform custom initialization,
 * or merely to check that all mandatory properties have been set.
 *
 * <p>An alternative to implementing {@code InitializingBean} is specifying a custom
 * init method, for example in an XML bean definition. For a list of all bean
 * lifecycle methods, see the {@link BeanFactory BeanFactory javadocs}.
 *
 * @author Rod Johnson
 * @author Juergen Hoeller
 * @see DisposableBean
 * @see org.springframework.beans.factory.config.BeanDefinition#getPropertyValues()
 * @see org.springframework.beans.factory.support.AbstractBeanDefinition#getInitMethodName()
 */
public interface InitializingBean {

    /**
     * Invoked by the containing {@code BeanFactory} after it has set all bean properties
     * and satisfied {@link BeanFactoryAware}, {@code ApplicationContextAware} etc.
     * <p>This method allows the bean instance to perform validation of its overall
     * configuration and final initialization when all bean properties have been set.
     * @throws Exception in the event of misconfiguration (such as failure to set an
     * essential property) or if initialization fails for any other reason
     */
    void afterPropertiesSet() throws Exception;

}

еә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜ

InitializingBean з”ЁеңЁBeanзҡ„еұһжҖ§жіЁе…Ҙе®ҢжҜ•еҗҺпјҢжү§иЎҢз”ЁжҲ·иҮӘе®ҡд№үзҡ„еҲқе§ӢеҢ–йҖ»иҫ‘гҖӮ

е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

и°ғз”ЁйҖ»иҫ‘еҸҜи§Ғ org.springframework.beans.factory.support.AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory

/**
    * Initialize the given bean instance, applying factory callbacks
    * as well as init methods and bean post processors.
    * <p>Called from {@link #createBean} for traditionally defined beans,
    * and from {@link #initializeBean} for existing bean instances.
    * @param beanName the bean name in the factory (for debugging purposes)
    * @param bean the new bean instance we may need to initialize
    * @param mbd the bean definition that the bean was created with
    * (can also be {@code null}, if given an existing bean instance)
    * @return the initialized bean instance (potentially wrapped)
    * @see BeanNameAware
    * @see BeanClassLoaderAware
    * @see BeanFactoryAware
    * @see #applyBeanPostProcessorsBeforeInitialization
    * @see #invokeInitMethods
    * @see #applyBeanPostProcessorsAfterInitialization
    */
protected Object initializeBean(String beanName, Object bean, @Nullable RootBeanDefinition mbd) {
    if (System.getSecurityManager() != null) {
        AccessController.doPrivileged((PrivilegedAction<Object>) () -> {
            invokeAwareMethods(beanName, bean);
            return null;
        }, getAccessControlContext());
    }
    else {
        invokeAwareMethods(beanName, bean);
    }

    Object wrappedBean = bean;
    if (mbd == null || !mbd.isSynthetic()) {
        wrappedBean = applyBeanPostProcessorsBeforeInitialization(wrappedBean, beanName);
    }

    try {
        // и°ғз”Ёз”ЁжҲ·иҮӘе®ҡд№үеҲқе§ӢеҢ–ж–№жі•
        invokeInitMethods(beanName, wrappedBean, mbd);
    }
    catch (Throwable ex) {
        throw new BeanCreationException(
                (mbd != null ? mbd.getResourceDescription() : null),
                beanName, "Invocation of init method failed", ex);
    }
    if (mbd == null || !mbd.isSynthetic()) {
        wrappedBean = applyBeanPostProcessorsAfterInitialization(wrappedBean, beanName);
    }

    return wrappedBean;
}

/**
    * Give a bean a chance to react now all its properties are set,
    * and a chance to know about its owning bean factory (this object).
    * This means checking whether the bean implements InitializingBean or defines
    * a custom init method, and invoking the necessary callback(s) if it does.
    * @param beanName the bean name in the factory (for debugging purposes)
    * @param bean the new bean instance we may need to initialize
    * @param mbd the merged bean definition that the bean was created with
    * (can also be {@code null}, if given an existing bean instance)
    * @throws Throwable if thrown by init methods or by the invocation process
    * @see #invokeCustomInitMethod
    */
protected void invokeInitMethods(String beanName, Object bean, @Nullable RootBeanDefinition mbd)
        throws Throwable {
    // жү§иЎҢInitializingBeanжү©еұ•зӮ№пјҢи°ғз”Ёз”ЁжҲ·иҮӘе®ҡд№үйҖ»иҫ‘
    boolean isInitializingBean = (bean instanceof InitializingBean);
    if (isInitializingBean && (mbd == null || !mbd.isExternallyManagedInitMethod("afterPropertiesSet"))) {
        if (logger.isTraceEnabled()) {
            logger.trace("Invoking afterPropertiesSet() on bean with name '" + beanName + "'");
        }
        if (System.getSecurityManager() != null) {
            try {
                AccessController.doPrivileged((PrivilegedExceptionAction<Object>) () -> {
                    ((InitializingBean) bean).afterPropertiesSet();
                    return null;
                }, getAccessControlContext());
            }
            catch (PrivilegedActionException pae) {
                throw pae.getException();
            }
        }
        else {
            ((InitializingBean) bean).afterPropertiesSet();
        }
    }
    // жү§иЎҢз”ЁжҲ·иҮӘе®ҡд№үзҡ„еҲқе§ӢеҢ–ж–№жі• init-method
    if (mbd != null && bean.getClass() != NullBean.class) {
        String initMethodName = mbd.getInitMethodName();
        if (StringUtils.hasLength(initMethodName) &&
                !(isInitializingBean && "afterPropertiesSet".equals(initMethodName)) &&
                !mbd.isExternallyManagedInitMethod(initMethodName)) {
            invokeCustomInitMethod(beanName, bean, mbd);
        }
    }
}

FactoryBean

д№ӢеүҚеҚ•зӢ¬еҶҷиҝҮдёҖзҜҮпјҢиҜ·и§ҒгҖҠеҶҚиҜ»Springжәҗз Ғд№ӢдәҢ FactoryBeanгҖӢ

entry.title: еҶҚиҜ»Springжәҗз Ғд№ӢдәҢ FactoryBean
entry.content:
жң¬ж–ҮжҳҜгҖҠеҶҚиҜ»Springжәҗз ҒгҖӢзі»еҲ—з¬¬дәҢзҜҮпјҢдёҖиө·жқҘжҺўи®ЁдёӢSpringжЎҶжһ¶еёёи§Ғжү©еұ•зӮ№FactoryBeanпјҢдәҶи§Је®ғзҡ„дҪҝз”ЁеңәжҷҜе’Ңе®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶгҖӮ

FactoryBeanз®Җд»Ӣ

жӯЈеҰӮеҗҚеӯ—жүҖиЁҖпјҢFactoryBeanжң¬иҙЁдёҠдёҖдёӘжҳҜе·ҘеҺӮзұ»пјҢз”ЁдәҺжһ„йҖ з”ЁжҲ·жүҖйңҖзҡ„BeanгҖӮйҖҡиҝҮFactoryBeanеҸҜд»Ҙйҡҗи—ҸеҲ°жһ„йҖ жҹҗдәӣBeanзҡ„еӨҚжқӮеҸӮж•°д»ҘеҸҠжһ„е»әйҖ»иҫ‘пјҢжҡҙйңІжӣҙеҠ з®ҖеҢ–зҡ„жҺҘеҸЈгҖӮ

FactoryBeanзҡ„жҺҘеҸЈж–№жі•йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҡ

public interface FactoryBean<T> {
  // иҺ·еҸ–еҜ№иұЎ
  T getObject() throws Exception;
  // иҺ·еҸ–еҜ№иұЎзұ»еһӢ
  Class<T> getObjectType();
  // еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰдёәеҚ•дҫӢ
  boolean isSingleton();
}

FactoryBeanдҪҝз”Ёж–№жі•

еҰӮдёӢж ·дҫӢпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮStudentFactoryBeanжқҘжһ„е»әStudentе®һдҫӢпјҡ

public class Student extends Person {
    public Student(DateTime birthday, String name) {
        super(birthday, name);
    }
}

@Component
public class StudentFactoryBean implements FactoryBean<Student> {

    private String name;

    private Integer age;

    @Override
    public Student getObject() throws Exception {
        DateTime birthday = new DateTime().minusYears(age);
        return new Student(birthday, name);
    }

    @Override
    public Class<?> getObjectType() {
        return Student.class;
    }
}

иҝҷйҮҢеҸӘжҳҜжј”зӨәдёӢз”Ёжі•пјҢжүҖд»ҘStudentFactoryBeanзҡ„жһ„е»әйҖ»иҫ‘еҫҲз®ҖеҚ•гҖӮе®һйҷ…еә”з”ЁдёӯпјҢFactoryBeanдёҖиҲ¬еҢ…еҗ«еӨ§йҮҸеӨҚжқӮдёҡеҠЎйҖ»иҫ‘гҖӮ

еңЁXMLй…ҚзҪ®дёӯдҪҝз”ЁFactoryBean

еңЁиҖҒзүҲжң¬зҡ„springжЎҶжһ¶йҮҢпјҢеёёеёёйҖҡиҝҮxmlй…ҚзҪ®жіЁе…ҘbeanгҖӮFactoryBeanзҡ„еёёи§Ғз”Ёжі•жҳҜиҝҷж ·зҡ„пјҡ

<bean class = "a.b.c.StudentFactoryBean" id = "bob">
    <property name = "name" value ="Bob"/>
    <property name = "age" value ="20"/>
</bean>
<bean class = "a.b.c.Teacher" id = "Tom">
    <property name = "student" ref = "bob"/>
</bean>

иҝҷйҮҢbobе®һдҫӢзҡ„зұ»еһӢиҷҪз„¶дёәStudentFactoryBeanпјҢдҪҶеңЁе®һдҫӢеҢ–зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢSpringдјҡи°ғз”ЁStudentFactoryBean#getObjectиҝӣиЎҢе®һдҫӢеҢ–пјҢе№¶иҝ”еӣһStudentеҜ№иұЎгҖӮеӣ жӯӨbobе®һдҫӢзҡ„жңҖз»Ҳзұ»еһӢжҳҜStudentгҖӮ

еңЁжіЁи§ЈдёӯдҪҝз”ЁFactoryBean

еңЁиҫғж–°зүҲжң¬зҡ„SpringдёӯпјҢдёҖиҲ¬дҪҝз”ЁжіЁи§Јд»Јжӣҝxmlй…ҚзҪ®жіЁе…ҘгҖӮFactoryеңЁжіЁи§ЈжіЁе…Ҙж–№ејҸзҡ„дҪҝз”ЁдёҠзЁҚжңүдёҚеҗҢгҖӮдёҖиҲ¬еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

@Bean
public Student getStudent() throws Exception {
    return new StudentFactoryBean().setAge(20).setName("Bob").getObject();
}

йңҖиҰҒжҳҫејҸең°и°ғз”ЁgetObjectж–№жі•иҝ”еӣһbeanеҜ№иұЎпјҢе№¶йҖҡиҝҮ @Bean жіЁи§Је°Ҷзұ»еһӢдёәStudentзҡ„beanжіЁеҶҢеҲ°springе®№еҷЁдёӯгҖӮ

FactoryBeanеңЁspringдёӯзҡ„е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

FactoryBeanдјҡеңЁspringе®№еҷЁеҗҜеҠЁиҝҮзЁӢдёӯиҝӣиЎҢеҠ иҪҪпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙи·ҹиёӘд»ҘдёӢд»Јз Ғпјҡ

-> SpringApplicationBuilder#run(String... args)
--> SpringApplicationBuilder#refreshContext(ConfigurableApplicationContext context)
---> SpringApplicationBuilder#refresh(ApplicationContext applicationContext)
----> SpringApplicationBuilder#refresh(ConfigurableApplicationContext applicationContext)
-----> AbstractApplicationContext#refresh()
------> AbstractApplicationContext#finishBeanFactoryInitialization(ConfigurableListableBeanFactory beanFactory)
-------> DefaultListableBeanFactory#preInstantiateSingletons()

еҲ°жңҖеҗҺжҲ‘д»¬дјҡеҸ‘зҺ°FactoryBeanзҡ„еҲқе§ӢеҢ–йҖ»иҫ‘пјҡ

public void preInstantiateSingletons() throws BeansException {
// ...
    // Trigger initialization of all non-lazy singleton beans...
    for (String beanName : beanNames) {
        RootBeanDefinition bd = getMergedLocalBeanDefinition(beanName);
        if (!bd.isAbstract() && bd.isSingleton() && !bd.isLazyInit()) {
            // еӨ„зҗҶFactoryBean
            if (isFactoryBean(beanName)) {
                // е®һдҫӢеҢ–иҜҘе·ҘеҺӮbeanпјҲжіЁж„Ҹе·ҘеҺӮbeanзҡ„еҗҚеӯ—д»Ҙ&ејҖеӨҙпјү
                Object bean = getBean(FACTORY_BEAN_PREFIX + beanName);
                if (bean instanceof FactoryBean) {
                    FactoryBean<?> factory = (FactoryBean<?>) bean;
                    boolean isEagerInit;
                    // SmartFactoryBeanжҳҜFactoryBeanзҡ„зү№ж®Ҡзұ»еһӢпјӣ
                    // еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮisEagerInitж–№жі•жқҘеҲӨж–ӯе…¶еҶ…йғЁзҡ„beanжҳҜеҗҰйңҖиҰҒжҸҗеүҚе®һдҫӢеҢ–гҖӮ
                    if (System.getSecurityManager() != null && factory instanceof SmartFactoryBean) {
                        isEagerInit = AccessController.doPrivileged(
                                (PrivilegedAction<Boolean>) ((SmartFactoryBean<?>) factory)::isEagerInit,
                                getAccessControlContext());
                    }
                    else {
                        isEagerInit = (factory instanceof SmartFactoryBean &&
                                ((SmartFactoryBean<?>) factory).isEagerInit());
                    }
                    // еҰӮжһңйңҖиҰҒжҸҗеүҚе®һдҫӢеҢ–еҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢпјҢеҲҷи°ғз”ЁgetBeanиҝӣиЎҢе®һдҫӢеҢ–гҖӮпјҲжіЁж„ҸеҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢжІЎжңү&еүҚзјҖпјү
                    if (isEagerInit) {
                        getBean(beanName);
                    }
                }
            }
            else {
                getBean(beanName);
            }
        }
    }
// ......
}

д»ҺдёҠиҫ№жҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙжңүд»ҘдёӢз»“и®әпјҡ

  • 1.е·ҘеҺӮbeanеҸҜд»ҘеҲҶдёәFactoryBeanе’ҢSmartFactoryBeanдёӨз§ҚпјҢеҗҺиҖ…зҡ„е”ҜдёҖеҢәеҲ«жҳҜеҸҜд»ҘжҢҮзӨәжҳҜеҗҰеңЁеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е·ҘеҺӮBeanд№ӢеҗҺз«ӢеҚіеҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢпјӣ
  • 2.е·ҘеҺӮbeanзҡ„еҗҚеӯ—д»Ҙ&дёәеүҚзјҖпјҢеҺ»жҺүиҜҘеүҚзјҖеҲҷдёәеҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҗҚеӯ—гҖӮдҫӢеҰӮ:вҖқ&studentFactoryBeanвҖқдёәе·ҘеҺӮbeanеҗҚпјҢиҖҢвҖқstudentFactoryBeanвҖқжҳҜеҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢbeanеҗҚпјӣ

д»ҺgetBeanж–№жі•и·ҹиёӘиҝӣеҺ»пјҢжҲ‘д»¬дјҡеҸ‘зҺ°е®һдҫӢеҢ–зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷй’ҲеҜ№е·ҘеҺӮbeanжңүзү№ж®Ҡзҡ„еҲқе§ӢеҢ–йҖ»иҫ‘пјҡ

protected Object getObjectForBeanInstance(
            Object beanInstance, String name, String beanName, @Nullable RootBeanDefinition mbd) {

    // Don't let calling code try to dereference the factory if the bean isn't a factory.
    if (BeanFactoryUtils.isFactoryDereference(name)) {
        if (beanInstance instanceof NullBean) {
            return beanInstance;
        }
        if (!(beanInstance instanceof FactoryBean)) {
            throw new BeanIsNotAFactoryException(beanName, beanInstance.getClass());
        }
        if (mbd != null) {
            mbd.isFactoryBean = true;
        }
        return beanInstance;
    }

    // еҰӮжһңдёҚжҳҜFactoryBeanпјҢеҲҷзӣҙжҺҘиҝ”еӣһпјҢдёҚжү§иЎҢд»ҘдёӢйҖ»иҫ‘
    if (!(beanInstance instanceof FactoryBean)) {
        return beanInstance;
    }

    Object object = null;
    if (mbd != null) {
        mbd.isFactoryBean = true;
    }
    else {
        // е·ҘеҺӮbeanзҡ„еҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢеҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҗҺдјҡжңүзј“еӯҳпјҢе…Ҳе°қиҜ•йҖҡиҝҮзј“еӯҳиҺ·еҸ–
        object = getCachedObjectForFactoryBean(beanName);
    }

    if (object == null) {
        // жІЎжңүеҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢзј“еӯҳпјҢеҲҷе°қиҜ•еҲқе§ӢеҢ–
        FactoryBean<?> factory = (FactoryBean<?>) beanInstance;
        // Caches object obtained from FactoryBean if it is a singleton.
        if (mbd == null && containsBeanDefinition(beanName)) {
            mbd = getMergedLocalBeanDefinition(beanName);
        }
        boolean synthetic = (mbd != null && mbd.isSynthetic());
        object = getObjectFromFactoryBean(factory, beanName, !synthetic);
    }
    return object;
}

еҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢзҡ„еҲқе§ӢеҢ–иҝҮзЁӢдёҺе…¶д»–еҚ•дҫӢзҡ„еҲқе§ӢеҢ–иҝҮзЁӢзұ»дјјпјҡ

protected Object getObjectFromFactoryBean(FactoryBean<?> factory, String beanName, boolean shouldPostProcess) {
    if (factory.isSingleton() && containsSingleton(beanName)) {
        // еҚ•дҫӢжғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢйңҖиҰҒе…ҲеҠ й”ҒпјҢз„¶еҗҺжЈҖжҹҘзј“еӯҳдёӯжҳҜеҗҰе·ІеӯҳеңЁе®һдҫӢ
        synchronized (getSingletonMutex()) {
            Object object = this.factoryBeanObjectCache.get(beanName);
            if (object == null) {
                // йҖҡиҝҮе·ҘеҺӮbeanиҺ·еҸ–е®һдҫӢ
                object = doGetObjectFromFactoryBean(factory, beanName);
                // Only post-process and store if not put there already during getObject() call above
                // (e.g. because of circular reference processing triggered by custom getBean calls)
                Object alreadyThere = this.factoryBeanObjectCache.get(beanName);
                if (alreadyThere != null) {
                    object = alreadyThere;
                }
                else {
                    if (shouldPostProcess) {
                        if (isSingletonCurrentlyInCreation(beanName)) {
                            // Temporarily return non-post-processed object, not storing it yet..
                            return object;
                        }
                        beforeSingletonCreation(beanName);
                        try {
                            object = postProcessObjectFromFactoryBean(object, beanName);
                        }
                        catch (Throwable ex) {
                            throw new BeanCreationException(beanName,
                                    "Post-processing of FactoryBean's singleton object failed", ex);
                        }
                        finally {
                            afterSingletonCreation(beanName);
                        }
                    }
                    if (containsSingleton(beanName)) {
                        // еҠ е…Ҙзј“еӯҳ
                        this.factoryBeanObjectCache.put(beanName, object);
                    }
                }
            }
            return object;
        }
    }
    else {
        // йқһеҚ•дҫӢжғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢзӣҙжҺҘиҺ·еҸ–ж–°е®һдҫӢ
        Object object = doGetObjectFromFactoryBean(factory, beanName);
        if (shouldPostProcess) {
            try {
                object = postProcessObjectFromFactoryBean(object, beanName);
            }
            catch (Throwable ex) {
                throw new BeanCreationException(beanName, "Post-processing of FactoryBean's object failed", ex);
            }
        }
        return object;
    }
}

д»ҺдёҠжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙеҫ—зҹҘпјҢеҰӮжһңжҳҜеҚ•дҫӢзҡ„FactoryBeanпјҢе®һдҫӢеҢ–еҗҺзҡ„еҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢдјҡж”ҫиҝӣзј“еӯҳдёӯпјҢеҸҚеӨҚеӨҚз”ЁпјӣиҖҢйқһеҚ•дҫӢзҡ„FactoryBeanпјҢжҜҸж¬Ўе®һдҫӢеҢ–йғҪдјҡиҺ·еҸ–ж–°е»әж–°зҡ„еҶ…йғЁе®һдҫӢгҖӮ

жҖ»з»“

жң¬ж–ҮиҜҰз»Ҷд»Ӣз»ҚдәҶFactoryBeanзҡ„дҪҝз”Ёж–№жі•гҖҒе®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶе’Ңеә”з”ЁеңәжҷҜгҖӮ

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷ

  • FactoryBeanвҖ”вҖ”Springзҡ„жү©еұ•зӮ№д№ӢдёҖ
  • WhatвҖҷs a FactoryBean?

entry.title: еҶҚиҜ»Springжәҗз Ғд№ӢдёҖ SpringеҰӮдҪ•еҜ№д»ҳеҫӘзҺҜеј•з”Ё
entry.content:
е…ідәҺSpringеҰӮдҪ•и§ЈеҶіеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–иҝҷдёӘй—®йўҳпјҢд»ҘеүҚеҶҷиҝҮдёҖзҜҮж–Үз« Springжәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗ3-еҜ№BeanеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„еӨ„зҗҶгҖӮдҪҶжҳҜеҰӮд»ҠеӣһеӨҙзңӢпјҢеҶҷеҫ—иҝҳжҳҜз•ҘзІ—зіҷпјҢиҖҢдё”з»ҶиҠӮд№ҹеҝҳеҫ—е·®дёҚеӨҡдәҶгҖӮжүҖд»ҘеҶіе®ҡеҶҚеҶҷдёҖеҶҷпјҢйҮҚж–°зҗҶдёҖйҒҚжҖқи·ҜгҖӮ

BeanеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–

springжЎҶжһ¶зҡ„beanеҸҜд»Ҙдә’зӣёдҫқиө–пјҢеӣ жӯӨпјҢеҸҜиғҪеӯҳеңЁеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„жғ…еҶөпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ

    <!--жһ„йҖ еҷЁеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҲеҚ•дҫӢпјү-->
    <bean id = "testA" class="org.demo.circle.TestA">
        <constructor-arg index = "0" ref="testB"/>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testB" class="org.demo.circle.TestB">
        <constructor-arg index = "0" ref="testC"/>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testC" class="org.demo.circle.TestC">
        <constructor-arg index = "0" ref="testA"/>
    </bean>

    <!--жһ„йҖ еҷЁеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–(prototype)-->
    <bean id = "testA0" class="org.demo.circle.TestA" scope="prototype">
        <constructor-arg index = "0" ref="testB0"/>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testB0" class="org.demo.circle.TestB" scope="prototype">
        <constructor-arg index = "0" ref="testC0"/>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testC0" class="org.demo.circle.TestC" scope="prototype">
        <constructor-arg index = "0" ref="testA0"/>
    </bean>

    <!--еұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҲеҚ•дҫӢпјү-->
    <bean id = "testA1" class="org.demo.circle.TestA">
        <property name="testB" ref = "testB1"></property>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testB1" class="org.demo.circle.TestB">
        <property name="testC" ref = "testC1"></property>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testC1" class="org.demo.circle.TestC">
        <property name="testA" ref = "testA1"></property>
    </bean>

    <!--еұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҲprototypeпјү-->
    <bean id = "testA2" class="org.demo.circle.TestA" scope="prototype">
        <property name="testB" ref = "testB2"></property>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testB2" class="org.demo.circle.TestB" scope="prototype">
        <property name="testC" ref = "testC2"></property>
    </bean>

    <bean id = "testC2" class="org.demo.circle.TestC" scope="prototype">
        <property name="testA" ref = "testA2"></property>
    </bean>

еҰӮдёҠй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҢ…еҗ«еёёи§Ғзҡ„еҮ з§ҚеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҪ’зұ»дёәд»ҘдёӢдёӨеӨ§зұ»пјҡ

  • йҖҡиҝҮжһ„йҖ еҷЁжіЁе…ҘеҪўжҲҗеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҡ

    • testA вҖ“> testB вҖ“> testC вҖ“> testA вҖ“> вҖҰ
    • testA0 вҖ“> testB0 вҖ“> testC0 вҖ“> testA0 вҖ“> вҖҰ

  • йҖҡиҝҮеұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘеҪўжҲҗеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҡ

    • testA1 вҖ“> testB1 вҖ“> testC1 вҖ“> testA1 вҖ“> вҖҰ
    • testA2 вҖ“> testB2 вҖ“> testC2 вҖ“> testA2 вҖ“> вҖҰ

жҢүз…§beanзҡ„зұ»еһӢеҸҲеҸҜд»Ҙз»ҶеҲҶдёәеҚ•дҫӢе’ҢprototypeдёӨз§ҚпјҲе…¶д»–scopeзұ»еһӢдёҚеёёз”ЁжҡӮдёҚи®Ёи®әпјү

жң¬ж–Үдё»иҰҒжҺўи®ЁspringеҜ№иҝҷеҮ з§ҚеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„еӨ„зҗҶзӯ–з•Ҙе’ҢеҺҹзҗҶгҖӮ

SpringеӨ„зҗҶзӯ–з•Ҙ

е…ҲжқҘиҜҙз»“и®әпјҢйҖҡиҝҮжөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙз®ҖеҚ•йӘҢиҜҒд»ҘдёҠеҮ з§ҚеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„еӨ„зҗҶзӯ–з•Ҙпјҡ


  /**
     * жөӢиҜ•жһ„йҖ еҷЁжіЁе…ҘеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–(еҚ•дҫӢпјү
     */
    @Test(expected = BeanCreationException.class)
    public void testCircleRefByConstructor() {
        BeanFactory beanFactory = new XmlBeanFactory(new ClassPathResource("circle.xml"));
        TestA testA = (TestA) beanFactory.getBean("testA");
    }

    /**
     * жөӢиҜ•жһ„йҖ еҷЁжіЁе…ҘеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–(prototypeзұ»еһӢпјү
     */
    @Test(expected = BeanCreationException.class)
    public void testCircleRefByConstructorForPrototype() {
        BeanFactory beanFactory = new XmlBeanFactory(new ClassPathResource("circle.xml"));
        TestA testA = (TestA) beanFactory.getBean("testA0");
    }

    /**
     * жөӢиҜ•еұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҲеҚ•дҫӢпјү
     */
    @Test
    public void testCircleRefBySetter() {
        BeanFactory beanFactory = new XmlBeanFactory(new ClassPathResource("circle.xml"));
        TestA testA = (TestA) beanFactory.getBean("testA1");
    }


    /**
     * жөӢиҜ•зҡ„еұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҲprototypeзұ»еһӢпјү
     */
    @Test(expected = BeanCreationException.class)
    public void testPrototypeRefBySetter() {
        BeanFactory beanFactory = new XmlBeanFactory(new ClassPathResource("circle.xml"));
        TestA testA = (TestA) beanFactory.getBean("testA2");
    }

жң¬ж–Үзҡ„жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢд»Јз ҒеҸҜд»Ҙз§»жӯҘspring-learnд»“еә“

жөӢиҜ•з»“жһңиЎЁжҳҺпјҡеҸӘжңүеҚ•дҫӢжЁЎејҸдёӢйҖҡиҝҮеұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘжүҚиғҪеӨҹе®һзҺ°еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҢе…¶д»–жғ…еҶөдёӢйғҪе°ҶжҠӣеҮәд»ҘдёӢејӮеёёBeanCreationExceptionгҖӮ

жәҗз Ғе®һзҺ°

и°ғз”Ёж—¶еәҸеӣҫ

жҲ‘д»¬д»ҺдёҠиҫ№зҡ„жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢеҮәеҸ‘еҲҶжһҗжәҗз Ғе®һзҺ°пјҢдё»иҰҒж¶үеҸҠзҡ„зұ»еҢ…жӢ¬XmlBeanFactoryеҸҠе…¶зҲ¶зұ»AbstractBeanFactoryпјҢе’ҢDefaultSingletonBeanRegistryд»ҘеҸҠе®ғзҡ„зҲ¶зұ»AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactoryгҖӮж ёеҝғзҡ„ж–№жі•еҰӮдёӢж—¶еәҸеӣҫпјҡ

иҜ»иҖ…еҸҜд»ҘжІҝзқҖиҝҷдёӘж—¶еәҸеӣҫзҡ„жҖқи·ҜеҺ»йҳ…иҜ»дёӢbeanеҲқе§ӢеҢ–жһ„е»әзҡ„жәҗз ҒгҖӮ

жЈҖжҹҘзј“еӯҳзҡ„еҚ•дҫӢ

жҲ‘д»¬зӣҙжҺҘд»ҺAbstractBeanFactory#doGetBeanејҖе§Ӣж·ұе…ҘгҖӮиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•дёҖејҖе§Ӣе…Ҳи°ғз”ЁgetSingleton(beanName)жЈҖжҹҘзј“еӯҳйҮҢжҳҜеҗҰжңүеҗҚдёәnameзҡ„еҚ•дҫӢBeanзј“еӯҳгҖӮ

protected <T> T doGetBean( String name, @Nullable Class<T> requiredType, @Nullable Object[] args, boolean typeCheckOnly)
            throws BeansException {

  String beanName = transformedBeanName(name);
  Object bean;

  // иҺ·еҸ–е·Із»ҸжіЁеҶҢзҡ„еҚ•дҫӢbeanе®һдҫӢ
  Object sharedInstance = getSingleton(beanName);

  // ...

}

жіЁж„ҸgetSingleton(beanName)й»ҳи®Өдј е…Ҙзҡ„allowEarlyReferenceеҸӮж•°дёәtrueгҖӮEarlyReferenceпјҲж—©жңҹеј•з”Ёпјүе…¶е®һе°ұжҳҜspringе°ҶиҝҳжІЎжңүеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҜ•зҡ„еҚ•дҫӢbeanж”ҫиҝӣзј“еӯҳзҡ„beanеј•з”ЁпјҢеҪ“еҸ‘з”ҹеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢеҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘеј•з”ЁиҝҷдёӘж—©жңҹеј•з”ЁпјҢиҖҢдёҚдјҡеҸ‘з”ҹжӯ»еҫӘзҺҜдёҚж–ӯең°иҝӣиЎҢbeanеҲқе§ӢеҢ–гҖӮ

@Override
@Nullable
public Object getSingleton(String beanName) {
  return getSingleton(beanName, true);
}

@Nullable
protected Object getSingleton(String beanName, boolean allowEarlyReference) {
  // д»ҺsingletonObjectsиҺ·еҸ–е·Із»ҸеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҜ•зҡ„еҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎ
  Object singletonObject = this.singletonObjects.get(beanName);
  // еҲӨж–ӯиҜҘbeanжҳҜдёҚжҳҜжӯЈеңЁеҲқе§ӢеҢ–зҡ„еҚ•дҫӢbean
  if (singletonObject == null && isSingletonCurrentlyInCreation(beanName)) {
    synchronized (this.singletonObjects) {
      // д»ҺearlySingletonObjectsдёӯиҺ·еҸ–еҚ•дҫӢbean
      singletonObject = this.earlySingletonObjects.get(beanName);
      if (singletonObject == null && allowEarlyReference) {
        // д»ҺsingletonFactoriesзј“еӯҳйҮҢиҺ·еҸ–еҚ•дҫӢе·ҘеҺӮеҜ№иұЎ
        ObjectFactory<?> singletonFactory = this.singletonFactories.get(beanName);
        if (singletonFactory != null) {
          // йҖҡиҝҮеҚ•дҫӢе·ҘеҺӮеҜ№иұЎдёӯиҺ·еҸ–ж—©жңҹеҚ•дҫӢbeanеҜ№иұЎпјҢе№¶зј“еӯҳеҲ°earlySingletonObjectsдёӯ
          singletonObject = singletonFactory.getObject();
          this.earlySingletonObjects.put(beanName, singletonObject);
          this.singletonFactories.remove(beanName);
        }
      }
    }
  }
  return singletonObject;
}

public boolean isSingletonCurrentlyInCreation(String beanName) {
  return this.singletonsCurrentlyInCreation.contains(beanName);
}

жҖ»з»“дёӢпјҢgetSingletonзҡ„жөҒзЁӢе°ұжҳҜпјҡ

  • еҰӮжһңиҜҘеҚ•дҫӢе·Із»ҸеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҜ•пјҢзӣҙжҺҘиҝ”еӣһпјӣ
  • еҰӮжһңжҳҜеңЁе»әзҡ„еҚ•дҫӢпјҢеҲҷе°қиҜ•иҝ”еӣһеҚ•дҫӢbeanж—©жңҹеј•з”ЁпјҲд№ҹе°ұжҳҜе°ҡжңӘжһ„е»әе®Ңзҡ„еҚҠжҲҗе“Ғbeanеј•з”Ёпјүпјӣ
  • еҰӮжһңжңүеҚ•дҫӢе·ҘеҺӮеҜ№иұЎпјҢеҲҷдҪҝз”ЁиҜҘеҜ№иұЎиҺ·еҸ–еҚ•дҫӢbeanж—©жңҹеј•з”ЁпјҢеҠ иҝӣзј“еӯҳе№¶иҝ”еӣһпјӣ

иҝҷйҮҢе…Ҳи®°дҪҸиҝҷдёӘеҮ дёӘзј“еӯҳеҫҲйҮҚиҰҒпјҢе°Өе…¶е…іжіЁsingletonFactoriesпјҢдёӢж–Үдјҡз”ЁеҲ°е®ғгҖӮ

жЈҖжҹҘprototypeеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–

дёҠиҝ°жЈҖжҹҘеҚ•дҫӢеҰӮжһңиҝ”еӣһnullпјҢеҲҷдјҡиҝӣе…ҘPrototypeзҡ„еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–жЈҖжөӢпјҡ

Object sharedInstance = getSingleton(beanName);
if (sharedInstance != null && args == null) {
  // ...
} else {
  // prototypeеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–жЈҖжөӢ
  if (isPrototypeCurrentlyInCreation(beanName)) {
    throw new BeanCurrentlyInCreationException(beanName);
  }
  // ...
}

иҝҷйҮҢжЈҖжҹҘеҲ°иҜҘbeanжҳҜprototypeпјҢиҖҢдё”еӨ„дәҺжһ„е»әдёӯзҠ¶жҖҒпјҢеҲҷж„Ҹе‘ізқҖеҪўжҲҗдәҶеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҢзӣҙжҺҘжҠӣејӮеёёз»ҲжӯўеҲқе§ӢеҢ–иҝҮзЁӢгҖӮ

protected boolean isPrototypeCurrentlyInCreation(String beanName) {
  Object curVal = this.prototypesCurrentlyInCreation.get();
  return (curVal != null &&
      (curVal.equals(beanName) || (curVal instanceof Set && ((Set<?>) curVal).contains(beanName))));
}

жЈҖжҹҘж–№жі•еҫҲз®ҖеҚ•пјҢйҖҡиҝҮеҗҚеӯ—зӣёеҗҢжқҘеҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰдёәеҗҢдёҖдёӘbeanгҖӮжіЁж„Ҹеӣ дёәжҳҜprototypeпјҢжүҖд»Ҙзј“еӯҳеӯ—ж®өprototypesCurrentlyInCreationеҸҜиғҪдёәSetпјҢеҢ…еҗ«еӨҡдёӘbeanе®һдҫӢгҖӮ

еӣ жӯӨжҲ‘д»¬зҹҘйҒ“пјҢprototypeзҡ„beanж— и®әжҳҜжһ„йҖ еҷЁжҲ–иҖ…еұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘпјҢйғҪдёҚе…Ғи®ёе®һзҺ°еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–гҖӮ

жһ„е»әдёҚеҗҢзұ»еһӢзҡ„е®һдҫӢ

ж №жҚ®beanзұ»еһӢпјҢеҲҶеҲ«жңүеҗ„иҮӘзҡ„жһ„е»әзұ»еһӢпјҢеҲҶдёәеҚ•дҫӢгҖҒprototypeе’Ңе…¶д»–зұ»еһӢдёүз§Қжғ…еҶөпјҡ

//еҚ•дҫӢ
if (mbd.isSingleton()) {
  sharedInstance = getSingleton(beanName, () -> {
    try {
      return createBean(beanName, mbd, args);
    }
    catch (BeansException ex) {
      // Explicitly remove instance from singleton cache: It might have been put there
      // eagerly by the creation process, to allow for circular reference resolution.
      // Also remove any beans that received a temporary reference to the bean.
      destroySingleton(beanName);
      throw ex;
    }
  });
  bean = getObjectForBeanInstance(sharedInstance, name, beanName, mbd);
}
// prototypeзұ»еһӢ
else if (mbd.isPrototype()) {
  // It's a prototype -> create a new instance.
  Object prototypeInstance = null;
  try {
    beforePrototypeCreation(beanName);
    prototypeInstance = createBean(beanName, mbd, args);
  }
  finally {
    afterPrototypeCreation(beanName);
  }
  bean = getObjectForBeanInstance(prototypeInstance, name, beanName, mbd);
}
// е…¶д»–зұ»еһӢ
else {
  String scopeName = mbd.getScope();
  if (!StringUtils.hasLength(scopeName)) {
    throw new IllegalStateException("No scope name defined for bean Вҙ" + beanName + "'");
  }
  Scope scope = this.scopes.get(scopeName);
  if (scope == null) {
    throw new IllegalStateException("No Scope registered for scope name '" + scopeName + "'");
  }
  try {
    Object scopedInstance = scope.get(beanName, () -> {
      beforePrototypeCreation(beanName);
      try {
        return createBean(beanName, mbd, args);
      }
      finally {
        afterPrototypeCreation(beanName);
      }
    });
    bean = getObjectForBeanInstance(scopedInstance, name, beanName, mbd);
  }
  catch (IllegalStateException ex) {
    throw new BeanCreationException(beanName,
        "Scope '" + scopeName + "' is not active for the current thread; consider " +
        "defining a scoped proxy for this bean if you intend to refer to it from a singleton",
        ex);
  }
}

еҖјеҫ—жіЁж„Ҹзҡ„жҳҜжһ„е»әе®һдҫӢеүҚпјҢspringйғҪдјҡеңЁзј“еӯҳйҮҢж Үи®°иҜҘbeanжӯЈеёёжһ„е»әдёӯгҖӮ

жҜ”еҰӮеҚ•дҫӢзұ»еһӢеңЁжһ„е»әеүҚдјҡи°ғз”ЁbeforeSingletonCreation(beanName),иҜҘж–№жі•дјҡжҠҠиҜҘbeanNameеҠ е…Ҙзј“еӯҳдёӯгҖӮеңЁеүҚдёҖдёӘз« иҠӮ гҖҠжЈҖжҹҘзј“еӯҳзҡ„еҚ•дҫӢгҖӢ дёӯдјҡдҪҝз”ЁиҝҷйҮҢзҡ„зј“еӯҳжқҘеҲӨж–ӯиҝҷдёӘbeanжҳҜеҗҰеӨ„дәҺеҚ•дҫӢжһ„е»әзҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮжіЁж„ҸиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•пјҢеҰӮжһңзј“еӯҳйҮҢиҫ№е·ІеӯҳеңЁиҜҘbeanпјҢдјҡжҠӣеҮәBeanCurrentlyInCreationExceptionејӮеёёгҖӮиҝҷдёӘејӮеёёжӯЈжҳҜеңЁжһ„йҖ еҷЁеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҲеҚ•дҫӢпјүзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷжҠӣеҮәгҖӮ

protected void beforeSingletonCreation(String beanName) {
  if (!this.inCreationCheckExclusions.contains(beanName) && !this.singletonsCurrentlyInCreation.add(beanName)) {
    throw new BeanCurrentlyInCreationException(beanName);
  }
}

иҖҢprototypeд»ҘеҸҠе…¶д»–зұ»еһӢи°ғз”Ёзҡ„жҳҜbeforePrototypeCreation(beanName)пјҢеҗҢж ·д№ҹжҳҜе°ҶbeanNameеҠ е…Ҙзј“еӯҳпјҡ

protected void beforePrototypeCreation(String beanName) {
  Object curVal = this.prototypesCurrentlyInCreation.get();
  if (curVal == null) {
    this.prototypesCurrentlyInCreation.set(beanName);
  }
  else if (curVal instanceof String) {
    Set<String> beanNameSet = new HashSet<>(2);
    beanNameSet.add((String) curVal);
    beanNameSet.add(beanName);
    this.prototypesCurrentlyInCreation.set(beanNameSet);
  }
  else {
    Set<String> beanNameSet = (Set<String>) curVal;
    beanNameSet.add(beanName);
  }
}

иҝҷйҮҢз”ЁеҲ°зҡ„зј“еӯҳprototypesCurrentlyInCreationпјҢд№ҹжӯЈеҘҪе‘јеә”дәҶжҳҜеүҚдёҖз«  гҖҠжЈҖжҹҘprototypeеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–гҖӢгҖӮ

е…¶д»–зұ»еһӢзҡ„beanе’Ңprototypeзұ»еһӢзӣёеҗҢгҖӮ

еӣ жӯӨпјҢspringеңЁжһ„е»әbeanд№ӢеүҚйғҪдјҡеңЁзј“еӯҳйҮҢж Үи®°иҜҘbeanеӨ„дәҺжһ„е»әдёӯпјҢжүҖд»ҘеҪ“еҸ‘з”ҹеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷеҸҜд»Ҙеҝ«йҖҹж„ҹзҹҘеҲ°гҖӮ

еҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎзҡ„ж—©жңҹеј•з”Ё

жҺҘдёҠж–ҮпјҢеҰӮжһңжҳҜеҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎпјҢдјҡи°ғз”ЁеҢҝеҗҚеҮҪж•°ж–°е»әcreateBeanиҝӣиЎҢеҚ•дҫӢbeanжһ„е»әпјҡ

if (mbd.isSingleton()) {
  sharedInstance = getSingleton(beanName, () -> {
    try {
      return createBean(beanName, mbd, args);
    }
    catch (BeansException ex) {
      // Explicitly remove instance from singleton cache: It might have been put there
      // eagerly by the creation process, to allow for circular reference resolution.
      // Also remove any beans that received a temporary reference to the bean.
      destroySingleton(beanName);
      throw ex;
    }
  });
}

createBeanеҸӘжҳҜеҒҡдёҖдәӣжһ„йҖ еүҚзҡ„еҮҶеӨҮпјҢе®һйҷ…зҡ„жһ„е»әиҝҮзЁӢеңЁdoCreateBeanдёӯгҖӮиҝҷеҫҲз¬ҰеҗҲspringдёҖиҙҜзҡ„е‘ҪеҗҚйЈҺж јпјҡ

protected Object doCreateBean(String beanName, RootBeanDefinition mbd, @Nullable Object[] args) throws BeanCreationException {
  /// ...
  if (instanceWrapper == null) {
    instanceWrapper = createBeanInstance(beanName, mbd, args);
  }
  Object bean = instanceWrapper.getWrappedInstance();
  /// ...

  // Eagerly cache singletons to be able to resolve circular references
  // even when triggered by lifecycle interfaces like BeanFactoryAware.
  boolean earlySingletonExposure = (mbd.isSingleton() && this.allowCircularReferences &&
      isSingletonCurrentlyInCreation(beanName));
  if (earlySingletonExposure) {
    if (logger.isTraceEnabled()) {
      logger.trace("Eagerly caching bean '" + beanName +
          "' to allow for resolving potential circular references");
    }
    addSingletonFactory(beanName, () -> getEarlyBeanReference(beanName, mbd, bean));
  }

  // Initialize the bean instance.
  Object exposedObject = bean;
  try {
    populateBean(beanName, mbd, instanceWrapper);
    exposedObject = initializeBean(beanName, exposedObject, mbd);
  }

  /// ...
}

doCreateBeanжҜ”иҫғй•ҝпјҢдёҠиҫ№еҸӘдҝқз•ҷж ёеҝғд»Јз ҒгҖӮеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°дё»иҰҒеҢ…еҗ«дёүдёӘжӯҘйӘӨпјҡ

  • 1.и°ғз”ЁcreateBeanInstanceеҲқе§ӢеҢ–дёҖдёӘеҚҠжҲҗе“Ғзҡ„beanпјҢиҜҘж–№жі•дёӯдјҡеҜ»жүҫж»Ўи¶іжқЎд»¶зҡ„жһ„йҖ еҮҪж•°иҝӣиЎҢbeanзҡ„еҲқе§ӢеҢ–пјӣ
  • 2.еҰӮжһңжҳҜжһ„е»әдёӯзҡ„еҚ•дҫӢbeanпјҢе№¶дё”е…Ғи®ёеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҲй»ҳи®Өе…Ғи®ёпјүпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳе°ұдјҡе°қиҜ•и°ғз”ЁaddSingletonFactoryж–№жі•жҸҗеүҚжӣқе…үдёҖдёӘж—©жңҹеј•з”ЁпјҲд№ҹе°ұжҳҜдёҖдёӘеҚҠжҲҗе“ҒbeanпјүеҲ°зј“еӯҳдёӯпјӣ
  • 3.и°ғз”ЁpopulateBeanгҖҒinitializeBeanпјҢе°ҶеҚҠжҲҗе“Ғзҡ„beanиҝӣдёҖжӯҘеҲқе§ӢеҢ–пјҢдё»иҰҒжҳҜеӨ„зҗҶеұһжҖ§жіЁе…Ҙзӯүзӯүпјӣ

жүјиҰҒең°и®ІпјҢжӯҘйӘӨдёҖеӨ„зҗҶдәҶжһ„йҖ еҷЁжіЁе…ҘпјӣжӯҘйӘӨдәҢиҝӣиЎҢдәҶеҚҠжҲҗе“Ғbeanзҡ„ж—©жңҹеј•з”Ёжӣқе…үпјӣжӯҘйӘӨдёүиҝӣиЎҢдәҶеұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘпјҒ

жҲ‘д»¬жқҘзңӢзңӢж—©жңҹеј•з”Ёжӣқе…үзҡ„йҖ»иҫ‘пјҡ

protected void addSingletonFactory(String beanName, ObjectFactory<?> singletonFactory) {
  Assert.notNull(singletonFactory, "Singleton factory must not be null");
  synchronized (this.singletonObjects) {
    if (!this.singletonObjects.containsKey(beanName)) {
      this.singletonFactories.put(beanName, singletonFactory);
      this.earlySingletonObjects.remove(beanName);
      this.registeredSingletons.add(beanName);
    }
  }
}

жҲ‘д»¬зңӢеҲ°singletonFactoriesдёӯдјҡзј“еӯҳдёҖдёӘе·ҘеҺӮеҜ№иұЎObjectFactoryпјҢиҖҢиҝҷдёӘObjectFactoryзҡ„getObjectж–№жі•жӯЈжҳҜеҸҜд»Ҙиҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘеӨ„дәҺжһ„е»әдёӯеҚҠжҲҗе“ҒbeanеҜ№иұЎеј•з”ЁгҖӮ

жҲ‘д»¬еңЁеүҚиҫ№е·Із»Ҹи®ІеҲ°пјҢеҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎжһ„е»әдёӯеҰӮжһңеҸ‘зҺ°еҮәзҺ°еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҢдјҡе°қиҜ•д»ҺеҚ•дҫӢзҡ„е·ҘеҺӮеҜ№иұЎдёӯиҺ·еҫ—дёҖдёӘж—©жңҹbeanеҜ№иұЎпјҢе№¶иҝ”еӣһпјҢд»ҺиҖҢйҒҝе…ҚеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–еҮәзҺ°жӯ»еҫӘзҺҜгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еҶҚжқҘеӣһеҝҶдёӢпјҡ

@Nullable
protected Object getSingleton(String beanName, boolean allowEarlyReference) {
  // д»ҺsingletonObjectsиҺ·еҸ–е·Із»ҸеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҜ•зҡ„еҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎ
  Object singletonObject = this.singletonObjects.get(beanName);
  // еҲӨж–ӯиҜҘbeanжҳҜдёҚжҳҜжӯЈеңЁеҲқе§ӢеҢ–зҡ„еҚ•дҫӢbean
  if (singletonObject == null && isSingletonCurrentlyInCreation(beanName)) {
    synchronized (this.singletonObjects) {
      // д»ҺearlySingletonObjectsдёӯиҺ·еҸ–еҚ•дҫӢbean
      singletonObject = this.earlySingletonObjects.get(beanName);
      if (singletonObject == null && allowEarlyReference) {
        // д»ҺsingletonFactoriesзј“еӯҳйҮҢиҺ·еҸ–еҚ•дҫӢе·ҘеҺӮеҜ№иұЎ
        ObjectFactory<?> singletonFactory = this.singletonFactories.get(beanName);
        if (singletonFactory != null) {
          // йҖҡиҝҮеҚ•дҫӢе·ҘеҺӮеҜ№иұЎдёӯиҺ·еҸ–ж—©жңҹеҚ•дҫӢbeanеҜ№иұЎпјҢе№¶зј“еӯҳеҲ°earlySingletonObjectsдёӯ
          singletonObject = singletonFactory.getObject();
          this.earlySingletonObjects.put(beanName, singletonObject);
          this.singletonFactories.remove(beanName);
        }
      }
    }
  }
  return singletonObject;
}

еӣ жӯӨзңӢеҲ°иҝҷйҮҢдҪ е°ұеә”иҜҘжҳҺзҷҪпјҢеҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎзҡ„жһ„йҖ еҷЁжіЁе…ҘжІЎжңүиҝӣиЎҢж—©жңҹеј•з”Ёжӣқе…үпјҢжүҖд»ҘжҳҜдёҚиғҪе®һзҺ°еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„пјҒдҪҶжҳҜеҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎзҡ„еұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘжҳҜе…ҲиҝӣиЎҢдәҶж—©жңҹеј•з”Ёжӣқе…үпјҢеңЁиҝӣиЎҢеұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘпјҢжүҖд»ҘжҳҜж”ҜжҢҒеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„пјҒ

жҖ»з»“

жң¬ж–Үдё»иҰҒжҳҜжҺўи®ЁspringеҜ№еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–зҡ„еӨ„зҗҶзӯ–з•Ҙе’Ңе®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬и®ӨиҜҶеҲ°springеҸӘж”ҜжҢҒеҚ•дҫӢеҜ№иұЎзҡ„еұһжҖ§жіЁе…ҘеҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–пјҢиҖҢе…¶д»–зұ»еһӢзҡ„еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–йғҪдёҚж”ҜжҢҒгҖӮ

entry.title: Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ е…ӯ жөҒж°ҙзәҝеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ: Handler
entry.content:
жң¬ж–ҮжҳҜж°ёйЎәеӨ§зүӣеҶҷзҡ„зі»еҲ—ж•ҷзЁӢгҖҠжәҗз Ғд№ӢдёӢж— з§ҳеҜҶ в”Җв”Җ еҒҡжңҖеҘҪзҡ„ Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗж•ҷзЁӢгҖӢзҡ„з»ӯеҶҷз« иҠӮгҖӮжң¬з« дё»иҰҒд»Ӣз»ҚNettyдёӯз”ЁжқҘеӨ„зҗҶж•°жҚ®жөҒзҡ„handlerд»ҘеҸҠеә•еұӮеҺҹзҗҶгҖӮ

еҶҷеңЁжңҖеүҚ

ж°ёйЎәеүҚиҫҲе·ІеҶҷе®Ңзҡ„з« иҠӮжңүеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ з•ӘеӨ–зҜҮ Java NIO зҡ„еүҚз”ҹд»Ҡдё–
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ йӣ¶ зЈЁеҲҖдёҚиҜҜз Қжҹҙе·Ҙ жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗзҺҜеўғжҗӯе»ә
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёҖ жҸӯејҖ Bootstrap зҘһз§ҳзҡ„зәўзӣ–еӨҙ (е®ўжҲ·з«Ҝ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёҖ жҸӯејҖ Bootstrap зҘһз§ҳзҡ„зәўзӣ–еӨҙ (жңҚеҠЎеҷЁз«Ҝ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дәҢ иҙҜз©ҝ Netty зҡ„еӨ§еҠЁи„ү в”Җв”Җ ChannelPipeline (дёҖ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дәҢ иҙҜз©ҝ Netty зҡ„еӨ§еҠЁи„ү в”Җв”Җ ChannelPipeline (дәҢ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёү жҲ‘е°ұжҳҜеӨ§еҗҚйјҺйјҺзҡ„ EventLoop(дёҖ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёү жҲ‘е°ұжҳҜеӨ§еҗҚйјҺйјҺзҡ„ EventLoop(дәҢ)

з¬”иҖ…е°қиҜ•з»ӯеҶҷзҡ„з« иҠӮпјҡ

  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ еӣӣ Promise дёҺ Future: еҸҢеӯҗжҳҹзҡ„з§ҳеҜҶ
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дә” еҘ”и…ҫзҡ„иЎҖж¶І: ByteBuf
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ е…ӯ жөҒж°ҙзәҝеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ: Handler

жң¬ж–ҮдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„nettyзүҲжң¬дёә4.1.33.Final

еӣһеҝҶhandler

й“ҫејҸз»“жһ„

жҲ‘д»¬е…ҲжқҘеӣһеҝҶдёӢеңЁгҖҠNetty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дәҢ иҙҜз©ҝ Netty зҡ„еӨ§еҠЁи„ү в”Җв”Җ ChannelPipeline (дёҖ)гҖӢжҸҗеҲ°иҝҮжқҘзҡ„handlerй“ҫејҸз»“жһ„пјҡ

  • handlerеҲҶдёәе®һзҺ°ChannelInboundHandlerжҺҘеҸЈзҡ„е…Ҙз«ҷеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁе’Ңе®һзҺ°ChannelOutboundHandlerжҺҘеҸЈзҡ„еҮәз«ҷеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁпјӣ
  • handlerз”ұDefaultChannelHandlerContextиҝӣиЎҢеҢ…иЈ…пјҢе№¶з»„жҲҗдёҖдёӘеҸҢеҗ‘й“ҫиЎЁпјӣ
  • жүҖжңүзҡ„е…Ҙз«ҷж“ҚдҪңд»ҺHeadContextеҮәеҸ‘пјҢжІҝзқҖй“ҫиЎЁз»Ҹз”ұжҜҸдёҖдёӘе…Ҙз«ҷеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁеӨ„зҗҶеҗҺеҗ‘TailContextж–№еҗ‘дј йҖ’пјӣ
  • жүҖжңүзҡ„еҮәз«ҷж“ҚдҪңд»ҺTailContextеҮәеҸ‘пјҢжІҝзқҖй“ҫиЎЁз»Ҹз”ұжҜҸдёҖдёӘеҮәз«ҷеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁеӨ„зҗҶеҗҺеҗ‘HeadContextж–№еҗ‘дј йҖ’пјӣ
  • ж— и®әжҳҜе…Ҙз«ҷж“ҚдҪңжҠ‘жҲ–жҳҜеҮәз«ҷж“ҚдҪңзҡ„дј йҖ’пјҢйғҪеҸҜд»ҘеңЁhandlerдёӯжҢүз…§дёҡеҠЎйңҖжұӮиў«дёӯж–ӯжҲ–иҖ…ж”№еҸҳдј йҖ’ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ

жң¬ж–Үзҡ„е°ҒйқўеӣҫдҪҝз”ЁдәҶдёҖеј жөҒж°ҙзәҝеҚЎйҖҡеӣҫпјҢжӯЈеӣ дёәиҝҷдёӘй“ҫејҸз»“жһ„йқһеёёзұ»дјјдәҺеҲ¶йҖ дёҡйҮҢзҡ„жөҒж°ҙзәҝпјҢhandlerе°ұеғҸжҳҜжөҒж°ҙйҮҢзҡ„еӨ„зҗҶиҠӮзӮ№пјҢиҖҢе…Ҙз«ҷеҮәз«ҷж•°жҚ®е°ұеҰӮеҗҢжөҒж°ҙзәҝдёҠиў«еҠ е·Ҙзҡ„дә§е“ҒгҖӮ

еҲқе§ӢеҢ–

дёҖдёӘеёёи§Ғзҡ„е®ўжҲ·з«ҜеҲқе§ӢеҢ–иҝҮзЁӢжҳҜиҝҷдёӘж ·еӯҗзҡ„пјҡ

      Bootstrap bootstrap = new Bootstrap();
        ChannelFuture future = bootstrap.group(new NioEventLoopGroup(10))
                .channel(NioSocketChannel.class)
                .handler(new ChannelInitializer<SocketChannel>() {
                    @Override
                    protected void initChannel(SocketChannel ch) throws Exception {
                        // з®ЎйҒ“дёӯж·»еҠ еҹәдәҺжҚўиЎҢз¬ҰеҲҶеүІеӯ—з¬ҰдёІзҡ„и§ЈжһҗеҷЁ
                        ch.pipeline().addLast(new LineBasedFrameDecoder(1024));
                        // з®ЎйҒ“дёӯж·»еҠ еӯ—з¬ҰдёІзј–з Ғи§Јз ҒеҷЁ
                        ch.pipeline().addLast(new StringDecoder(Charset.forName("UTF-8")));
                        ch.pipeline().addLast(new StringEncoder(Charset.forName("UTF-8")));
                        // з®ЎйҒ“дёӯж·»еҠ жңҚеҠЎз«ҜеӨ„зҗҶйҖ»иҫ‘
                        ch.pipeline().addLast(new MyClientEchoHandler());
                    }
                }).connect("127.0.0.1", 9898).sync();

    future.channel().closeFuture().sync();

еңЁChannelInitializerзҡ„е®һзҺ°ж–№жі•дёӯпјҢи°ғз”Ёch.pipeline().addLastж–№жі•пјҢдёҚж–ӯең°е°ҶhandlerиҝҪеҠ еҲ°еҸҢеҗ‘й“ҫиЎЁдёӯпјҲTailContextд№ӢеүҚпјүпјҢд»ҺиҖҢеҪўжҲҗдёҠеӣҫжүҖзӨәзҡ„еҸҢеҗ‘й“ҫиЎЁз»“жһ„гҖӮ

е…Ҙз«ҷhandler

е…Ҙз«ҷhandlerйғҪе®һзҺ°дәҶChannelInboundHandlerжҺҘеҸЈпјҡ

public interface ChannelInboundHandler extends ChannelHandler {

    void channelRegistered(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;

    void channelUnregistered(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;

    void channelActive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;

    void channelInactive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;

    void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception;

    void channelReadComplete(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;

    void userEventTriggered(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object evt) throws Exception;

    void channelWritabilityChanged(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;

    @Override
    @SuppressWarnings("deprecation")
    void exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Throwable cause) throws Exception;
}

иҜҘжҺҘеҸЈеҶ…е®ҡд№үдәҶеёёи§Ғзҡ„е…Ҙз«ҷж“ҚдҪңеҢ…жӢ¬channelActiveгҖҒchannelReadгҖҒchannelInactiveзӯүпјҢиҝҳж”ҜжҢҒз”ЁжҲ·иҮӘе®ҡд№үе…Ҙз«ҷж“ҚдҪңuserEventTriggeredгҖӮ

ChannelInboundHandlerAdapterжҳҜChannelInboundHandlerжҺҘеҸЈзҡ„дёҖдёӘй»ҳи®Өе®һзҺ°пјҢеҶ…йғЁжүҖжңүж–№жі•йғҪжҳҜе°Ҷе…Ҙз«ҷж“ҚдҪңеҫҖеҗҺдј йҖ’пјҢдёҚдҪңд»»дҪ•дёҡеҠЎеӨ„зҗҶпјҢеҰӮchannelReadж–№жі•пјҡ

    @Override
    public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception {
        ctx.fireChannelRead(msg);
    }

ChannelInboundHandlerAdapterе№¶жІЎжңүеҢ…еҗ«д»»дҪ•дёҡеҠЎйҖ»иҫ‘пјҢз”ЁжҲ·зҡ„handlerеӯҗзұ»еҸҜд»Ҙз»§жүҝе®ғпјҢз„¶еҗҺиҰҶзӣ–е№¶е®һзҺ°е…¶дёӯзҡ„йғЁеҲҶж–№жі•гҖӮдёӢж–ҮиҰҒжҸҗеҲ°зҡ„SimpleChannelInboundHandlerд»ҘеҸҠByteToMessageDecoderжӯЈжҳҜе…¶дёӯдёӨдёӘжЎҲдҫӢгҖӮ

еҮәз«ҷhandler

еҮәз«ҷhandlerйғҪе®һзҺ°дәҶChannelOutboundHandlerжҺҘеҸЈпјҢе№¶жҸҗдҫӣеёёи§Ғзҡ„еҮәз«ҷж“ҚдҪңпјҲbindгҖҒconnectгҖҒcloseгҖҒwriteгҖҒflushзӯүзӯүпјүпјҡ

public interface ChannelOutboundHandler extends ChannelHandler {

    void bind(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, SocketAddress localAddress, ChannelPromise promise) throws Exception;

    void connect(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, SocketAddress remoteAddress,
            SocketAddress localAddress, ChannelPromise promise) throws Exception;

    void disconnect(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ChannelPromise promise) throws Exception;

    void close(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ChannelPromise promise) throws Exception;

    void deregister(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ChannelPromise promise) throws Exception;

    void read(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;

    void write(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg, ChannelPromise promise) throws Exception;

    void flush(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception;
}

зұ»дјјең°пјҢChannelOutboundHandlerAdapterжҳҜиҜҘжҺҘеҸЈзҡ„дёҖдёӘй»ҳи®Өе®һзҺ°пјҢеҶ…йғЁжүҖжңүж–№жі•йғҪжҳҜе°ҶеҮәз«ҷж“ҚдҪңеҫҖеүҚдј йҖ’пјҢдёҚдҪңд»»дҪ•дёҡеҠЎеӨ„зҗҶпјҢеҰӮwriteж–№жі•пјҡ

    @Override
    public void write(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg, ChannelPromise promise) throws Exception {
        ctx.write(msg, promise);
    }

еҗҢж ·ең°пјҢеӯҗзұ»еҸҜд»Ҙз»§жүҝChannelOutboundHandlerAdapterпјҢе№¶иҰҶзӣ–е®һзҺ°е…¶дёӯзҡ„д»»дҪ•ж–№жі•гҖӮMessageToByteEncoderе’ҢMessageToMessageEncoderиҝҷдёӨдёӘзј–з ҒеҷЁжҳҜеёёи§Ғзҡ„е®һзҺ°еӯҗзұ»гҖӮ

и§Јз ҒеҷЁdecoder

и§Јз ҒеҷЁжҳҜе…ёеһӢзҡ„е…Ҙз«ҷеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁгҖӮи§Јз ҒеҷЁеӨ„зҗҶзҡ„е…Ҙз«ҷж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„дёҖиҲ¬жҳҜByteBufгҖӮ

ByteToMessageDecoder

дҫӢеҰӮByteToMessageDecoderпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙд»ҺByteBufиҝҷз§Қеӯ—иҠӮжөҒдёӯиҜ»еҸ–ж•°жҚ®пјҢз„¶еҗҺиҪ¬жҚўдёәе…¶д»–еҪўејҸзҡ„ж¶ҲжҒҜеҜ№иұЎпјҲд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜByteBufпјүгҖӮ

     @Override
    public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception {
        if (msg instanceof ByteBuf) {
            // д»…еӨ„зҗҶByteBufеҜ№иұЎ
            // ж–°е»әoutеҲ—иЎЁпјҢз”ЁдәҺдҝқеӯҳи§Јз Ғеҫ—еҲ°зҡ„еҜ№иұЎеҲ—иЎЁ
            CodecOutputList out = CodecOutputList.newInstance();
            try {
                ByteBuf data = (ByteBuf) msg;
                first = cumulation == null;
                if (first) {
                    cumulation = data;
                } else {
                    cumulation = cumulator.cumulate(ctx.alloc(), cumulation, data);
                }
                // и°ғз”Ёи§Јз Ғе®һзҺ°ж–№жі•
                callDecode(ctx, cumulation, out);
            } catch (DecoderException e) {
                throw e;
            } catch (Exception e) {
                throw new DecoderException(e);
            } finally {
                if (cumulation != null && !cumulation.isReadable()) {
                    numReads = 0;
                    cumulation.release();
                    cumulation = null;
                } else if (++ numReads >= discardAfterReads) {
                    // We did enough reads already try to discard some bytes so we not risk to see a OOME.
                    // See https://github.com/netty/netty/issues/4275
                    numReads = 0;
                    discardSomeReadBytes();
                }

                int size = out.size();
                decodeWasNull = !out.insertSinceRecycled();
                // и°ғз”ЁfireChannelReadдј йҖ’и§Јз Ғеҫ—еҲ°зҡ„еҜ№иұЎеҲ—иЎЁout
                fireChannelRead(ctx, out, size);
                // еӣһж”¶еҜ№иұЎ
                out.recycle();
            }
        } else {
            ctx.fireChannelRead(msg);
        }
    }
    protected void callDecode(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ByteBuf in, List<Object> out) {
        try {
            while (in.isReadable()) {
                // ...зңҒз•ҘйғЁеҲҶд»Јз Ғ...
                decodeRemovalReentryProtection(ctx, in, out);
                // ...зңҒз•ҘйғЁеҲҶд»Јз Ғ...
            }
        } catch (DecoderException e) {
             throw e;
        } catch (Exception cause) {
             throw new DecoderException(cause);
        }
     }

     final void decodeRemovalReentryProtection(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ByteBuf in, List<Object> out) throws Exception {
        decodeState = STATE_CALLING_CHILD_DECODE;
        try {
            decode(ctx, in, out);
        } finally {
            boolean removePending = decodeState == STATE_HANDLER_REMOVED_PENDING;
            decodeState = STATE_INIT;
            if (removePending) {
                handlerRemoved(ctx);
            }
        }
    }

еҸҜи§ҒcallDecodeеҶ…йғЁжҢҒз»ӯеҫӘзҺҜж¶Ҳиҙ№еӯ—иҠӮжөҒпјҢз„¶еҗҺеә•еұӮи°ғз”ЁдәҶеӯҗзұ»е®һзҺ°зҡ„жҠҪиұЎж–№жі•decodeиҝӣиЎҢи§Јз ҒгҖӮе…¶дёӯпјҢеёёи§Ғзҡ„е®һзҺ°зұ»жңүLineBasedFrameDecoderгҖӮ

LineBasedFrameDecoder

LineBasedFrameDecoderе®һзҺ°дәҶж №жҚ®дёҖдёӘByteBufд»ҘжҚўиЎҢз¬ҰеҲҶеүІдёәеӨҡдёӘByteBufзҡ„еҠҹиғҪпјҢж ёеҝғе®һзҺ°еҰӮдёӢпјҡ


    @Override
    protected final void decode(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ByteBuf in, List<Object> out) throws Exception {
        // и§Јз Ғеҫ—еҲ°зҡ„еҜ№иұЎйғҪж”ҫoutеҲ—иЎЁдёӯ
        Object decoded = decode(ctx, in);
        if (decoded != null) {
            out.add(decoded);
        }
    }

    protected Object decode(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ByteBuf buffer) throws Exception {
        final int eol = findEndOfLine(buffer);
        if (!discarding) {
            if (eol >= 0) {
                // еҰӮжһңжүҫеҲ°жҚўиЎҢз¬Ұ
                final ByteBuf frame;
                // и®Ўз®—еҪ“еүҚеё§зҡ„й•ҝеәҰд»ҘеҸҠеҲҶйҡ”з¬Ұй•ҝеәҰ
                final int length = eol - buffer.readerIndex();
                final int delimLength = buffer.getByte(eol) == '\r'? 2 : 1;

                if (length > maxLength) {
                    // еҰӮжһңиҜҘеё§й•ҝеәҰеӨ§дәҺжңҖеӨ§й•ҝеәҰпјҢеҲҷжҠӣејӮеёё
                    buffer.readerIndex(eol + delimLength);
                    fail(ctx, length);
                    return null;
                }

                if (stripDelimiter) {
                    // frameеҺ»жҺүеҲҶйҡ”з¬Ұ
                    frame = buffer.readRetainedSlice(length);
                    buffer.skipBytes(delimLength);
                } else {
                    // frameеҢ…еҗ«еҲҶйҡ”з¬Ұ
                    frame = buffer.readRetainedSlice(length + delimLength);
                }

                return frame;
            } else {
                final int length = buffer.readableBytes();
                if (length > maxLength) {
                    // еҰӮжһңжІЎжңүжҚўиЎҢз¬ҰпјҢиҖҢдё”иҜҘеё§й•ҝеәҰеӨ§дәҺжңҖеӨ§й•ҝеәҰ
                    // еҲҷж Үи®°discardingдёәtrueпјҢдё”дёўејғжүҖжңүеҸҜиҜ»ж•°жҚ®
                    discardedBytes = length;
                    buffer.readerIndex(buffer.writerIndex());
                    discarding = true;
                    offset = 0;
                    if (failFast) {
                        fail(ctx, "over " + discardedBytes);
                    }
                }
                return null;
            }
        } else {
            if (eol >= 0) {
                // еҰӮжһңжңүжҚўиЎҢз¬ҰпјҢдёўејғжҚўиЎҢз¬ҰеүҚзҡ„жүҖжңүеҸҜиҜ»ж•°жҚ®
                final int length = discardedBytes + eol - buffer.readerIndex();
                final int delimLength = buffer.getByte(eol) == '\r'? 2 : 1;
                buffer.readerIndex(eol + delimLength);
                discardedBytes = 0;
                discarding = false;
                if (!failFast) {
                    fail(ctx, length);
                }
            } else {
                // еҰӮжһңжІЎжңүжҚўиЎҢз¬ҰпјҢдёўејғжүҖжңүеҸҜиҜ»ж•°жҚ®
                discardedBytes += buffer.readableBytes();
                buffer.readerIndex(buffer.writerIndex());
                // We skip everything in the buffer, we need to set the offset to 0 again.
                offset = 0;
            }
            return null;
        }
    }

     private int findEndOfLine(final ByteBuf buffer) {
        int totalLength = buffer.readableBytes();
        // жүҫеҲ°жҚўиЎҢз¬Ұ\nжүҖеңЁзҡ„дёӢж Ү
        int i = buffer.forEachByte(buffer.readerIndex() + offset, totalLength - offset, ByteProcessor.FIND_LF);
        if (i >= 0) {
            offset = 0;
            // жҹҗдәӣзі»з»ҹд»Ҙ\r\nдҪңдёәжҚўиЎҢз¬ҰпјҢиҝҷйҮҢдҝ®ж”№дёӢж Үдёә\rзҡ„дёӢж Ү
            if (i > 0 && buffer.getByte(i - 1) == '\r') {
                i--;
            }
        } else {
            offset = totalLength;
        }
        return i;
    }

MessageToMessageDecoder

дёҠдёҖе°ҸиҠӮзҡ„ByteToMessageDecoderе®һзҺ°дәҶд»ҺByteBufеҲ°ж¶ҲжҒҜеҜ№иұЎзҡ„и§Јз ҒиҪ¬жҚўпјҢиҖҢMessageToMessageDecoderеҸҜд»Ҙе®һзҺ°ж¶ҲжҒҜд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„и§Јз ҒиҪ¬жҚўгҖӮж ёеҝғе®һзҺ°еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

 @Override
    public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception {
        CodecOutputList out = CodecOutputList.newInstance();
        try {
            // жЈҖжҹҘmsgжҳҜеҗҰж»Ўи¶іжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„жЁЎжқҝзұ»еһӢI
            if (acceptInboundMessage(msg)) {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                I cast = (I) msg;
                try {
                    // и°ғз”ЁdecodeжҠҪиұЎж–№жі•
                    decode(ctx, cast, out);
                } finally {
                    ReferenceCountUtil.release(cast);
                }
            } else {
                out.add(msg);
            }
        } catch (DecoderException e) {
            throw e;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new DecoderException(e);
        } finally {
            int size = out.size();
            for (int i = 0; i < size; i ++) {
                ctx.fireChannelRead(out.getUnsafe(i));
            }
            out.recycle();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Decode from one message to an other. This method will be called for each written message that can be handled
     * by this decoder.
     *
     * @param ctx           the {@link ChannelHandlerContext} which this {@link MessageToMessageDecoder} belongs to
     * @param msg           the message to decode to an other one
     * @param out           the {@link List} to which decoded messages should be added
     * @throws Exception    is thrown if an error occurs
     */
    protected abstract void decode(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, I msg, List<Object> out) throws Exception;

MessageToMessageDecoderйҮҢзҡ„дёҡеҠЎйқһеёёе°‘пјҢж ёеҝғзҡ„и§Јз ҒиҪ¬жҚўйҖ»иҫ‘иҝҳйңҖиҰҒеӯҗзұ»еҺ»е®һзҺ°гҖӮеёёз”Ёзҡ„е®һзҺ°зұ»жңүStringDecoderгҖӮ

StringDecoder

StringDecoderйқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҢиҫ“е…ҘжЁЎжқҝзұ»еһӢByteBufпјҢз„¶еҗҺиҪ¬жҚўдёәStringгҖӮж ёеҝғи§Јз ҒиҪ¬жҚўж–№жі•еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

@Override
protected void decode(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, ByteBuf msg, List<Object> out) throws Exception {
    out.add(msg.toString(charset));
}

зј–з ҒеҷЁencoder

зј–з ҒеҷЁжҳҜе…ёеһӢзҡ„еҮәз«ҷеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁгҖӮеҗҢж—¶пјҢд№ҹеҲҶдёәMessageToMessageEncoderе’ҢMessageToByteEncoderдёӨз§ҚгҖӮе…¶еҠҹиғҪе’Ңе®һзҺ°еҲҡеҘҪжҳҜи§Јз ҒеҷЁзҡ„йҖҶиҝҮзЁӢпјҢжүҖд»ҘиҝҷйҮҢдёҚеҶҚиҜҰз»ҶеҲҶжһҗпјҢдёҚз„¶жң¬ж–Үе°ұжІҰдёәж°ҙж–ҮдёҖзҜҮдәҶгҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢзұ»дјјең°пјҢStringEncoderд№ҹжҳҜStringDecoderзҡ„йҖҶиҝҮзЁӢпјҢе®һзҺ°д№ҹйқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•жӯӨеӨ„дёҚдҪңиөҳиЁҖгҖӮ

SimpleChannelInboundHandler

з”ЁжҲ·иҮӘе®ҡд№үhandlerзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷжңҖеёёз”ЁеҲ°зҡ„зҲ¶зұ»жҳҜSimpleChannelInboundHandlerгҖӮзӣёжҜ”ChannelInboundHandlerAdapterпјҢе®ғдёәз”ЁжҲ·еҒҡдәҶж¶ҲжҒҜеҜ№иұЎзҡ„ж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢејәеҲ¶иҪ¬жҚўпјҢж–№дҫҝж•°жҚ®еӨ„зҗҶпјҢе№¶дё”зЎ®дҝқж¶ҲжҒҜеҜ№иұЎиў«йҮҠж”ҫжҺүгҖӮж ёеҝғе®һзҺ°еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

    @Override
    public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception {
        boolean release = true;
        try {
            if (acceptInboundMessage(msg)) {
                // зұ»еһӢејәеҲ¶иҪ¬жҚў
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                I imsg = (I) msg;
                channelRead0(ctx, imsg);
            } else {
                release = false;
                ctx.fireChannelRead(msg);
            }
        } finally {
            if (autoRelease && release) {
                ReferenceCountUtil.release(msg);
            }
        }
    }

    protected abstract void channelRead0(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, I msg) throws Exception;

з”ЁжҲ·йңҖиҰҒе®һзҺ°channelRead0ж–№жі•пјҢиҮӘе®ҡд№үдёҡеҠЎйҖ»иҫ‘гҖӮ

жҖ»з»“

жңҖеҗҺд»ҘдёҖеј зұ»еӣҫжё©д№ жң¬ж–Үпјҡ

entry.title: Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дә” еҘ”и…ҫзҡ„иЎҖж¶І: ByteBuf
entry.content:
жң¬ж–ҮжҳҜж°ёйЎәеӨ§зүӣеҶҷзҡ„зі»еҲ—ж•ҷзЁӢгҖҠжәҗз Ғд№ӢдёӢж— з§ҳеҜҶ в”Җв”Җ еҒҡжңҖеҘҪзҡ„ Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗж•ҷзЁӢгҖӢзҡ„з»ӯеҶҷз« иҠӮгҖӮжң¬з« дё»иҰҒд»Ӣз»ҚNettyдёӯз”ЁжқҘжүҝжҺҘж•°жҚ®зҡ„ByteBufзҡ„еә•еұӮе®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶгҖӮ

еҶҷеңЁжңҖеүҚ

ж°ёйЎәеүҚиҫҲе·ІеҶҷе®Ңзҡ„з« иҠӮжңүеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ з•ӘеӨ–зҜҮ Java NIO зҡ„еүҚз”ҹд»Ҡдё–
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ йӣ¶ зЈЁеҲҖдёҚиҜҜз Қжҹҙе·Ҙ жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗзҺҜеўғжҗӯе»ә
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёҖ жҸӯејҖ Bootstrap зҘһз§ҳзҡ„зәўзӣ–еӨҙ (е®ўжҲ·з«Ҝ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёҖ жҸӯејҖ Bootstrap зҘһз§ҳзҡ„зәўзӣ–еӨҙ (жңҚеҠЎеҷЁз«Ҝ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дәҢ иҙҜз©ҝ Netty зҡ„еӨ§еҠЁи„ү в”Җв”Җ ChannelPipeline (дёҖ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дәҢ иҙҜз©ҝ Netty зҡ„еӨ§еҠЁи„ү в”Җв”Җ ChannelPipeline (дәҢ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёү жҲ‘е°ұжҳҜеӨ§еҗҚйјҺйјҺзҡ„ EventLoop(дёҖ)
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дёү жҲ‘е°ұжҳҜеӨ§еҗҚйјҺйјҺзҡ„ EventLoop(дәҢ)

з¬”иҖ…е°қиҜ•з»ӯеҶҷзҡ„з« иҠӮпјҡ

  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ еӣӣ Promise дёҺ Future: еҸҢеӯҗжҳҹзҡ„з§ҳеҜҶ
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ дә” еҘ”и…ҫзҡ„иЎҖж¶І: ByteBuf
  • Netty жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗд№Ӣ е…ӯ жөҒж°ҙзәҝеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ: Handler

жң¬ж–ҮдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„nettyзүҲжң¬дёә4.1.33.Final

ByteBufдёҺByteBuffer

жҲ‘д»¬еңЁгҖҠJava NIO зҡ„еүҚз”ҹд»Ҡдё– д№Ӣдёү NIO Buffer иҜҰи§ЈгҖӢд»ҘеҸҠгҖҠи®ӨиҜҶ Java NIOгҖӢе·Із»ҸиҜҰз»ҶдәҶи§ЈдәҶNIO BufferгҖӮиҝҷйҮҢе…ҲеӣһеҝҶдёӢNIO Bufferзҡ„дёҖдәӣзү№жҖ§пјҡ

  • ByteBufferеә•еұӮе®һзҺ°еҢ…еҗ«еӣӣдёӘе…ій”®еӯ—ж®өпјҢе№¶ж»Ўи¶іеӨ§е°Ҹе…ізі»пјҡmark <= position <= limit <= capacityпјӣ
  • ByteBufferеӯҳеңЁеҶҷжЁЎејҸе’ҢиҜ»жЁЎејҸдёӨз§ҚзҠ¶жҖҒпјҢеҶ…йғЁж–№жі•еҸҜд»Ҙи§ҰеҸ‘зҠ¶жҖҒеҲҮжҚўпјҢжҜ”еҰӮflipж–№жі•д»ҺеҶҷзҠ¶жҖҒеҲҮжҚўдёәиҜ»зҠ¶жҖҒпјӣ
  • дёҚеҗҢзұ»еһӢзҡ„ByteBufferж”ҜжҢҒдёҚеҗҢзҡ„ж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬ByteBufferгҖҒShortBufferгҖҒCharBufferгҖҒDoubleBufferгҖҒFloatBufferгҖҒIntBufferзӯүзұ»еһӢгҖӮ

Nettyзҡ„ByteBufзҡ„еә•еұӮе®һзҺ°жңүдәӣи®ёзұ»дјјпјҢдҪҶзӣёжҜ”ByteBufferе®һзҺ°дәҶйқһеёёеӨҡжү©еұ•пјҢе№¶ж‘’ејғдәҶдёҖдәӣдёҚи¶іпјҡ

  • дёҚеҢәеҲҶиҜ»еҶҷзҠ¶жҖҒпјҢдёҚйңҖиҰҒеҲҮжҚўзҠ¶жҖҒпјӣ
  • ж”ҜжҢҒжұ еҢ–пјҢйҒҝе…Қйў‘з№Ғзҡ„GCеӣһж”¶пјӣ
  • ж”ҜжҢҒеј•з”Ёи®Ўж•°пјӣ
  • зұ»еһӢе…је®№пјҲеҗҢдёҖдёӘByteBufеҸҜд»ҘжүҝиҪҪеҗ„з§Қж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢпјүпјӣ
  • ж”ҜжҢҒUnsafeж“ҚдҪңзҡ„ByteBufпјӣ
  • ж”ҜжҢҒе ҶеӨ–е’Ңе ҶеҶ…дёӨз§ҚByteBufпјӣ
  • ж”ҜжҢҒйӣ¶жӢ·иҙқзҡ„еӨҚеҗҲзұ»еһӢCompositeByteBufпјӣ
  • вҖҰ

ByteBufз»§жүҝе…ізі»

жҲ‘д»¬е…ҲжқҘзңӢзңӢByteBufзҡ„зұ»еӣҫпјҡ

ByteBufд»ҘеҸҠе…¶еӯҗзұ»зҡ„е‘ҪеҗҚйқһеёёи§„ж•ҙпјҢд»…д»ҺеҗҚеӯ—дёҠжҲ‘д»¬е°ұеҸҜд»Ҙе°Ҷеҗ„дёӘеӯҗзұ»еҲ’еҲҶдёәд»ҘдёӢеҮ зұ»пјҡ

  • жұ еҢ–е’Ңйқһжұ еҢ–зҡ„ByteBufпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡPooledHeapByteBuf е’Ң UnpooledHeapByteBufпјӣ
  • еҗ«Unsafeж“ҚдҪңзҡ„ByteBufпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡPooledUnsafeHeapByteBuf;
  • еҲҶзүҮзұ»еһӢзҡ„ByteBufпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡPooledSliceByteBufе’ҢPooledDuplicatedByteBufпјӣ
  • з»„еҗҲByteBufпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡCompositeBuf;
  • е®һзҺ°дәҶеј•з”Ёи®Ўж•°зҡ„ByteBufгҖӮ

д»ҘдёҠеҗ„з§Қзұ»еһӢзҡ„йғҪдјҡеңЁдёӢж–Үеұ•ејҖеҲҶжһҗгҖӮ

ByteBufзҡ„иҜ»еҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ

зұ»дјјNIO ByteBufferпјҢByteBufеә•еұӮе®һзҺ°д№ҹжҳҜеӯ—иҠӮж•°з»„пјҢд№ҹеҗҢж ·з”ұиҜ»еҶҷжҢҮй’ҲжқҘжҺ§еҲ¶иҜ»еҶҷдҪҚзҪ®гҖӮеңЁByteBufзҡ„з»§жүҝзұ»AbstractByteBufдёӯе®ҡд№үдәҶд»ҘдёӢиҜ»еҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳеӯ—ж®өпјҡ

    // еҪ“еүҚиҜ»жҢҮй’Ҳ
    int readerIndex;
    // еҪ“еүҚеҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ
    int writerIndex;
    // жҡӮеӯҳзҡ„иҜ»жҢҮй’Ҳ
    private int markedReaderIndex;
    // жҡӮеӯҳзҡ„еҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ
    private int markedWriterIndex;
    // жңҖеӨ§е®№йҮҸ
    private int maxCapacity;

йңҖиҰҒжіЁж„Ҹзҡ„дәӢmaxCapacityжҳҜеҜ№еә•еұӮеӯ—иҠӮж•°з»„иҝӣиЎҢжү©е®№зҡ„жңҖеӨ§е®№йҮҸпјҢе№¶дёҚжҳҜеҪ“еүҚе®№йҮҸcapacityгҖӮйҖҡиҝҮиҝҷеҮ дёӘжҢҮй’ҲпјҢе…¶е®һеҸҜд»Ҙе°Ҷеӯ—иҠӮж•°з»„еҲ’еҲҶдёәд»ҘдёӢеҮ йғЁеҲҶпјҡ

жңүеҰӮдёӢжҖ§иҙЁпјҡ

  • жҜҸиҜ»еҸ–дёҖдёӘеӯ—иҠӮпјҢreaderIndexйҖ’еўһ1пјӣзӣҙеҲ°readerIndexзӯүдәҺwriterIndexпјҢиЎЁзӨәByteBufе·Із»ҸдёҚеҸҜиҜ»пјӣ
  • жҜҸеҶҷе…ҘдёҖдёӘеӯ—иҠӮпјҢwriterIndexйҖ’еўһ1пјӣзӣҙеҲ°writerIndexзӯүдәҺcapacityпјҢиЎЁзӨәByteBufе·Із»ҸдёҚеҸҜеҶҷпјӣ
  • еҪ“writerIndexзӯүдәҺcapacityиЎЁзӨәеә•еұӮеӯ—иҠӮж•°з»„йңҖиҰҒжү©е®№пјҢдё”жңҖеӨ§жү©е®№дёҚиғҪи¶…иҝҮmax capacityгҖӮ

жңүеҰӮдёҠжҖ§иҙЁпјҢеҸҜд»ҘжҺЁеҮәд»ҘдёӢByteBufзҡ„дёҖдәӣж–№жі•е®һзҺ°пјҡ

  • readableBytes()пјҡеҸҜиҜ»еӯ—иҠӮж•° вҖ“> this.writerIndex - this.readerIndex
  • writableBytes()пјҡеҸҜеҶҷеӯ—иҠӮж•° вҖ“> this.capacity - this.writerIndex
  • isReadable()пјҡжҳҜеҗҰеҸҜиҜ» вҖ“> this.writerIndex - this.readerIndex > 0
  • isWritable()пјҡжҳҜеҗҰеҸҜеҶҷ вҖ“> this.capacity - this.writerIndex > 0

жӣҙеӨҡж–№жі•и§ҒдёӢгҖӮ

ByteBufжҺҘеҸЈеёёз”Ёж–№жі•

ByteBufз»§жүҝдәҶComparableе’ҢRefrenceCountedпјҢе…¶дёӯеҗҺиҖ…жҳҜж”ҜжҢҒеј•з”Ёи®Ўж•°зҡ„жҺҘеҸЈпјҢе®ғзҡ„ж ёеҝғж–№жі•еҢ…еҗ«дёӨдёӘпјҡ

    // еј•з”Ёж•°еҠ 1
    ReferenceCounted retain();
    // еј•з”Ёж•°еҮҸ1пјҢеҰӮжһңеј•з”Ёж•°еҮҸдёә0пјҢеҲҷйҮҠж”ҫиҜҘеҜ№иұЎгҖӮ
    // еҰӮжһңиҜҘеҜ№иұЎиў«йҮҠж”ҫеҲҷиҝ”еӣһtrueпјҢеҗҰеҲҷиҝ”еӣһfalseгҖӮ
    // жіЁж„Ҹпјҡеӯҗзұ»е®һзҺ°е…¶е®һжҳҜеҮҸ2пјҢеҗҺж–ҮдјҡжҸҗеҲ°гҖӮ
    boolean release();

еҶҚжқҘзңӢByteBufзҡ„ж ёеҝғж–№жі•пјҡ

  • е®№йҮҸжңүе…іж–№жі•

      // 1.иҝ”еӣһеҪ“еүҚе®№йҮҸ
  public abstract int capacity();
  // 2.и°ғж•ҙеҪ“еүҚе®№йҮҸ
  public abstract ByteBuf capacity(int newCapacity);
  // 3.жңҖеӨ§е®№йҮҸпјҲcapacityзҡ„жңҖеӨ§дёҠйҷҗпјү
  public abstract int maxCapacity();

    жіЁж„Ҹ capacity() <= maxCapacity()гҖӮ

  • иҜ»еҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳжңүе…іж–№жі•

      // иҜ»еҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳзӣёе…іж–№жі•
  // 1.иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚиҜ»жҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract int readerIndex();
  // 2.и®ҫзҪ®еҪ“еүҚиҜ»жҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract ByteBuf readerIndex(int readerIndex);
  // 3.иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚеҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract int writerIndex();
  // 4.и®ҫзҪ®еҪ“еүҚеҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract ByteBuf writerIndex(int writerIndex);
  // 5.еҗҢж—¶и®ҫзҪ®иҜ»еҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract ByteBuf setIndex(int readerIndex, int writerIndex);
  // 6.иҺ·еҸ–еҸҜиҜ»еӯ—иҠӮж•°(this.writerIndex - this.readerIndex)
  public abstract int readableBytes();
  // 7.иҺ·еҸ–еҸҜеҶҷеӯ—иҠӮж•°(this.capacity - this.writerIndex)
  public abstract int writableBytes();
  // 8.иҺ·еҸ–жңҖеӨ§еҸҜеҶҷеӯ—иҠӮж•° (this.maxCapacity - this.writerIndex)}
  public abstract int maxWritableBytes();
  // 9.жҳҜеҗҰеҸҜиҜ»(this.writerIndex - this.readerIndex)
  public abstract boolean isReadable();
  // 10.жҳҜеҗҰеҸҜеҶҷ(this.capacity - this.writerIndex)
  public abstract boolean isWritable();
  // 11.жё…з©ә(зӣёеҪ“дәҺsetIndex(0, 0))
  public abstract ByteBuf clear();
  // 12.и®°еҪ•иҜ»жҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract ByteBuf markReaderIndex();
  // 13.д»Һи®°еҪ•дёӯжҒўеӨҚиҜ»жҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract ByteBuf resetReaderIndex();
  // 14.и®°еҪ•еҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ 
  public abstract ByteBuf markWriterIndex();
  // 15.д»Һи®°еҪ•дёӯжҒўеӨҚеҶҷжҢҮй’Ҳ
  public abstract ByteBuf resetWriterIndex();
  // 16.дёўејғе·ІиҜ»еӯ—иҠӮ
  public abstract ByteBuf discardReadBytes();

дёҠиҝ°ж–№жі•йғҪжҳҜеӣҙз»•зқҖreaderIndexгҖҒwriterIndexгҖҒcapitalгҖҒmaxcapitalзӯүеӣӣдёӘеҖјиЎҚз”ҹзҡ„ж–№жі•гҖӮе®һзҺ°йғҪйқһеёёзұ»дјјиҖҢз®ҖеҚ•гҖӮ

  • йҡҸжңәиҜ»еҶҷж•°жҚ®жңүе…іж–№жі•

    // йҡҸжңәиҜ»еҶҷж•°жҚ®
    // ... иҝҷйғЁеҲҶзұ»дјјзҡ„ж–№жі•йқһеёёеӨҡпјҢд»ҘдёӢеҸӘеҲ—дёҫдёҖйғЁеҲҶ ...
    // 1.д»ҺжҢҮе®ҡдҪҚзҪ®иҜ»еҸ–ж•°жҚ®
    public abstract boolean getBoolean(int index);
    public abstract short getUnsignedByte(int index);

    public abstract long  getLongLE(int index);
    // з•Ҙ...

дёҠиҝ°ж–№жі•ж”ҜжҢҒжҢҮе®ҡдҪҚзҪ®зҡ„иҜ»еҶҷж•°жҚ®пјҢе…¶дёӯиҜ»ж•°жҚ®е№¶дёҚдјҡж”№еҸҳжҢҮй’ҲеҖјгҖӮ

  • йЎәеәҸиҜ»еҶҷж•°жҚ®жңүе…іж–№жі•гҖӮ
      // 1. еңЁreaderIndexдҪҚзҪ®иҜ»еҸ–ж•°жҚ®е№¶з§»еҠЁжҢҮй’Ҳ

дёҠиҝ°ж–№жі•д»ҺиҜ»(жҲ–еҶҷ)жҢҮй’ҲдҪҚзҪ®йЎәеәҸеҫҖеҗҺиҜ»(жҲ–еҶҷ)ж•°жҚ®пјҢе№¶з§»еҠЁиҜ»(жҲ–еҶҷ)жҢҮй’ҲгҖӮ

  • еҲҶзүҮзӣёе…іж–№жі•
    public abstract ByteBuf slice();
    public abstract ByteBuf slice(int index, int length);
    public abstract ByteBuf duplicate();
    public abstract ByteBuf retainedSlice(); // жӣҙж–°еј•з”Ёи®Ўж•°

ByteBufж”ҜжҢҒеҲҶзүҮиҺ·еҸ–пјҢе®һзҺ°еҝ«йҖҹзҡ„дҪҺжҲҗжң¬жө…еӨҚеҲ¶гҖӮ

  • е…¶д»–ж–№жі•
      // еҲӨж–ӯеә•еұӮжҳҜеҗҰдёәNIO direct buffer
  public abstract boolean isDirect();

ByteBufжө…еӨҚеҲ¶е®һзҺ°
