    bean = getObjectForBeanInstance(sharedInstance, name, beanName, null);
}

getSingleton(beanName)пјҢдёҖејҖе§Ӣе…ҲйҖҡиҝҮиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰе·Із»ҸжүӢеҠЁжіЁеҶҢиҝҮиҝҷдёӘbean,з„¶еҗҺиҝӣе…ҘдәҶgetObjectForBeanInstanceж–№жі•йҮҢпјҢеңЁйҮҢиҫ№дјҡеҲӨж–ӯиҝҷдёӘbeanжҳҜдёҖдёӘжҷ®йҖҡзҡ„beanиҝҳжҳҜдёҖдёӘFactoryBeanгҖӮеҰӮжһңжҳҜжҷ®йҖҡbean,зӣҙжҺҘиҝ”еӣһпјҢдҪҶеҰӮжһңжҳҜFactoryBeanзҡ„иҜқпјҢжғ…еҶөжҜ”иҫғеӨҚжқӮпјҢи·іиҝҮд№ӢгҖӮ

if (isPrototypeCurrentlyInCreation(beanName)) {
    throw new BeanCurrentlyInCreationException(beanName);
}

дҪҶеҰӮжһңд№ӢеүҚжІЎжңүжіЁеҶҢиҝҮиҝҷдёӘbeanпјҢе…ҲжЈҖжҹҘиҝҷдёӘbeanжҳҜдёҚжҳҜжӯЈеңЁеҲӣе»әдёӯпјҲisPrototypeCurrentlyInCreationпјүпјҢеҰӮжһңжҳҜзҡ„иҜқпјҢзӣҙжҺҘжҠӣејӮеёёBeanCurrentlyInCreationExceptionгҖӮ

// Check if bean definition exists in this factory.
BeanFactory parentBeanFactory = getParentBeanFactory();
if (parentBeanFactory != null && !containsBeanDefinition(beanName)) {
    // Not found -> check parent.
    String nameToLookup = originalBeanName(name);
    if (parentBeanFactory instanceof AbstractBeanFactory) {
        return ((AbstractBeanFactory) parentBeanFactory).doGetBean(
                nameToLookup, requiredType, args, typeCheckOnly);
    }
    else if (args != null) {
        // Delegation to parent with explicit args.
        return (T) parentBeanFactory.getBean(nameToLookup, args);
    }
    else {
        // No args -> delegate to standard getBean method.
        return parentBeanFactory.getBean(nameToLookup, requiredType);
    }
}

еҶҚжЈҖжҹҘзҲ¶зұ»зҡ„BeanFactoryжҳҜеҗҰжңүжіЁеҶҢиҝҮиҝҷдёӘbeanпјҢе°қиҜ•иҺ·еҸ–е№¶дё”иҝ”еӣһгҖӮ

if (!typeCheckOnly) {
    markBeanAsCreated(beanName);
}

еҰӮжһңдёҚд»…д»…жҳҜдҪңзұ»еһӢжЈҖжҹҘзҡ„иҜқпјҢж Үи®°иҝҷдёӘbeanе·Із»ҸеҲӣе»әгҖӮ

зӮ№еҮ»жҳҫ/йҡҗ
final RootBeanDefinition mbd = getMergedLocalBeanDefinition(beanName);
checkMergedBeanDefinition(mbd, beanName, args);

// Guarantee initialization of beans that the current bean depends on.
String[] dependsOn = mbd.getDependsOn();
if (dependsOn != null) {
    for (String dep : dependsOn) {
        if (isDependent(beanName, dep)) {
            throw new BeanCreationException(mbd.getResourceDescription(), beanName,
                    "Circular depends-on relationship between '" + beanName + "' and '" + dep + "'");
        }
        registerDependentBean(dep, beanName);
        try {
            getBean(dep);
        }
        catch (NoSuchBeanDefinitionException ex) {
            throw new BeanCreationException(mbd.getResourceDescription(), beanName,
                    "'" + beanName + "' depends on missing bean '" + dep + "'", ex);
        }
    }
}
зӮ№еҮ»жҳҫ/йҡҗ

иҝҷйҮҢжЈҖжҹҘиҝҷдёӘbeanдҫқиө–зҡ„е…¶д»–beanпјҢз„¶еҗҺйҖ’еҪ’иҝӣеҺ»getBeanгҖӮиҝҷйҮҢзҡ„еҫӘзҺҜдҫқиө–жЈҖжөӢзңӢзқҖеғҸжҳҜеҶҷеҸҚдәҶпјҢжңүзӮ№з–‘жғ‘жҡӮж—¶дёҚж·ұз©¶ markгҖӮ

// Create bean instance.
if (mbd.isSingleton()) {
    sharedInstance = getSingleton(beanName, () -> {
        try {
            return createBean(beanName, mbd, args);
        }
        catch (BeansException ex) {
            // Explicitly remove instance from singleton cache: It might have been put there
            // eagerly by the creation process, to allow for circular reference resolution.
            // Also remove any beans that received a temporary reference to the bean.
            destroySingleton(beanName);
            throw ex;
        }
    });
    bean = getObjectForBeanInstance(sharedInstance, name, beanName, mbd);
}

еҚ•дҫӢеҲӣе»әbeanпјҢgetSingletonж–№жі•йҮҢдјҡеӣһи°ғgetObject()ж–№жі•пјҢе…¶е®һе°ұжҳҜи°ғз”ЁcreateBean(beanName, mbd, args)ж–№жі•гҖӮ
createBeanеҫҖдёӢеӨӘеә•еұӮдәҶпјҢеҜ№жҷ®йҖҡејҖеҸ‘иҖ…жІЎеӨҡеӨ§еҪұе“ҚпјҢдёҚеҲҶжһҗдёӢеҺ»дәҶгҖӮ

if (mbd.isPrototype()) {
    // It's a prototype -> create a new instance.
    Object prototypeInstance = null;
    try {
        beforePrototypeCreation(beanName);
        prototypeInstance = createBean(beanName, mbd, args);
    }
    finally {
        afterPrototypeCreation(beanName);
    }
    bean = getObjectForBeanInstance(prototypeInstance, name, beanName, mbd);
}

else {
    String scopeName = mbd.getScope();
    final Scope scope = this.scopes.get(scopeName);
    if (scope == null) {
        throw new IllegalStateException("No Scope registered for scope name '" + scopeName + "'");
    }
    try {
        Object scopedInstance = scope.get(beanName, () -> {
            beforePrototypeCreation(beanName);
            try {
                return createBean(beanName, mbd, args);
            }
            finally {
                afterPrototypeCreation(beanName);
            }
        });
        bean = getObjectForBeanInstance(scopedInstance, name, beanName, mbd);
    }
    catch (IllegalStateException ex) {
        throw new BeanCreationException(beanName,
                "Scope '" + scopeName + "' is not active for the current thread; consider " +
                "defining a scoped proxy for this bean if you intend to refer to it from a singleton",
                ex);
    }
}

жҺҘзқҖеӨ„зҗҶPrototypeзұ»еһӢд»ҘеҸҠе…¶д»–зұ»еһӢпјҢиҝҮзЁӢйғҪе·®дёҚеӨҡпјҢжңҖеҗҺйғҪжҳҜи°ғз”ЁдәҶcreateBean(beanName, mbd, args)гҖӮ

finishRefresh

жңҖеҗҺдёҖжӯҘдё»иҰҒжҳҜжё…зҗҶзј“еӯҳгҖҒеҲ·ж–°з”ҹе‘Ҫе‘ЁжңҹеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁгҖҒеҸ‘еёғContextRefreshedEventдәӢд»¶зӯүгҖӮ

жҖ»з»“пјҡеҗҜеҠЁиҝҮзЁӢзІ—з•Ҙең°жөҸи§ҲдәҶдёҖйҒҚпјҢж„ҹи§үеҸӘжҺҢжҸЎдәҶдёӨдёүжҲҗпјҢиҝҳйңҖиҰҒз»§з»ӯж·ұе…Ҙз ”з©¶гҖӮ

entry.title: жҗәзЁӢApolloзІҫеҪ©ж‘ҳиҰҒ
entry.content:
ApolloйқһеёёйҖӮеҗҲдҪңдёәеҲқеӯҰиҖ…з¬¬дёҖдёӘйҖҡиҜ»жәҗз ҒеӯҰд№ зҡ„еҲҶеёғејҸдёӯй—ҙд»¶дә§е“ҒгҖӮжңҖиҝ‘еңЁиҜ»жҗәзЁӢйҳҝжіўзҪ—зҡ„жәҗз ҒпјҢзңӢеҲ°иҝҷд»Ҫжәҗз ҒеҶҷеҫ—йқһеёёжјӮдә®гҖӮд»Јз Ғзҡ„жЁЎеқ—еҲ’еҲҶгҖҒеҜ№иұЎе°ҒиЈ…гҖҒеҶ…йғЁж•°жҚ®еҲҶеұӮзӯүзӯүең°ж–№пјҢйғҪжңүеҫҲеӨҡзІҫеҰҷдјҳйӣ…зҡ„и®ҫи®ЎгҖӮиҝҷйҮҢдҪңдёҖдәӣз®ҖеҚ•и®°еҪ•пјҢд»ҘеҗҺзј–з Ғзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷеҸҜд»ҘеҖҹйүҙдёҖдёӢгҖӮ

жҗәзЁӢApolloзІҫеҪ©ж‘ҳиҰҒ

ж•°жҚ®йЎ№еҸҳжӣҙи®°еҪ•зҡ„и®ҫи®Ў

 еҫҲеӨҡжғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢдёҡеҠЎзі»з»ҹйңҖиҰҒеҜ№йҮҚиҰҒж•°жҚ®зҡ„еҸҳеҠЁиҝӣиЎҢи®°еҪ•пјҢз„¶еҗҺе°Ҷиҝҷдәӣи®°еҪ•е…Ҙеә“гҖӮжҗәзЁӢapolloйҮҢиҝҷдёӘжңәеҲ¶и®ҫи®Ўзҡ„йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҢжқҘзңӢд»Јз Ғпјҡ

зӮ№еҮ»жҳҫ/йҡҗ

public class ConfigChangeContentBuilder {

  private static final Gson gson = new GsonBuilder().setDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").create();
  //еҸҳеҠЁзҡ„ж•°жҚ®Item
  private List<Item> createItems = new LinkedList<>();
  private List<ItemPair> updateItems = new LinkedList<>();
  private List<Item> deleteItems = new LinkedList<>();

  //ж–°еўһж•°жҚ®
  public ConfigChangeContentBuilder createItem(Item item) {
    if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(item.getKey())){
      createItems.add(cloneItem(item));
    }
    return this;
  }

  //жӣҙж–°ж•°жҚ®
  public ConfigChangeContentBuilder updateItem(Item oldItem, Item newItem) {
    if (!oldItem.getValue().equals(newItem.getValue())){
      ItemPair itemPair = new ItemPair(cloneItem(oldItem), cloneItem(newItem));
      updateItems.add(itemPair);
    }
    return this;
  }
  //еҲ йҷӨж•°жҚ®
  public ConfigChangeContentBuilder deleteItem(Item item) {
    if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(item.getKey())) {
      deleteItems.add(cloneItem(item));
    }
    return this;
  }
  //жЈҖжөӢж•°жҚ®жҳҜеҗҰжңүеҸҳеҠЁ
  public boolean hasContent(){
    return !createItems.isEmpty() || !updateItems.isEmpty() || !deleteItems.isEmpty();
  }
  //з»ҷеҸҳеҠЁжү“дёҠж—¶й—ҙжҲіпјҢе°ҶжүҖжңүеҸҳеҠЁеҶ…е®№иҪ¬дёәjsonString
  public String build() {
    //еӣ дёәдәӢеҠЎз¬¬дёҖж®өжҸҗдәӨе№¶жІЎжңүжӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙ,жүҖд»Ҙbuildж—¶з»ҹдёҖжӣҙж–°
    Date now = new Date();

    for (Item item : createItems) {
      item.setDataChangeLastModifiedTime(now);
    }

    for (ItemPair item : updateItems) {
      item.newItem.setDataChangeLastModifiedTime(now);
    }

    for (Item item : deleteItems) {
      item.setDataChangeLastModifiedTime(now);
    }
    return gson.toJson(this);
  }

  static class ItemPair {

    Item oldItem;
    Item newItem;

    public ItemPair(Item oldItem, Item newItem) {
      this.oldItem = oldItem;
      this.newItem = newItem;
    }
  }

  Item cloneItem(Item source) {
    Item target = new Item();

    BeanUtils.copyProperties(source, target);

    return target;
  }
зӮ№еҮ»жҳҫ/йҡҗ

 жүҖжңүж•°жҚ®еҸҳеҠЁзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷи°ғз”ЁConfigChangeContentBuilderзҡ„ж–№жі•и®°еҪ•иҝҷдәӣеҸҳеҠЁпјҢжңҖеҗҺи°ғз”ЁhasContentж–№жі•жЈҖжөӢжңүеҗҰеҸҳеҠЁпјҢжңүеҸҳеҠЁзҡ„иҜқи°ғз”Ёbuildж–№жі•иҺ·еҫ—еҸҳеҠЁжғ…еҶөпјҢз„¶еҗҺе°ұе…Ҙеә“гҖӮиҝҷи®ҫи®ЎжҖқи·Ҝйқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•иҖҢжңүж•ҲгҖӮеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

    ConfigChangeContentBuilder builder = new ConfigChangeContentBuilder();
    builder.updateItem(beforeUpdateItem, entity);
    itemDTO = BeanUtils.transfrom(ItemDTO.class, entity);

    if (builder.hasContent()) {
      Commit commit = new Commit();
      commit.setAppId(appId);
      commit.setClusterName(clusterName);
      commit.setNamespaceName(namespaceName);
      commit.setChangeSets(builder.build());
      commit.setDataChangeCreatedBy(itemDTO.getDataChangeLastModifiedBy());
      commit.setDataChangeLastModifiedBy(itemDTO.getDataChangeLastModifiedBy());
      commitService.save(commit);
    }

еҜ№Java Beanзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңзұ»

 йҳҝжіўзҪ—д»Јз ҒйҮҢжңүжҜ”иҫғи§„иҢғзҡ„ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„еҲҶеұӮи®ҫи®ЎпјҢдёҚеҗҢеұӮд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„дә’иҪ¬пјҢе№¶жІЎжңүйҮҮз”Ёдј з»ҹзҡ„setter/getterжқҘеҒҡпјҢиҖҢжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘз”Ёе·Ҙе…·зұ»еҜ№еҗҢеҗҚзҡ„еӯ—ж®өиҝӣиЎҢж“ҚдҪңпјҢеӨ§еӨ§з®ҖеҢ–дәҶзј–з ҒйҮҸгҖӮиҝҷдёҖзӮ№йқһеёёеҖјеҫ—еҖҹйүҙгҖӮиҜ·зңӢBeanUtilе·Ҙе…·зұ»:

зӮ№еҮ»жҳҫ/йҡҗ

package com.ctrip.framework.apollo.common.utils;

import com.ctrip.framework.apollo.common.exception.BeanUtilsException;

import org.springframework.beans.BeanWrapper;
import org.springframework.beans.BeanWrapperImpl;
import org.springframework.util.CollectionUtils;

import java.beans.PropertyDescriptor;
import java.lang.reflect.Field;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Set;

public class BeanUtils {

  /**
   * <pre>
   *     List<UserBean> userBeans = userDao.queryUsers();
   *     List<UserDTO> userDTOs = BeanUtil.batchTransform(UserDTO.class, userBeans);
   * </pre>
   */
  public static <T> List<T> batchTransform(final Class<T> clazz, List<? extends Object> srcList) {
    if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(srcList)) {
      return Collections.emptyList();
    }

    List<T> result = new ArrayList<>(srcList.size());
    for (Object srcObject : srcList) {
      result.add(transfrom(clazz, srcObject));
    }
    return result;
  }

  /**
   * е°ҒиЈ…{@link org.springframework.beans.BeanUtils#copyProperties}пјҢжғҜз”ЁдёҺзӣҙжҺҘе°ҶиҪ¬жҚўз»“жһңиҝ”еӣһ
   *
   * <pre>
   *      UserBean userBean = new UserBean("username");
   *      return BeanUtil.transform(UserDTO.class, userBean);
   * </pre>
   */
  public static <T> T transfrom(Class<T> clazz, Object src) {
    if (src == null) {
      return null;
    }
    T instance = null;
    try {
      instance = clazz.newInstance();
    } catch (Exception e) {
      throw new BeanUtilsException(e);
    }
    org.springframework.beans.BeanUtils.copyProperties(src, instance, getNullPropertyNames(src));
    return instance;
  }

  public static String[] getNullPropertyNames(Object source) {
    final BeanWrapper src = new BeanWrapperImpl(source);
    PropertyDescriptor[] pds = src.getPropertyDescriptors();

    Set<String> emptyNames = new HashSet<String>();
    for (PropertyDescriptor pd : pds) {
      Object srcValue = src.getPropertyValue(pd.getName());
      if (srcValue == null) emptyNames.add(pd.getName());
    }
    String[] result = new String[emptyNames.size()];
    return emptyNames.toArray(result);
  }

  /**
   * з”ЁдәҺе°ҶдёҖдёӘеҲ—иЎЁиҪ¬жҚўдёәеҲ—иЎЁдёӯзҡ„еҜ№иұЎзҡ„жҹҗдёӘеұһжҖ§жҳ е°„еҲ°еҲ—иЎЁдёӯзҡ„еҜ№иұЎ
   *
   * <pre>
   *      List<UserDTO> userList = userService.queryUsers();
   *      Map<Integer, userDTO> userIdToUser = BeanUtil.mapByKey("userId", userList);
   * </pre>
   *
   * @param key еұһжҖ§еҗҚ
   */
  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
  public static <K, V> Map<K, V> mapByKey(String key, List<? extends Object> list) {
    Map<K, V> map = new HashMap<K, V>();
    if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(list)) {
      return map;
    }
    try {
      Class<? extends Object> clazz = list.get(0).getClass();
      Field field = deepFindField(clazz, key);
      if (field == null) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Could not find the key");
      field.setAccessible(true);
      for (Object o : list) {
        map.put((K) field.get(o), (V) o);
      }
    } catch (Exception e) {
      throw new BeanUtilsException(e);
    }
    return map;
  }

  /**
   * ж №жҚ®еҲ—иЎЁйҮҢйқўзҡ„еұһжҖ§иҒҡеҗҲ
   *
   * <pre>
   *       List<ShopDTO> shopList = shopService.queryShops();
   *       Map<Integer, List<ShopDTO>> city2Shops = BeanUtil.aggByKeyToList("cityId", shopList);
   * </pre>
   */
  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
  public static <K, V> Map<K, List<V>> aggByKeyToList(String key, List<? extends Object> list) {
    Map<K, List<V>> map = new HashMap<K, List<V>>();
    if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(list)) {// йҳІжӯўеӨ–йқўдј е…Ҙз©әlist
      return map;
    }
    try {
      Class<? extends Object> clazz = list.get(0).getClass();
      Field field = deepFindField(clazz, key);
      if (field == null) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Could not find the key");
      field.setAccessible(true);
      for (Object o : list) {
        K k = (K) field.get(o);
        if (map.get(k) == null) {
          map.put(k, new ArrayList<V>());
        }
        map.get(k).add((V) o);
      }
    } catch (Exception e) {
      throw new BeanUtilsException(e);
    }
    return map;
  }

  /**
   * з”ЁдәҺе°ҶдёҖдёӘеҜ№иұЎзҡ„еҲ—иЎЁиҪ¬жҚўдёәеҲ—иЎЁдёӯеҜ№иұЎзҡ„еұһжҖ§йӣҶеҗҲ
   *
   * <pre>
   *     List<UserDTO> userList = userService.queryUsers();
   *     Set<Integer> userIds = BeanUtil.toPropertySet("userId", userList);
   * </pre>
   */
  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
  public static <K> Set<K> toPropertySet(String key, List<? extends Object> list) {
    Set<K> set = new HashSet<K>();
    if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(list)) {// йҳІжӯўеӨ–йқўдј е…Ҙз©әlist
      return set;
    }
    try {
      Class<? extends Object> clazz = list.get(0).getClass();
      Field field = deepFindField(clazz, key);
      if (field == null) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Could not find the key");
      field.setAccessible(true);
      for (Object o : list) {
        set.add((K)field.get(o));
      }
    } catch (Exception e) {
      throw new BeanUtilsException(e);
    }
    return set;
  }


  private static Field deepFindField(Class<? extends Object> clazz, String key) {
    Field field = null;
    while (!clazz.getName().equals(Object.class.getName())) {
      try {
        field = clazz.getDeclaredField(key);
        if (field != null) {
          break;
        }
      } catch (Exception e) {
        clazz = clazz.getSuperclass();
      }
    }
    return field;
  }

  /**
   * иҺ·еҸ–жҹҗдёӘеҜ№иұЎзҡ„жҹҗдёӘеұһжҖ§
   */
  public static Object getProperty(Object obj, String fieldName) {
    try {
      Field field = deepFindField(obj.getClass(), fieldName);
      if (field != null) {
        field.setAccessible(true);
        return field.get(obj);
      }
    } catch (Exception e) {
      throw new BeanUtilsException(e);
    }
    return null;
  }

  /**
   * и®ҫзҪ®жҹҗдёӘеҜ№иұЎзҡ„жҹҗдёӘеұһжҖ§
   */
  public static void setProperty(Object obj, String fieldName, Object value) {
    try {
      Field field = deepFindField(obj.getClass(), fieldName);
      if (field != null) {
        field.setAccessible(true);
        field.set(obj, value);
      }
    } catch (Exception e) {
      throw new BeanUtilsException(e);
    }
  }

  /**
   * 
   * @param source
   * @param target
   */
  public static void copyProperties(Object source, Object target, String... ignoreProperties) {
    org.springframework.beans.BeanUtils.copyProperties(source, target, ignoreProperties);
  }

  /**
   * The copy will ignore <em>BaseEntity</em> field
   *
   * @param source
   * @param target
   */
  public static void copyEntityProperties(Object source, Object target) {
    org.springframework.beans.BeanUtils.copyProperties(source, target, COPY_IGNORED_PROPERTIES);
  }

  private static final String[] COPY_IGNORED_PROPERTIES = {"id", "dataChangeCreatedBy", "dataChangeCreatedTime", "dataChangeLastModifiedTime"};
}
зӮ№еҮ»жҳҫ/йҡҗ

дҪҝз”Ёе§ҝеҠҝд№ҹжҳҜйқһеёёзҡ„з®ҖеҚ•:

NamespaceDTO dto = BeanUtils.transfrom(NamespaceDTO.class, entity);

entry.title: Mavenж·ұе…ҘеӯҰд№
entry.content:
mavenж·ұе…ҘеӯҰд№ 

mavenеңЁе·ҘдҪңдёӯжҺҘи§Ұеҫ—жҜ”иҫғеӨҡпјҢдҪҶжҳҜеҫҲеӨҡз»ҶиҠӮзҡ„дёңиҘҝе№¶жІЎжңүи®Өзңҹз ”з©¶пјҢзҺ°еңЁжҠҪж—¶й—ҙжҗһжё…жҘҡдёӢгҖӮиҝҷзҜҮж–Үз« дё»иҰҒжҳҜжҺўи®Ёmaven POMйҮҢиҫ№зҡ„з»ҶиҠӮгҖӮ

mavenе®үиЈ…е’Ңе‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢдҪҝз”Ё

mavenзҡ„е®үиЈ…йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҢдё»иҰҒжҳҜи§ЈеҺӢиҪҜд»¶еҢ…д»ҘеҸҠй…ҚзҪ®PATHгҖӮе®үиЈ…еҘҪд№ӢеҗҺе°ұеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ёmavenзҡ„е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢmvnгҖӮе®һйҷ…
з”ҹдә§дёӯдёҖиҲ¬з”ЁIDEиҮӘеёҰзҡ„mavenжҸ’д»¶ж“ҚдҪңпјҢжүҖд»Ҙе‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢз”Ёзҡ„жҜ”иҫғе°‘гҖӮдҪҶжҳҜиҜ»иҖ…д№ҹеә”иҜҘйҖӮеҪ“дәҶи§ЈдёӢmvnзҡ„еёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»ӨпјҢ
дҫӢеҰӮmvn archetype:generate гҖҒmvn packageгҖҒmvn install гҖҒ mvn deploy зӯүгҖӮ

дҫӢеҰӮпјҡе°Ҷжң¬ең°jarе®үиЈ…еҲ°жң¬ең°д»“еә“


mvn install:install-file -Dfile=./XXXX.jar -DgroupId=com.XXX.XXX -DartifactId=XXXX -Dversion=XXXX -Dpackaging=jar

е®үиЈ…жӯҘйӘӨеҸӮиҖғпјҡInstalling Apache Maven

POM

demo

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
  xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0
                      http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
  <groupId>com.mycompany.app</groupId>
  <artifactId>my-app</artifactId>
  <packaging>jar</packaging>
  <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
  <name>Maven Quick Start Archetype</name>
  <url>http://maven.apache.org</url>
  <parent>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
    <version>1.3.3.RELEASE</version>
  </parent>
  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>junit</groupId>
      <artifactId>junit</artifactId>
      <version>4.11</version>
      <scope>test</scope>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>
</project>

POMж–Үд»¶жҳҜmavenзҡ„дёҖдёӘж ёеҝғеҶ…е®№пјҢд№ҹжҳҜз”ҹдә§дёӯжҺҘи§ҰеҲ°жңҖеӨҡзҡ„дёҖйғЁеҲҶгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еҜ№з…§дёҠиҫ№зҡ„demoпјҢи§ЈиҜ»еҗ„дёӘж Үзӯҫзҡ„
еҗ«д№үпјҡ

groupId иЎЁзӨәеҲӣе»әиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„з»„з»ҮжҲ–еӣўдҪ“зҡ„е”ҜдёҖж Үеҝ—з¬ҰеҸ·пјӣ

artifact иЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„еҗҚеӯ—пјӣ

version иЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„зүҲжң¬еҸ·пјӣ

packaging иЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„жү“еҢ…ж–№ејҸпјҢеёёи§ҒжңүJAR, WAR, EAR,POMзӯүпјҢзјәзңҒеҖјдёәJARпјӣ

name иЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®еұ•зӨәзҡ„еҗҚеӯ—пјҢйҖҡеёёз”ЁеңЁmavenз”ҹжҲҗзҡ„ж–ҮжЎЈдёӯпјӣ

url иЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„зҪ‘з«ҷurlпјҢйҖҡеёёз”ЁеңЁmavenз”ҹжҲҗзҡ„ж–ҮжЎЈдёӯпјӣ

description иЎЁзӨәиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„йЎ№зӣ®д»Ӣз»ҚдҝЎжҒҜпјҢdescriptionпјӣ

project POMж–Үд»¶зҡ„еӣәе®ҡзҡ„йЎ¶еұӮж Үзӯҫпјӣ

modelVersion жҢҮзӨәиҝҷдёӘPOMдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„еҜ№иұЎжЁЎеһӢзүҲжң¬пјҢиҝҷдёӘзүҲжң¬еҸ·еҹәжң¬дёҚдјҡжңүеӨ§зҡ„ж”№еҠЁпјҢдёҚз”ЁиҝҮеӨҡе…іеҝғпјӣ

dependencies иҝҷдёӘж ҮзӯҫеҢ…иЈ№зқҖиҝҷдёӘйЎ№зӣ®еҜ№еӨ–дҫқиө–зҡ„е…¶д»–йЎ№зӣ®пјӣ

**parent иЎЁзӨәз»§жүҝзҡ„зҲ¶POMпјҢmavenеҸӘе…Ғи®ёеҚ•з»§жүҝгҖӮ

д»ҘдёҠж ҮзӯҫдёӯпјҢеҸӘжңүgroupIdгҖҒartifactгҖҒversion дёүдёӘжҳҜеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„пјҢиҝҷдёүиҖ…еҸҜд»Ҙе”ҜдёҖзЎ®е®ҡдёҖдёӘйЎ№зӣ®пјҢе…¶д»–йғҪ
еҸҜйҖүгҖӮжүҖд»ҘжңҖиҝ·дҪ зҡ„POMеҸҜд»ҘеҰӮдёӢжүҖзӨәпјҡ

<project>
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
  <groupId>com.mycompany.app</groupId>
  <artifactId>my-app</artifactId>
  <version>1</version>
</project>

дҫқиө–dependency

dependencyи§ЈиҜ»

<dependency>
  <groupId>junit</groupId>
  <artifactId>junit</artifactId>
  <version>4.11</version>
  <scope>test</scope>
</dependency>
<dependency>
  <groupId>com.example</groupId>
  <artifactId>exmaple-parent</artifactId>
  <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
  <type>pom</type>
  <scope>import</scope>
</dependency>
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
  <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
  <version>${org.springframework.boot-version}</version>
  <exclusions>
      <exclusion>
          <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
          <artifactId>log4j-over-slf4j</artifactId>
      </exclusion>
      <exclusion>
          <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
          <artifactId>jcl-over-slf4j</artifactId>
      </exclusion>
  </exclusions>
</dependency>

mavenйЎ№зӣ®еҸҜд»Ҙдҫқиө–еҲ«зҡ„йЎ№зӣ®пјҢйҖҡиҝҮж Үзӯҫе®һзҺ°гҖӮиҜҘж ҮзӯҫеҶ…еҗ«дёҖдёӢеӯҗж ҮзӯҫпјҢиҜҰз»ҶиҜҙжҳҺдёӢпјҡ

groupIdгҖҒartifactIdгҖҒversionеҗҢдёҠпјӣ

type иЎЁзӨәдҫқиө–зҡ„йЎ№зӣ®зұ»еһӢ,дёҖиҲ¬жҳҜjar е’Ң pom зұ»еһӢпјҢ,зјәзңҒдёәjarпјӣ

scope дҫқиө–зҡ„иҢғеӣҙпјҢеёёи§ҒcompileгҖҒtestгҖҒimportгҖҒprovidedгҖҒruntimeгҖҒsystemпјҢзјәзңҒcompileпјӣ

exclusions з”ЁжқҘжҺ’йҷӨдј йҖ’жҖ§дҫқиө–зҡ„йЎ№зӣ®гҖӮ

scope иҜҰи§Ј

еңЁMavenзҡ„дё–з•ҢдёӯпјҢжңүеҫҲеӨҡз§ҚclasspathпјҢзј–иҜ‘classpathпјҢжөӢиҜ•classpathпјҢиҝҗиЎҢclasspathгҖӮ
scopeдҫқиө–иҢғеӣҙе°ұжҳҜз”ЁжқҘжҺ§еҲ¶дҫқиө–дёҺиҝҷдёүз§Қclasspathзҡ„е…ізі»,жҜ”еҰӮ junitзҡ„дҫқиө–еҸӘйңҖиҰҒеңЁжөӢиҜ•classpath
дёӯдҪҝз”ЁпјҢжүҖд»Ҙе®ғзҡ„scopeеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҫзҪ®дёәtestгҖӮдёӢйқўеҜ№scopeиҝҷдёӘж Үзӯҫж·ұе…ҘиҜҙжҳҺ

compile зј–иҜ‘дҫқиө–иҢғеӣҙгҖӮзјәзңҒеҖјпјҢзј–иҜ‘иҢғеӣҙдҫқиө–еңЁжүҖжңүзҡ„classpath дёӯеҸҜз”ЁпјҢеҗҢж—¶е®ғд»¬д№ҹдјҡиў«жү“еҢ…пјӣ

test жөӢиҜ•дҫқиө–иҢғеӣҙгҖӮд»…з”ЁдәҺжөӢиҜ•classpathпјҢеңЁдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„зј–иҜ‘е’ҢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶йғҪдёҚйңҖиҰҒпјӣ

provided е·ІжҸҗдҫӣдҫқиө–иҢғеӣҙгҖӮдҪҝз”ЁжӯӨиҢғеӣҙзҡ„дҫқиө–еҜ№дәҺзј–иҜ‘е’ҢжөӢиҜ•йғҪжңүж•ҲпјҢдҪҶеңЁиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж— ж•ҲгҖӮе®ғд»¬дёҚжҳҜдј 
йҖ’жҖ§зҡ„пјҢд№ҹдёҚдјҡиў«жү“еҢ…гҖӮ

runtime иҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–иҢғеӣҙгҖӮиЎЁзӨәдҫқиө–еңЁиҝҗиЎҢе’ҢжөӢиҜ•зі»з»ҹзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷйңҖиҰҒпјҢдҪҶеңЁзј–иҜ‘зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷдёҚйңҖиҰҒгҖӮеёёи§Ғзҡ„жңүjdbcзҡ„еҢ…пјӣ

import еҜје…Ҙдҫқиө–иҢғеӣҙгҖӮimportеҸӘз”ЁеңЁж ҮзӯҫеҶ…пјҢе№¶дё”еҸӘз”ЁеңЁPOMзұ»еһӢзҡ„дҫқиө–дёӯгҖӮ

system зі»з»ҹдҫқиө–иҢғеӣҙгҖӮеҜ№дәҺзј–иҜ‘е’ҢжөӢиҜ•жңүж•ҲпјҢдҪҶеңЁиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж— ж•ҲгҖӮдҪҝз”ЁsystemиҢғеӣҙж—¶пјҢеҝ…йЎ»йҖҡиҝҮsystemPath
е…ғзҙ жҳҫзӨәзҡ„жҢҮе®ҡдҫқиө–ж–Үд»¶зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„,д№ҹе°ұжҳҜд»Һжң¬ең°ж–Үд»¶дёӯиҜ»еҸ–jarпјҢдёҖиҲ¬дёҚжҺЁиҚҗиҝҷж ·дҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ

scopeиҝҷйғЁеҲҶеҶ…е®№иҜ·еҸӮиҖғ[2]

import scope и§ЈиҜ»

scopeзҡ„importзұ»еһӢжҜ”иҫғеёёи§ҒпјҢдёӢиҫ№еҲ—дёҫдёҖдёӘдҪҝз”ЁжЎҲдҫӢгҖӮ

дёҠж–Үд»Ӣз»ҚеҲ°зҡ„ж Үзӯҫ parent иЎЁзӨәз»§жүҝзҡ„зҲ¶POMпјҢmavenеҸӘе…Ғи®ёеҚ•з»§жүҝгҖӮ
жҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙз»“еҗҲscope import е®һзҺ°mavenзҡ„еӨҡз»§жүҝгҖӮйқһз»§жүҝзҡ„е®һзҺ°е…·дҪ“е®һзҺ°еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
  xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0
                      http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
  <groupId>com.mycompany.app</groupId>
  <artifactId>my-app</artifactId>
  <packaging>jar</packaging>
  <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
  <name>Maven Quick Start Archetype</name>
  <url>http://maven.apache.org</url>

  <dependencyManagement>
    <dependencies>
      <dependency>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>1.3.3.RELEASE</version>
        <type>pom</type>
        <scope>import</scope>
      </dependency>
    </dependencies>
  </dependencyManagement>
  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>junit</groupId>
      <artifactId>junit</artifactId>
      <version>4.11</version>
      <scope>test</scope>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>
</project>

иҝҷйҮҢзҡ„з”Ёжі•е°ұжҳҜе°ҶзҲ¶pomд»ҘдёҖдёӘdependencyзҡ„еҪўејҸж·»еҠ иҝӣжқҘгҖӮиҝҷйҮҢdependencyManagementеҶ…еҸҜд»ҘжңүеӨҡдёӘ
зҲ¶POMдҫқиө–пјҢд»ҺиҖҢе®һзҺ°еӨҡз»§жүҝгҖӮ

иҒҡеҗҲе’Ңз»§жүҝ

еҸӮиҖғеүҚдәәиҪ®еӯҗпјҡMavenиҒҡеҗҲдёҺз»§жүҝ

Repository

з”ҹдә§зҺҜеўғдёҖиҲ¬дјҡжңүе…¬еҸёиҮӘе·ұзҡ„з§ҒжңҚ Nexus RepositoryпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҫҖеҫҖйңҖиҰҒеңЁйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„POMеҲ¶е®ҡrepositoryпјҢдҪҝеҫ—
йЎ№зӣ®зҡ„jarеҢ…еҸҜд»ҘйғЁзҪІеҲ°з§ҒжңҚдёҠпјҢжҲ–иҖ…жҳҜд»Һз§ҒжңҚжӢүеҸ–дҫқиө–гҖӮ

еҜ№дәҺдёҖдёӘMavenйЎ№зӣ®иҖҢиЁҖпјҢеҰӮжһңдҪ зҡ„йЎ№зӣ®зүҲжң¬еҸ·дёӯжңүвҖңSNAPSHOTвҖқеӯ—ж ·пјҢеҲҷиЎЁзӨәжӯӨж—¶зҡ„йЎ№зӣ®жҳҜsnapshotзүҲжң¬пјҢ
еҚіеӨ„дәҺејҖеҸ‘дёӯгҖӮеҗҰеҲҷпјҢMavenеҲҷи®ӨдёәиҝҷжҳҜдёҖдёӘreleaseзүҲжң¬гҖӮжүҖд»ҘжҲ‘д»¬еңЁйғЁзҪІж—¶пјҢйңҖиҰҒеҲҶеҲ«й…ҚзҪ®иҝҷдёӨз§ҚеҸ‘еёғзүҲ
жң¬жүҖеҜ№еә”зҡ„RepositoryгҖӮеңЁйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„pom.xmlж–Үд»¶дёӯй…ҚзҪ®йңҖиҰҒеҸ‘еёғзҡ„зӣ®ж ҮRepositoryпјҡ

<distributionManagement>

       <repository>

           <id>releases</id>

           <name>Nexus Release Repository</name>

           <url>http://nexus.mycompany.net//content/repositories/releases/</url>

       </repository>

       <snapshotRepository>

           <id>snapshots</id>

           <name>Nexus Snapshot Repository</name>

           <url>http://nexus.mycompany.net/content/repositories/snapshots/</url>

       </snapshotRepository>

   </distributionManagement>

еңЁдёҠйқўзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®дёӯпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҲҶеҲ«й…ҚзҪ®дәҶreleaseзүҲжң¬е’ҢsnapshotзүҲжң¬жүҖеҜ№еә”зҡ„RepositoryпјҢеҰӮжһңдҪ йЎ№зӣ®зҡ„зүҲжң¬
дёӯеҢ…еҗ«дәҶвҖңSNAPSHOTвҖқпјҢжӯӨж—¶е°ҶеҸ‘еёғеҲ°Nexusзҡ„Snapshots RepositoryпјҢеҗҰеҲҷеҸ‘еёғеңЁReleases RepositoryгҖӮ
иҮідәҺжҸҗдҫӣз”ЁжҲ·еҗҚе’ҢеҜҶз ҒпјҢиҝҷдәӣдҝЎжҒҜеҪ“з„¶дёҚиғҪж”ҫеңЁйЎ№зӣ®дёӯпјҢдёҖжҳҜдёҚе®үе…ЁпјҢеҸҰеӨ–дёҚеҗҢзҡ„дәәеҸҜиғҪжңүдёҚеҗҢзҡ„з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚе’ҢеҜҶз ҒпјҢ
дҪ дёҚиҮідәҺеңЁжҜҸж¬ЎйғЁзҪІж—¶йғҪдҝ®ж”№дёҖж¬Ўеҗ§гҖӮжүҖд»ҘпјҢMavenе°ҶиҝҷдәӣдҝЎжҒҜзҡ„еӯҳж”ҫең°зӮ№ж”ҫеңЁдәҶ~/.m2/settings.xmlж–Ү
д»¶дёӯпјҢжҜҸеҸ°жңәеҷЁпјҲеҹәжң¬дёҠе°ұжҳҜжҜҸдёӘдәәе•ҰпјүйғҪеҸҜд»ҘжңүдёҚеҗҢзҡ„settings.xmlж–Үд»¶гҖӮеңЁиҜҘж–Үд»¶дёӯеҠ е…Ҙд»ҘдёӢй…ҚзҪ®пјҡ

<servers>
  <server>
     <id>releases</id>
     <username>admin</username>
     <password>admin123</password>
  </server>
  <server>
     <id>snapshots</id>
     <username>admin</username>
     <password>admin123</password>
   </server>
</servers>

еҪ“з„¶йҷӨдәҶеҸҜд»ҘеңЁйЎ№зӣ®POMйҮҢеҲ¶е®ҡrepositoryпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘеңЁsettingзҡ„mirrorж ҮзӯҫйҮҢжҢҮе®ҡпјҢиҝҷйҮҢз•ҘиҝҮгҖӮ

SNAPSHOT

еҸӮиҖғеүҚдәәиҪ®еӯҗпјҡзҗҶи§ЈMavenдёӯзҡ„SNAPSHOTзүҲжң¬е’ҢжӯЈејҸзүҲжң¬

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷпјҡ

[1] mavenе®ҳж–№иө„ж–ҷгҖӮhttps://maven.apache.org/users/index.html

[2] scope https://maven.apache.org/guides/introduction/introduction-to-dependency-mechanism.html

[3] дҪҝз”Ёimport scope е®һзҺ°mavenеӨҡз»§жүҝ https://www.cnblogs.com/techroad4ca/p/6512591.html

entry.title: Redisе…Ҙй—Ё
entry.content:
Redis жҳҜдёҖдёӘйҒөеҫӘBSDеҚҸи®®зҡ„ејҖжәҗзҡ„еҶ…еӯҳж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁзі»з»ҹпјҢдёҖиҲ¬з”ЁдҪңж•°жҚ®еә“гҖҒзј“еӯҳжҲ–иҖ…ж¶ҲжҒҜд»ЈзҗҶгҖӮе®ғж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„ж•°жҚ®з»“жһ„еҢ…жӢ¬еӯ—з¬ҰдёІгҖҒе“ҲеёҢиЎЁгҖҒй“ҫиЎЁгҖҒйӣҶеҗҲгҖҒ
жңүеәҸйӣҶеҗҲпјҲд»ҘеҸҠиҢғеӣҙжҹҘиҜўпјүгҖҒзӮ№еӣҫгҖҒhyperloglogsгҖҒең°зҗҶдҪҚзҪ®еқҗж ҮпјҲд»ҘеҸҠеҚҠеҫ„жҹҘиҜўпјүгҖӮRedisеҶ…зҪ®дәҶдё»д»ҺеӨҚеҲ¶гҖҒLuaи„ҡжң¬иҜӯиЁҖгҖҒLRUз®—жі•гҖҒдәӢеҠЎд»ҘеҸҠ
дёҚеҗҢзӯүзә§зҡ„зЈҒзӣҳжҢҒд№…еҢ–пјҢе№¶дё”йҖҡиҝҮRedisе“Ёе…өжҸҗдҫӣдәҶй«ҳеҸҜз”Ёзү№жҖ§пјҢйҖҡиҝҮResdis ClusterжҸҗдҫӣдәҶиҮӘеҠЁеҲҶеҢәеҠҹиғҪгҖӮ

ж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢ

еӯ—з¬ҰдёІ

Redisж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІзұ»еһӢжҳҜдәҢиҝӣеҲ¶е®үе…Ёзҡ„пјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜиҜҙдёҚд»…д»…еҸҜд»Ҙеӯҳж”ҫеӯ—з¬ҰдёІзұ»еһӢпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘеӯҳеӮЁдёҖдёӘзҪ‘йЎөгҖҒдёҖеј jpgеӣҫзүҮжҲ–иҖ…жҳҜдёҖдёӘеҸҜиў«еәҸеҲ—еҢ–зҡ„еҜ№иұЎгҖӮ

еңЁиҝҷйҮҢkeyе’ҢvalueйғҪжҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІзұ»еһӢпјҢеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜд»»ж„Ҹзҡ„дәҢиҝӣеҲ¶еәҸеҲ—пјҢз”ҡиҮідёҖдёӘз©әдёІд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜдёҖдёӘkeyгҖӮжңҖеӨ§зҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІзұ»еһӢзҡ„еҖјдёҚиғҪеӨ§дәҺ512MBпјҢиҷҪз„¶еҰӮжӯӨпјҢдҪҶ
иҝҮй•ҝзҡ„keyдјҡжөӘиҙ№еҶ…еӯҳз©әй—ҙпјҢиҝҮзҹӯзҡ„keyеҚҙеҪұе“ҚдәҶеҸҜиҜ»жҖ§гҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> SET hello redis
OK
127.0.0.1:6379> GET hello
"redis"
127.0.0.1:6379> SET hello duval
OK
127.0.0.1:6379> GET hello
"duval"
127.0.0.1:6379> MSET BTC bitcoin ETH ethereum LTC litecoin Doge dogecoin
OK
127.0.0.1:6379> MGET BTC ETH LTC Doge
1) "bitcoin"
2) "ethereum"
3) "litecoin"
4) "dogecoin"

еёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө SETгҖҒGETгҖҒMSETгҖҒMGETгҖҒDELгҖҒEXISET гҖҒAPPEND

дҪҝз”Ё help @string е‘Ҫд»ӨеҸҜд»ҘжҹҘзңӢжүҖжңүе‘Ҫд»ӨпјҢд»ҘдёӢзұ»дјј

й“ҫиЎЁ

еҖјеҫ—жіЁж„Ҹзҡ„жҳҜпјҢredisж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„жҳҜеҸҢеҗ‘й“ҫиЎЁгҖӮй“ҫиЎЁжңҖеӨҡеҸҜд»ҘеҢ…еҗ« 2^32 - 1 дёӘе…ғзҙ  (4294967295, жҜҸдёӘеҲ—иЎЁи¶…иҝҮ40дәҝдёӘе…ғзҙ )гҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> lpush mylist 1
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> lpush mylist 0
(integer) 2
127.0.0.1:6379> rpush mylist 2
(integer) 3
127.0.0.1:6379> lpop mylist
"0"
127.0.0.1:6379> lpop mylist
"1"
127.0.0.1:6379> lpop mylist
"2"
127.0.0.1:6379> lpop mylist
(nil)

еёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө LPUSH гҖҒRPUSHгҖҒLPOPгҖҒRPOPгҖҒLRANGE

йӣҶеҗҲ

Redis зҡ„ Set жҳҜ String зұ»еһӢзҡ„ж— еәҸйӣҶеҗҲгҖӮйӣҶеҗҲжҲҗе‘ҳжҳҜе”ҜдёҖзҡ„пјҢиҝҷе°ұж„Ҹе‘ізқҖйӣҶеҗҲдёӯдёҚиғҪеҮәзҺ°йҮҚеӨҚзҡ„ж•°жҚ®гҖӮ

Redis дёӯйӣҶеҗҲжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮе“ҲеёҢиЎЁе®һзҺ°зҡ„пјҢжүҖд»Ҙж·»еҠ пјҢеҲ йҷӨпјҢжҹҘжүҫзҡ„еӨҚжқӮеәҰйғҪжҳҜ O(1)гҖӮ

йӣҶеҗҲдёӯжңҖеӨ§зҡ„жҲҗе‘ҳж•°дёә 2^32 - 1 (4294967295, жҜҸдёӘйӣҶеҗҲеҸҜеӯҳеӮЁ40еӨҡдәҝдёӘжҲҗе‘ҳ)гҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> SADD set1 1 2 3 4
(integer) 4
127.0.0.1:6379> SADD set2 2 3 4 5
(integer) 4
127.0.0.1:6379> SMEMBERS set1
1) "1"
2) "2"
3) "3"
4) "4"
127.0.0.1:6379> SMEMBERS set2
1) "2"
2) "3"
3) "4"
4) "5"
127.0.0.1:6379> SDIFF set1 set2  //жұӮ set1-set2 е·®йӣҶ
1) "1"
127.0.0.1:6379> SDIFF set2 set1  //жұӮ set2-set1 е·®йӣҶ
1) "5"

е“ҲеёҢиЎЁ

Redis hash жҳҜдёҖдёӘstringзұ»еһӢзҡ„fieldе’Ңvalueзҡ„жҳ е°„иЎЁпјҢhashзү№еҲ«йҖӮеҗҲз”ЁдәҺеӯҳеӮЁеҜ№иұЎгҖӮ

Redis дёӯжҜҸдёӘ hash еҸҜд»ҘеӯҳеӮЁ 2^32 - 1 й”®еҖјеҜ№пјҲ40еӨҡдәҝпјүгҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> HMSET coins BTC "bitcoin"  ETH "ethereum" LTC "litecoin"
OK
127.0.0.1:6379> HSET coins DOGE "dogecoin"
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> HMGET coins BTC ETH LTC DOGE
1) "bitcoin"
2) "ethereum"
3) "litecoin"
4) "dogecoin"
127.0.0.1:6379> HGET coins DOGE
"dogecoin"

еёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө HGETгҖҒHSETгҖҒHMGETгҖҒHMSETгҖҒHLENгҖҒHGETALL

жңүеәҸйӣҶеҗҲ

Redis жңүеәҸйӣҶеҗҲе’ҢйӣҶеҗҲдёҖж ·д№ҹжҳҜstringзұ»еһӢе…ғзҙ зҡ„йӣҶеҗҲ,дё”дёҚе…Ғи®ёйҮҚеӨҚзҡ„жҲҗе‘ҳгҖӮ

дёҚеҗҢзҡ„жҳҜжҜҸдёӘе…ғзҙ йғҪдјҡе…іиҒ”дёҖдёӘdoubleзұ»еһӢзҡ„еҲҶж•°гҖӮredisжӯЈжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮеҲҶж•°жқҘдёәйӣҶеҗҲдёӯзҡ„жҲҗе‘ҳиҝӣиЎҢд»Һе°ҸеҲ°еӨ§зҡ„жҺ’еәҸгҖӮ

жңүеәҸйӣҶеҗҲзҡ„жҲҗе‘ҳжҳҜе”ҜдёҖзҡ„,дҪҶеҲҶж•°(score)еҚҙеҸҜд»ҘйҮҚеӨҚгҖӮ

йӣҶеҗҲжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮе“ҲеёҢиЎЁе®һзҺ°зҡ„пјҢжүҖд»Ҙж·»еҠ пјҢеҲ йҷӨпјҢжҹҘжүҫзҡ„еӨҚжқӮеәҰйғҪжҳҜO(1)гҖӮ йӣҶеҗҲдёӯжңҖеӨ§зҡ„жҲҗе‘ҳж•°дёә 232 - 1 (4294967295, жҜҸдёӘйӣҶеҗҲеҸҜеӯҳеӮЁ40еӨҡдәҝдёӘжҲҗе‘ҳ)гҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> ZADD class1 100 duval
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> ZADD class1 99 yang
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> ZADD class1 93 tom
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> ZADD class1 90.5 paul
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> ZADD class1 89  zip
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> ZADD class1 60 john
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> ZRANGEBYSCORE class1 90 100
1) "paul"
2) "tom"
3) "yang"
4) "duval"

еёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө ZADDгҖҒZRANGEBYSCOREгҖҒZREMгҖҒZRANGE

дҪҚеӣҫ

дҪҚеӣҫе®һйҷ…дёҠе№¶дёҚжҳҜдёҖз§Қж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢпјҢжң¬иҙЁдёҠжҳҜз”Ёеӯ—з¬ҰдёІзұ»еһӢеӯҳеӮЁзҡ„йқўеҗ‘дҪҚзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңгҖӮз”ұдәҺеӯ—з¬ҰдёІзұ»еһӢиў«йҷҗеҲ¶дёә512MBпјҢдҪҚеӣҫеҸҜд»Ҙе®№зәідёӢ2^32дёӘдёҚеҗҢдҪҚгҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> SETBIT visit 10 1
(integer) 0
127.0.0.1:6379> SETBIT visit 11 1
(integer) 0
127.0.0.1:6379> BITCOUNT visit
(integer) 2
127.0.0.1:6379> GETBIT visit 10
(integer) 1

HyperLogLog

Redis HyperLogLog жҳҜз”ЁжқҘеҒҡеҹәж•°з»ҹи®Ўзҡ„з®—жі•пјҢHyperLogLog зҡ„дјҳзӮ№жҳҜпјҢеңЁиҫ“е…Ҙе…ғзҙ зҡ„ж•°йҮҸжҲ–иҖ…дҪ“з§ҜйқһеёёйқһеёёеӨ§ж—¶пјҢи®Ўз®—еҹәж•°жүҖйңҖзҡ„з©әй—ҙжҖ»жҳҜеӣәе®ҡ зҡ„гҖҒе№¶дё”жҳҜеҫҲе°Ҹзҡ„гҖӮ

еңЁ Redis йҮҢйқўпјҢжҜҸдёӘ HyperLogLog й”®еҸӘйңҖиҰҒиҠұиҙ№ 12 KB еҶ…еӯҳпјҢе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙи®Ўз®—жҺҘиҝ‘ 2^64 дёӘдёҚеҗҢе…ғзҙ зҡ„еҹә ж•°гҖӮиҝҷе’Ңи®Ўз®—еҹәж•°ж—¶пјҢе…ғзҙ и¶ҠеӨҡиҖ—иҙ№еҶ…еӯҳе°ұи¶ҠеӨҡзҡ„йӣҶеҗҲеҪўжҲҗйІңжҳҺеҜ№жҜ”гҖӮ

дҪҶжҳҜпјҢеӣ дёә HyperLogLog еҸӘдјҡж №жҚ®иҫ“е…Ҙе…ғзҙ жқҘи®Ўз®—еҹәж•°пјҢиҖҢдёҚдјҡеӮЁеӯҳиҫ“е…Ҙе…ғзҙ жң¬иә«пјҢжүҖд»Ҙ HyperLogLog дёҚиғҪеғҸйӣҶеҗҲйӮЈж ·пјҢиҝ”еӣһиҫ“е…Ҙзҡ„еҗ„дёӘе…ғзҙ гҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> PFADD count a b c a b c
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> PFCOUNT count
(integer) 3

ең°зҗҶдҪҚзҪ®еқҗж Ү

еңЁRedisзҡ„3.2зүҲжң¬дёӯеҠ е…ҘдәҶең°зҗҶз©әй—ҙ(geospatial)д»ҘеҸҠзҙўеј•еҚҠеҫ„жҹҘиҜўзҡ„еҠҹиғҪгҖӮ

127.0.0.1:6379> GEOADD cities 113.46 23.12 "guangzhou"
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> GEOADD cities 114.08 22.52 "shenzhen"
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> GEOADD cities 113.04 28.05 "changsha"
(integer) 1
127.0.0.1:6379> GEORADIUS cities 113.4 23.1 100 km
1) "guangzhou"
2) "shenzhen"
127.0.0.1:6379> GEORADIUS cities 113.4 23.1 10 km
1) "guangzhou"

spring data redis

spring data redis е°ҒиЈ…дәҶдёҖзі»еҲ—зҡ„жҺҘеҸЈпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙйқһеёёж–№дҫҝең°ж“ҚдҪңredisгҖӮ

  • еј•е…Ҙdependenciesпјҡ
<dependency>
     <groupId>org.springframework.data</groupId>
     <artifactId>spring-data-redis</artifactId>
     <version>1.7.2.RELEASE</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
     <groupId>org.springframework.data</groupId>
     <artifactId>spring-data-redis</artifactId>
     <version>1.7.2.RELEASE</version>
</dependency>
  • жіЁе…Ҙbean
@Configuration
public class RedisConfig {

    @Bean(name = "myjedisConnectFactory")
    JedisConnectionFactory jedisConnectionFactory(){
        RedisStandaloneConfiguration redisStandaloneConfiguration = new RedisStandaloneConfiguration();
        redisStandaloneConfiguration.setHostName("127.0.0.1");
        redisStandaloneConfiguration.setPort(6379);
        JedisConnectionFactory connectionFactory = new JedisConnectionFactory(redisStandaloneConfiguration);
        return connectionFactory;
    }

    @Bean(name = "myredisTemplate")
    @Autowired
    @Qualifier("myjedisConnectFactory")
    public RedisTemplate<String,Object> redisTemplate(RedisConnectionFactory factory){
        RedisTemplate<String,Object> redisTemplate = new RedisTemplate<>();
        redisTemplate.setConnectionFactory(factory);
        redisTemplate.setKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());
        return redisTemplate;

    }
}
  • з„¶еҗҺе°ұеҸҜд»ҘејҖе§ӢдҪҝз”ЁдәҶ
@Autowired
 @Qualifier("myredisTemplate")
 private RedisTemplate redisTemplate;

 @Test
 public void contextLoads() {
 }

 @Test
 public void testValue(){

     //redis ж“ҚдҪңеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ
     String key = "hello";
     String value = "world";
     BoundValueOperations boundValueOperations = redisTemplate.boundValueOps(key);
     boundValueOperations.set(value);
     String result = (String) boundValueOperations.get();

     assert result.equals(value);

     //redis ж“ҚдҪңеҸҜеәҸеҲ—еҢ–еҜ№иұЎ
     key = "bitcoin";
     Bitcoin bitcoin = new Bitcoin("BTC",21000000L,16000000L,123456666L);
     redisTemplate.boundValueOps(key).set(bitcoin);
     Bitcoin bitcoin1 = (Bitcoin) redisTemplate.boundValueOps(key).get();

     assert  bitcoin1.equals(bitcoin);
 }

е…·дҪ“д»Јз ҒиҜ·з§»жӯҘжҲ‘зҡ„д»“еә“-redisdemo

еҲҶзүҮ

еҸӮиҖғпјҡhttps://my.oschina.net/guol/blog/506193

еҲҶеә“

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷ
[1]дёӯж–Үе®ҳж–№ж–ҮжЎЈ http://www.redis.cn/documentation.html
[2]http://www.runoob.com/redis/redis-tutorial.html

entry.title: Javaе’ҢжҷәиғҪеҗҲзәҰзҡ„дәӨдә’
entry.content:
Javaе’ҢжҷәиғҪеҗҲзәҰзҡ„дәӨдә’

web3j

web3j is a lightweight, highly modular, reactive, type safe Java and Android library for working with Smart Contracts and integrating with clients (nodes) on the Ethereum network.
web3j жҳҜдёҖдёӘиҪ»йҮҸзә§гҖҒжЁЎеқ—еҢ–гҖҒе“Қеә”ејҸзҡ„Java е’Ң android еә“пјҢеҸҜд»Ҙз”ЁжқҘе’ҢжҷәиғҪеҗҲзәҰд»ҘеҸҠд»ҘеӨӘеқҠиҠӮзӮ№иҝӣиЎҢдәӨдә’гҖӮ

 
дёӢиҫ№ж №жҚ®е®ҳж–№ж•ҷзЁӢи®Іи§Јжҗӯе»әдёҖдёӘjavaе·ҘзЁӢ (д»Јз ҒиҜҰи§Ғе®ҳж–№ж ·дҫӢ)пјҢе№¶дёҺжҷәиғҪеҗҲзәҰиҝӣиЎҢдәӨдә’пјҡ

Getting started

 еҜје…Ҙweb3j еҢ…

<dependency>
  <groupId>org.web3j</groupId>
  <artifactId>core</artifactId>
  <version>3.2.0</version>
</dependency>

еҗҜеҠЁд»ҘеӨӘеқҠиҠӮзӮ№

 еҗҜеҠЁз§Ғй“ҫиҠӮзӮ№еҸҜд»Ҙ еҸӮиҖғеүҚж–ҮгҖҠд»ҘеӨӘеқҠз§Ғй“ҫжҗӯе»әж•ҷзЁӢгҖӢ гҖӮеҰӮжһңдҪҝз”ЁinfuraжңҚеҠЎеҸҜи·іиҝҮжӯӨжӯҘйӘӨгҖӮ

дёҺд»ҘеӨӘеқҠиҠӮзӮ№дәӨдә’

  • жһ„е»әweb3jе®һдҫӢ

 дҪҝз”Ёз§Ғй“ҫиҠӮзӮ№

Web3j web3j = Web3j.build(new HttpService("http://192.168.xxx.xxx:8545"));

 еҪ“з„¶д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁInfuraжҸҗдҫӣзҡ„дә‘иҠӮзӮ№жңҚеҠЎпјҢйӮЈж ·еӯҗе°ұдёҚз”ЁеҗҜеҠЁд»ҘеӨӘеқҠз§Ғй“ҫиҠӮзӮ№дәҶгҖӮеҸӘйңҖиҰҒеңЁд»Јз ҒйҮҢиҝҷж ·дҪҝз”Ёпјҡ

Web3j web3 = Web3j.build(new InfuraHttpService("https://ropsten.infura.io/your-token"));

 InfuraйңҖиҰҒз”іиҜ·и®ҝй—®tokenпјҢз§»жӯҘе®ҳзҪ‘з”іиҜ·пјҡhttps://infura.io/

  • жһ„е»әеҮӯжҚ®
// FIXME: Generate a new wallet file using the web3j command line tools https://docs.web3j.io/command_line.html

Credentials credentials = WalletUtils.loadCredentials("<password>","/path/to/<walletfile>");

  passwordжҳҜдҪ зҡ„д»ҘеӨӘеқҠеёҗеҸ·еҜҶз ҒпјҢеҰӮжһңжҳҜз§Ғй“ҫиҠӮзӮ№пјҢwalletfileеҸҜд»ҘеңЁж•°жҚ®зӣ®еҪ•пјҲdata/keystore/пјүдёӢжүҫеҲ°гҖӮ

  еҸҰеӨ–д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘз”Ёз§Ғй’Ҙжһ„е»әеҮӯжҚ®:

Credentials credentials = Credentials.create("92a9470c8597ce44c5fd901363541c0c41e341d2c1fe719e6bf20f2557axxxxx");
  • еҸ‘иө·дәӨжҳ“
TransactionReceipt transferReceipt = Transfer.sendFunds(web3j, credentials,"0xe80fbabee07b259fe36a950ef384abf401806eef",BigDecimal.ONE, Convert.Unit.WEI).send();
  • еҗҲзәҰйғЁзҪІ
Greeter contract = Greeter.deploy(
                web3j, credentials,
                ManagedTransaction.GAS_PRICE, Contract.GAS_LIMIT,
                "Hello blockchain world!").send();
  • и°ғз”ЁеҗҲзәҰ
TransactionReceipt transactionReceipt = contract.newGreeting("Well hello again").send();
  • зӣ‘еҗ¬Event
for (Greeter.ModifiedEventResponse event : contract.getModifiedEvents(transactionReceipt)) {
            log.info("Modify event fired, previous value: " + event.oldGreeting
                    + ", new value: " + event.newGreeting);
            log.info("Indexed event previous value: " + Numeric.toHexString(event.oldGreetingIdx)
                    + ", new value: " + Numeric.toHexString(event.newGreetingIdx));
        }

зј–иҜ‘еҗҲзәҰеҢ…иЈ…д»Јз Ғ

 д»Һе®ҳж–№ж ·дҫӢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢjavaд»Јз Ғе’ҢжҷәиғҪеҗҲзәҰзҡ„дәӨдә’жҳҜйҖҡиҝҮrpcи°ғз”ЁжқҘе®һзҺ°зҡ„гҖӮйӮЈеңЁе®һйҷ…ејҖеҸ‘дёӯпјҢжҷәиғҪеҗҲзәҰйҮҮз”ЁsolidityиҜӯиЁҖејҖеҸ‘пјҢеҰӮдҪ•д»ҺжҷәиғҪеҗҲзәҰд»Јз Ғз”ҹжҲҗзӣёеҜ№еә”зҡ„rpcеҢ…иЈ…д»Јз Ғе‘ўпјҹ
 иҝҷйҮҢз”ЁеҲ°дёӨдёӘе·Ҙе…·web3jе’Ңsolc гҖӮе®ҳж–№д»“еә“йғҪжҸҗдҫӣзј–иҜ‘еҘҪзҡ„е·Ҙе…·пјҢзӣҙжҺҘдёӢиҪҪеҚіеҸҜдҪҝз”ЁпјҢиҮӘиЎҢжәҗз Ғзј–иҜ‘е®№жҳ“иё©еқ‘пјҢдёҚе»әи®®гҖӮ
 зј–иҜ‘еҢ…иЈ…д»Јз ҒеҲҶдёәдёӨжӯҘпјҡ

  • з”Ёsolcзј–иҜ‘еҗҲзәҰд»Јз ҒиҺ·еҫ— bin е’Ң abi
$ solc <contract>.sol --bin --abi --optimize -o <output-dir>/
  • з”Ёweb3jзј–иҜ‘binе’Ңabi иҺ·еҫ—еҢ…иЈ…д»Јз Ғ
web3j solidity generate /path/to/<smart-contract>.bin /path/to/<smart-contract>.abi -o /path/to/src/main/java -p com.your.organisation.name

 еҸҰеӨ–еҰӮжһңдҪ дҪҝз”Ёзҡ„truffleжЎҶжһ¶пјҢйӮЈд№ҲеҸҜд»ҘеҲ©з”ЁйЎ№зӣ®buildзӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„jsonж–Үд»¶пјҢз®ҖеҢ–з”ҹжҲҗеҢ…иЈ…д»Јз Ғзҡ„жӯҘйӘӨпјҢеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

cd /path/to/your/web3j/java/project
$ web3j truffle generate /path/to/<truffle-smart-contract-output>.json -o /path/to/src/main/java -p com.your.organisation.name

 

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷпјҡ
 [1]web3j д»“еә“ https://github.com/web3j/web3j
 [2]infuraдҪҝз”Ёж•ҷзЁӢпјҡhttps://docs.web3j.io/infura.html
 [3]е®ҳж–№ж ·дҫӢ https://github.com/web3j/sample-project-gradle

жү“иөҸең°еқҖпјҡ
ETH:0x93e9702adEB8Ad040d3da639201edFF5A6AB05Db
LTC:LMwzPbysYmvJzkZimcJhX6Yd74WrPxqykT

entry.title: Drools Workbench7.4.1дҪҝз”Ё
entry.content:
вҖғдёҠдёҖзҜҮж–Үз« е·Із»Ҹд»Ӣз»ҚеҰӮдҪ•йғЁзҪІ Drools Workbench7.4.1гҖӮиҝҷзҜҮж–Үз« и®©жҲ‘д»¬еӯҰд№ еҰӮдҪ•еҲ©з”ЁDrools Workbench7.4.1еҺ»ж–°е»әдёҖдёӘdroolsи§„еҲҷйЎ№зӣ®пјҢзј–еҶҷи§„еҲҷе’Ңkmodule.xmlпјҢз„¶еҗҺзј–иҜ‘йғЁзҪІеҸ‘еёғеҲ°mavenд»“еә“пјҢеҶҚз”ЁжҲ‘д»¬зҡ„javaд»Јз ҒеҺ»иҝңзЁӢиҺ·еҸ–mavenд»“еә“дёӯзҡ„drools jarеҢ…гҖӮLet`s go!

еҲӣе»әTeam

вҖғдҪ еҸҜд»ҘиҖғиҷ‘еҲӣе»әиҮӘе·ұteamпјҢжҲ–иҖ…зӣҙжҺҘдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®Өзҡ„myteamгҖӮиҝҷйҮҢжҲ‘д»¬еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„teamгҖӮ

еҲӣе»әProject

вҖғеҲӣе»әйЎ№зӣ®пјҢеҗҚдёәMyFristProjгҖӮ

ж–°е»әж•°жҚ®еҜ№иұЎ

вҖғж–°е»әдёҖдёӘPOJOеҜ№иұЎпјҢиҝҷйҮҢжҳҜAccount

public class Account implements java.io.Serializable {
    static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    private Long accountNum;
    private Double balance;
    public Account(){
    }
    public Account(Long accountNum,Double balance){
        this.accountNum = accountNum;
        this.balance = balance;
    }
    public Long getAccountNum() {
        return accountNum;
    }
    public void setAccountNum(Long accountNum) {
        this.accountNum = accountNum;
    }
    public Double getBalance() {
        return balance;
    }
    public void setBalance(Double balance) {
        this.balance = balance;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return "Account --> "+"["+this.accountNum+":"+this.balance+"]";
    }
}

ж–°е»әDRLж–Үд»¶

package com.test;

function Long plusOne(Long num){
    return num+1;
}
rule "My First Rule to check account"
    no-loop
    when
        $acc : Account()
    then
        $acc.setAccountNum(plusOne($acc.getAccountNum()));

end

жөӢиҜ•

еҘҪдәҶпјҢдёҖдёӘdroolsи§„еҲҷйЎ№зӣ®ејҖеҸ‘е®ҢдәҶпјҢдёӢиҫ№ејҖе§ӢдҫӢеҰӮиҮӘеёҰзҡ„жөӢиҜ•еҠҹиғҪжөӢиҜ•дёҖдёӢгҖӮ

ж–°е»әжөӢиҜ•еңәжҷҜ

жҸ’е…ҘFact

з„¶еҗҺзј–иҫ‘иҝҷдёӘfactпјҢж·»еҠ дёҖдёӘеӯ—ж®ө

еңЁзӮ№йӮЈдёӘз¬”пјҢж·»еҠ дёӘеӯ—йқўеҖјгҖӮпјҲиҝҷдёӘдәӨдә’иҝҮзЁӢдёҚжҳҜдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„иӣӢз–јпјҢеҝҚеҝҚпјү

ж·»еҠ дёӘжңҹжңӣзҡ„дәӢе®һеҖј

еӣ дёәжҲ‘зҡ„drlж–Үд»¶йҖ»иҫ‘жҳҜз»ҷaccountNum++пјҢжүҖд»ҘиҝҷйҮҢжңҹжңӣеҖјеЎ«1001

OK . дҝқеӯҳпјҢиҝҗиЎҢпјҢйҖҡиҝҮ

зј–иҜ‘еҸ‘еёғеҲ°mavenд»“еә“

еҸ‘еёғе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺпјҢдҪ еҸҜд»ҘеңЁзӣ®еҪ• ~/.m2/repository/com/test/MyFirstProj/1.0.0дёӢзңӢеҲ°зј–иҜ‘еҮәжқҘзҡ„jarеҢ…пјҢеҸҜд»ҘдёӢиҪҪдёӢжқҘи§ЈеҺӢи§ӮеҜҹгҖӮ

Javaд»Јз ҒиҝңзЁӢи°ғз”Ё

jarеҢ…е·Із»ҸеңЁиҝңзЁӢжңҚеҠЎеҷЁдёҠзј–иҜ‘йғЁзҪІдәҶпјҢзҺ°еңЁжҲ‘еёҢжңӣжң¬ең°зҡ„дёҖдёӘжңҚеҠЎпјҢиғҪеӨҹиҝңзЁӢдҪҝз”ЁиҝҷдёӘjarеҢ…пјҢиҝҷж ·еӯҗе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҒҡеҲ°дёҡеҠЎе’Ңи§„еҲҷзҡ„е®Ңе…ЁеҲҶзҰ»и§ЈиҖҰгҖӮзӣҙжҺҘдёҠд»Јз Ғпјҡ

/**
 * Created by Duval Yang
 * CurrentTime : 2017-11-06 11:20.
 */
public class Test {
    public static void main(String [] args) throws IOException {
        String url = "http://xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx:8084/kie-drools-wb/maven2/com/test/myfirstproj/1.0.0/MyFirstProj-1.0.0.jar";//иҮӘиЎҢеЎ«дҪ ipз«ҜеҸЈд»ҘеҸҠи·Ҝеҫ„
        KieServices ks = KieServices.Factory.get();
        KieRepository kr = ks.getRepository();
        UrlResource urlResource = (UrlResource) ks.getResources().newUrlResource(url);
        urlResource.setUsername("tomcat");
        urlResource.setPassword("tomcat");
        urlResource.setBasicAuthentication("enabled");
        InputStream is = urlResource.getInputStream();
        KieModule kModule = kr.addKieModule(ks.getResources().newInputStreamResource(is));
        KieContainer kContainer = ks.newKieContainer(kModule.getReleaseId());
        //StatelessKieSession kSession = kContainer.newStatelessKieSession("defaultStatelessKieSession");
        KieSession session = kContainer.newKieSession();
        Account acc = new Account();
        acc.setAccountNum(100L);
        session.insert(acc);
        session.fireAllRules();
        session.dispose();
        //kSession.execute(acc);
        if(acc.getAccountNum() == 101L){
            System.out.println("succeed");
        }else{
            System.out.println("failed");
        }
    }
}

иҮӘе®ҡд№үkmodule.xml

дёҠиҫ№зҡ„дҫӢеӯҗдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„жҳҜй»ҳи®Өзҡ„з©әзҡ„kmodule.xmlпјҢ дҪ и§ЈеҺӢjarеҢ…д№ҹеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢе®Ңе…Ёз©әзҡ„гҖӮз”ҹдә§ж—¶еҖҷпјҢдёҖиҲ¬йғҪиҰҒиҮӘе®ҡд№үkbase ksessionпјҢжүҖд»ҘиҝҷйҮҢз®ҖеҚ•иҜҙдёӢдҝ®ж”№зҡ„е…ҘеҸЈеңЁе“ӘйҮҢгҖӮеҰӮеӣҫ

йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҢеҸӘжҳҜе…ҘеҸЈйҡҫжүҫгҖӮ

All is done.ж„үеҝ«зҺ©иҖҚеҗ§пјҒ

entry.title: Drools Workbench 7.4.1 йғЁзҪІ
entry.content:
жҠҳи…ҫдәҶдёӢDrools Workbench 7.4.1зҡ„йғЁзҪІпјҢзҪ‘дёҠе№¶жІЎжңүзӣёе…іиө„ж–ҷпјҢи®°еҪ•д№ӢгҖӮ

зҺҜеўғеҮҶеӨҮ

apache-tomcat-8.5.23 пјҲз”Ёtomcat7еҗҜеҠЁдјҡжңүеҘҮжҖӘй—®йўҳпјү
kie-drools-wb-7.4.1.Final-tomcat8.war
drools еҗҜеҠЁдҫқиө–jar

Step1 и§ЈеҺӢwar

дёӢиҪҪkie-drools-wb-7.4.1.Final-tomcat8.warеҢ…пјҢи§ЈеҺӢеҗҺпјҢе°Ҷзӣ®еҪ•жӣҙеҗҚдёәkie-drools-wb е°Ҷе…¶ж”ҫеңЁtomcatзҡ„webappзӣ®еҪ•дёӢгҖӮ

[apps@aly2-hn1-devtest-001 webapps]$ pwd
/home/apps/apache-tomcat-8.5.23/webapps
[apps@aly2-hn1-devtest-001 webapps]$ ls
docs  examples  host-manager  kie-drools-wb  manager  ROOT
[apps@aly2-hn1-devtest-001 webapps]$ ls kie-drools-wb/
banner       frameworks  index.jsp          login.jsp   META-INF            org.kie.workbench.drools.KIEDroolsWebapp  README.txt    styles
favicon.ico  images      kie-drools-wb.jsp  logout.jsp  not_authorized.jsp  plugins                                   rest-api.jsp  WEB-INF
[apps@aly2-hn1-devtest-001 webapps]$

Step2 дҫқиө–jar

е°ҶжүҖйңҖзҡ„дҫқиө–jarеҢ…ж·»еҠ еҲ°tomcatдёӢзҡ„lib зӣ®еҪ•дёӢ

Step3 й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶btm-config.properties

еңЁtomcatзҡ„confж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӢж–°е»әж–Үд»¶btm-config.properties(tomcat и·Ҝеҫ„й…Ңжғ…жӣҙж”№пјүпјҢе№¶ж·»еҠ еҰӮдёӢй…ҚзҪ®

bitronix.tm.serverId=tomcat-btm-node0
bitronix.tm.journal.disk.logPart1Filename=/home/apps/apache-tomcat-8.5.23/work/btm1.tlog
bitronix.tm.journal.disk.logPart2Filename=/home/apps/apache-tomcat-8.5.23/work/btm2.tlog
bitronix.tm.resource.configuration=/home/apps/apache-tomcat-8.5.23/conf/resources.properties

Step4 й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶resources.properties

еңЁtomcatзҡ„confж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӢж–°е»әж–Үд»¶resources.propertiesпјҢе№¶ж·»еҠ еҰӮдёӢй…ҚзҪ®пјҡ
ж•°жҚ®еә“дҝЎжҒҜй…Ңжғ…жӣҙж”№пјҢе№¶еңЁжң¬ең°зҡ„mysqlж•°жҚ®еә“дёӯеҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘеҗҚеӯ—дёә drools зҡ„ж•°жҚ®еә“

resource.ds1.className=bitronix.tm.resource.jdbc.lrc.LrcXADataSource
resource.ds1.uniqueName=jdbc/jbpm
resource.ds1.minPoolSize=10
resource.ds1.maxPoolSize=20
resource.ds1.driverProperties.driverClassName=com.mysql.jdbc.Driver
resource.ds1.driverProperties.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/drools?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8
resource.ds1.driverProperties.user=root
resource.ds1.driverProperties.password=admin
resource.ds1.allowLocalTransactions=true

Step5дҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶context.xml

дҝ®ж”№tomcat зҡ„confж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӢзҡ„context.xmlпјҢеңЁе…¶Context ж Үзӯҫдёӯж·»еҠ еҰӮдёӢй…ҚзҪ®
еҲҮи®°дҝ®ж”№й“ҫжҺҘеӯ—з¬ҰдёІдёӯзҡ„ mysqlзҡ„иҙҰеҸ·еҜҶз ҒгҖӮ

<Resource name="jdbc/jbpm" auth="Container" type="javax.sql.DataSource" driverClassName="com.mysql.jdbc.Driver" url="jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/drools?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8" username="root" password="admin" maxActive="20" maxIdle="1" maxWait="5000"/>

Step6дҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶tomcat-users.xml

дҝ®ж”№tomcat зҡ„confж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӢзҡ„tomcat-users.xmlпјҢеңЁе…¶tomcat-usersж Үзӯҫдёӯж·»еҠ еҰӮдёӢй…ҚзҪ®

<role rolename="admin"/>
<role rolename="analyst"/>
<user username="tomcat" password="tomcat" roles="admin,analyst"/>

Step7дҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶server.xml

дҝ®ж”№tomcat зҡ„confж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӢзҡ„tserver.xml пјҢеңЁе…¶ж–Үд»¶жң«з«ҜHostж Үзӯҫдёӯж·»еҠ еҰӮдёӢй…ҚзҪ®

 <Valve className="org.kie.integration.tomcat.JACCValve" />

Step8ж·»еҠ и„ҡжң¬setenv.sh

еңЁtomcat зҡ„binж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӢж–°е»әж–Үд»¶setenv.shпјҢе№¶ж·»еҠ еҰӮдёӢй…ҚзҪ®пјҡ

CATALINA_OPTS="-Xmx512M -XX:MaxPermSize=512m -Dbtm.root=/home/apps/apache-tomcat-8.5.23 \
    -Dbitronix.tm.configuration=/home/apps/apache-tomcat-8.5.23/conf/btm-config.properties \
    -Djbpm.tsr.jndi.lookup=java:comp/env/TransactionSynchronizationRegistry \
    -Djava.security.auth.login.config=/home/apps/apache-tomcat-8.5.23/webapps/kie-drools-wb/WEB-INF/classes/login.config \
    -Dorg.jboss.logging.provider=jdk"

Step9 дҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶persistence.xml

иҝҷдёӘж–Үд»¶еңЁdrools7.4.1иІҢдјје·Із»Ҹиў«еҲ жҺүдәҶпјҢжүҖд»ҘиҝҷжӯҘеҸҜд»ҘзңҒз•Ҙд№ӢгҖӮ

Step10 еҗҜеҠЁ

еҗҜеҠЁtomcat еңЁжөҸи§ҲеҷЁдёӯиҫ“е…Ҙhttp://localhost:8080/kie-drools-wb/kie-drools-wb.jsp
еңЁиҙҰеҸ·еҜҶз Ғиҫ“е…ҘжЎҶдёӯиҫ“е…Ҙtomcat-users.xmlж–Үд»¶дёӯй…ҚзҪ®зҡ„еёҗеҸ·еҜҶз Ғе°ұеҸҜзҷ»еҪ•иҝӣе…ҘDrools Workbench

ps.еҰӮжһң8080з«ҜеҸЈеҮәзҺ°дҪҝз”ЁеҶІзӘҒпјҢиҮӘиЎҢжӣҙжҚўз«ҜеҸЈгҖӮгҖӮе…¶д»–жҠҘй”ҷжҹҘзңӢtomcatж—Ҙеҝ—жҺ’жҹҘгҖӮ

йғЁзҪІе®ҢеҗҺпјҢжҺҘдёӢжқҘзҡ„ж–Үз« е°Ҷд»Ӣз»ҚеҰӮдҪ•з”Ёworkbench иҝӣиЎҢејҖеҸ‘пјҢе№¶дё”дҪҝз”Ёjavaд»Јз ҒиҝңзЁӢиҺ·еҸ–workbenchзј–иҜ‘йғЁзҪІзҡ„jarеҢ…еҺ»иҝҗиЎҢи§„еҲҷгҖӮ
иҜҰжғ…и§Ғ:
Drools Workbench7.4.1дҪҝз”Ё

еҸӮиҖғпјҡhttp://blog.csdn.net/u012373815/article/details/53526287

entry.title: ж·ұе…ҘдәҶи§ЈDrools
entry.content:
ж·ұе…ҘдәҶи§ЈDrools

з®ҖеҚ•д»Ӣз»Қ

вҖғз¬”иҖ…жӯЈеңЁеҒҡйЈҺжҺ§зі»з»ҹпјҢйЈҺжҺ§зі»з»ҹйҮҢиҫ№еӯҳеңЁйқһеёёеӨҡзҡ„и§„еҲҷпјҲжҜ”еҰӮпјҡage < 16 || age > 50 -> REJECT пјүгҖӮжңҖдҫҝжҚ·зҡ„е®һзҺ°е°ұжҳҜз”Ё if-else жқҘеҶҷпјҢдҪҶжҳҜйҡҸзқҖи§„еҲҷзҡ„еўһеҠ д»ҘеҸҠйңҖжұӮзҡ„еҸҳеҠЁпјҢд»Јз Ғе°ҶеҸҳеҫ—и¶ҠжқҘи¶Ҡйҡҫйҳ…иҜ»е’ҢеҸҳеҠЁгҖӮиҝҷж—¶еҖҷе°ұиҰҒеј•е…ҘDroolsзӯүи§„еҲҷеј•ж“ҺдәҶгҖӮDroolsе°ұжҳҜдёәдәҶи§ЈеҶідёҡеҠЎд»Јз Ғе’ҢдёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷеҲҶзҰ»зҡ„еј•ж“ҺгҖӮ

ејҖеҸ‘зҺҜеўғжҗӯе»ә

вҖғзҪ‘дёҠдёҖиҲ¬йғҪжҳҜeclipseдёӢзҡ„ж•ҷзЁӢпјҢиҝҷйҮҢи®ІдёӢintellijдёӢзҡ„ж•ҷзЁӢгҖӮ

  • е®үиЈ…JBoss Drools SupportжҸ’д»¶гҖӮдё»иҰҒжҳҜдёәдәҶintellijеҸҜд»ҘиҜҶеҲ«droolsж–Үд»¶пјҢдҪҝз”Ёеҝ«жҚ·зҡ„жҷәиғҪжҸҗзӨәгҖӮ
  • дёӢиҪҪдҫқиө–jar (https://download.jboss.org/drools/release/7.3.0.Final/droolsjbpm-tools-distribution-7.3.0.Final.zip)

вҖғеҘҪдәҶпјҢе°ұиҝҷд№ҲзӮ№жӯҘйӘӨпјҢе°ұжҳҜеҰӮжӯӨз®ҖеҚ•гҖӮ

Hello Drools

вҖғдёӢйқўз«Ӣй©¬дёҠжүӢHello DroolsгҖӮе®һзҺ°йңҖжұӮпјҡеҲӨж–ӯдёҖдёӘдәәзҡ„ age < 16 || age > 50 зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢжү“еҚ°е№ҙйҫ„дёҚз¬ҰеҗҲиҰҒжұӮгҖӮ

  • е»әз«Ӣе·ҘзЁӢ
    вҖғе°ұжҳҜе…ёеһӢзҡ„mavenе·ҘзЁӢпјҢйҷӨеӨ–йңҖиҰҒеҒҡд»ҘдёӢдәӢжғ…пјҡ
  1. еҜје…Ҙdroolsжңүе…іjarеҢ…гҖӮе°ұжҳҜdroolsjbpm-tools-distribution-7.3.0.Final.zipи§ЈеҺӢеҮәжқҘеҗҺзҡ„binariesдёӢзҡ„jarеҢ…гҖӮ
  2. ж–°е»әй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶/src/resources/META-INF/kmodule.xml
  3. ж–°е»әdroolsи§„еҲҷж–Үд»¶/src/resources/rules/age.drl
    е·ҘзЁӢжҗӯе»әе®ҢжҜ•пјҢж•ҲжһңеҰӮеӣҫпјҡ

  • ејҖе§Ӣзј–еҶҷд»Јз Ғ
    • kmodule.xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<kmodule xmlns="http://jboss.org/kie/6.0.0/kmodule">
    <kbase name="rules" packages="rules">
        <ksession name="myAgeSession"/>
    </kbase>
</kmodule>
    • com.hello.Person
package com.hello;

/**
 * Created by Duval Yang
 * CurrentTime : 2017-10-23 14:45.
 */
public class Person {

    private Integer age ;    
    private String name ;

    public Person(String name ,Integer age){
        this.age = age;
        this.name = name;
    }
  //зңҒз•Ҙsetter  getter

}
    • age.drl
import com.hello.Person               // еҜје…Ҙзұ»

dialect  "mvel"

rule "age"                                      // и§„еҲҷеҗҚпјҢе”ҜдёҖ
    when
        $person : Person(age<16 || age>50)     //и§„еҲҷзҡ„жқЎд»¶йғЁеҲҶ
    then
        System.out.println("иҝҷдёӘдәәзҡ„е№ҙйҫ„дёҚз¬ҰеҗҲиҰҒжұӮпјҒ");   
end

OK .е°ұиҝҷд№ҲзӮ№д»Јз ҒпјҢи®°дҪҸе°Ҷеҗ„з§Қиө„жәҗж–Үд»¶и®ҫдёәresourcesпјҲеҸій”®еҸҜд»Ҙи®ҫзҪ®дҪ жҮӮзҡ„пјҢдёҚз„¶иҝҗиЎҢдјҡжҠҘеҗ„з§Қз©әжҢҮй’ҲпјүгҖӮзҺ°еңЁз”Ёjunit жөӢиҜ•дёӢпјҡ

/**
 * Created by Duval Yang
 * CurrentTime : 2017-10-23 14:52.
 */
public class PersonTest {
    private static KieContainer container = null;
    private KieSession statefulKieSession = null;

    @org.junit.Test
    public void test() {
        KieServices kieServices = KieServices.Factory.get();
        container = kieServices.getKieClasspathContainer();
        statefulKieSession = container.newKieSession("myAgeSession");
        Person person = new Person("duval yang",12);
        statefulKieSession.insert(person);
        statefulKieSession.fireAllRules();
        statefulKieSession.dispose();
    }
}

еҘҪзҡ„пјҢHello Drools е®ҢжҲҗдәҶпјҢжҖ»з»“дёӢпјҡ
дёҖдёӘе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„droolsйЎ№зӣ®йңҖиҰҒпјҡж ҮеҮҶзҡ„mavenйЎ№зӣ®гҖҒkmodule.xmlгҖҒdrlж–Үд»¶гҖҒJavaд»Јз ҒдёӯеҲҮе…ҘзӮ№гҖӮ

DroolsејҖеҸ‘еҝ…зҹҘ

еҫҲеӨҡзҗҗзўҺзҡ„дёңиҘҝпјҢжҲ‘е°ұдёҚйҮҚеӨҚйҖ иҪ®еӯҗдәҶ.

  • API е’Ң kmoduleж–Үд»¶
    http://blog.csdn.net/u012373815/article/details/53907340

  • Stateless && Stateful
    drools зҡ„sessionеҲҶдёәжңүзҠ¶жҖҒе’Ңж— зҠ¶жҖҒдёӨз§ҚгҖӮзҪ‘дёҠзҡ„и§ЈйҮҠеҫҲеӨҡпјҢжҲ‘е°ұи®Іи®ІжҲ‘зҡ„зҗҶи§Јпјҡstateful еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮinsertзӯүж–№жі•жҸ’е…ҘfactпјҢе№¶дё”еҸ–еҫ—дёҖдёӘеҸҘжҹ„пјҢйҖҡиҝҮиҝҷдёӘеҸҘжҹ„еҸҜд»ҘеӨҡж¬Ўжӣҙж–°factд»ҺиҖҢи§ҰеҸ‘и§„еҲҷгҖӮеҰӮпјҡ

        FactHandle handle = statefulKieSession.insert(account);
        account.setBalance(111.0);
        statefulKieSession.update(handle,account);

stateless зұ»дјјдәҺдёҖдёӘеҮҪж•°и°ғз”ЁпјҢйҖҡиҝҮexecuteж–№жі•дј е…ҘfactпјҢеҺ»еҢ№й…Қи§„еҲҷпјҢжү§иЎҢзү№е®ҡзҡ„йҖ»иҫ‘иҺ·еҫ—з»“жһңгҖӮдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ

session.execute(Arrays.asList(new Object[]{routeResult,featureManager.getFreeFeatures(),accessManager,this}));
еҸҲжҲ–иҖ…пјҢжү§иЎҢе®ҢиҺ·еҫ—з»“жһңпјҡ
List<Command> cmds = new ArrayList<>();
cmds.add( CommandFactory.newInsert(routeResult,"routeResult"));        cmds.add(CommandFactory.newInsert(featureManager.getFreeFeatures(),"freeFeature"));
cmds.add(CommandFactory.newInsert(accessManager,"accessManager"));
cmds.add(CommandFactory.newInsert(this,"router"));
ExecutionResults results = statelessKieSession.execute( CommandFactory.newBatchExecution( cmds ) );

DroolsеҸӮж•°

  • salience е®ҡд№үи§„еҲҷзҡ„дјҳе…Ҳзә§пјҢж•°еӯ—и¶ҠеӨ§дјҳе…Ҳзә§и¶Ҡй«ҳпјҢй»ҳи®Ө0гҖӮеҰӮsalience 88.1
  • no-loop Drools зҡ„RHS ж”№еҸҳдәҶLHS зҡ„жқЎд»¶пјҢдјҡеҜјиҮҙиҝҷжқЎи§„еҲҷйҮҚж–°иў«еҢ№й…ҚеҺ»жү§иЎҢгҖӮдёәдәҶйҒҝе…Қdroolsи§„еҲҷзҡ„иҮӘиә«жӯ»еҫӘзҺҜпјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҠ иҝҷдёӘеҸӮж•°гҖӮдҪҝз”ЁеҰӮ: no-loop true
  • agenda-group STRINGе®ҡд№үдёҖдёӘз»„пјҢеҪ“иҝҷдёӘз»„иў«setFocusзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢдјҡе°Ҷж•ҙдёӘз»„еҺӢе…Ҙж ҲдёӯгҖӮжү§иЎҢзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷд»Һж ҲдёӯеҸ–гҖӮдҪҝз”ЁеҰӮпјҡagenda-group вҖңRoute-AgeRangeвҖқгҖӮйҷӨдәҶеҸҜд»ҘеңЁjavaд»Јз ҒдёӯеҒҡиҝҷдёӘеҠЁдҪңпјҢиҝҳеҸҜд»ҘеңЁRHSдёӯеҒҡпјҢеҰӮпјҡ
kcontext.getKieRuntime().getAgenda().getAgendaGroup("Route-AgeRange").setFocus();
  • lock-on-active дёҖдёӘз»„йҮҢзҡ„еӨҡжқЎи§„еҲҷйғҪеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҫзҪ®иҝҷдёӘж Үеҝ—пјҢеҪ“жҹҗжқЎи§„еҲҷдҝ®ж”№дәҶfactпјҢдёҚдјҡеј•иө·е…¶д»–и§„еҲҷйҮҚж–°и§ҰеҸ‘гҖӮйңҖиҰҒи·ҹgroupй…ҚеҗҲдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮпјҲзҪ‘дёҠеҫҲеӨҡдәәйғҪеҜ№иҝҷдёӘеұһжҖ§зҗҶи§ЈжңүиҜҜпјүиҜҰжғ…д»”з»Ҷз ”иҜ»е®ҳж–№иҜҙжҳҺпјҡ
Whenever a ruleflow-group becomes active or an agenda-group receives the focus, any rule within that group that has lock-on-active set to true will not be activated any more; irrespective of the origin of the update, the activation of a matching rule is discarded. This is a stronger version of no-loop, because the change could now be caused not only by the rule itself. ItвҖҷs ideal for calculation rules where you have a number of rules that modify a fact and you donвҖҷt want any rule re-matching and firing again. Only when the ruleflow-group is no longer active or the agenda-group loses the focus those rules with lock-on-active set to true become eligible again for their activations to be placed onto the agenda.

  • е®ҸеҮҪж•° insertгҖҒupdateгҖҒretract йғҪеҸҜд»ҘеҜ№factиҝӣиЎҢж“ҚдҪңпјҢиҝҷдәӣеҠЁдҪңжңүеҸҜиғҪеҜјиҮҙruleзҡ„йҮҚж–°еҢ№й…Қ

  • import static еҜје…ҘжҹҗдёӘjavaзұ»зҡ„ж–№жі•

ps.еҸҜиғҪжҳҜdroolsиҝҷзҺ©ж„Ҹе„ҝжҜ”иҫғз№ҒзҗҗпјҢжүҖд»Ҙе®ҳзҪ‘ж–ҮжЎЈзҒ°еёёеҶ—й•ҝпјҢеҫҲеӨҡеқ‘йғҪиҰҒиҮӘе·ұеҶҷdemo ж…ўж…ўиё©гҖӮ

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷпјҡ
[1] https://docs.jboss.org/drools/release/7.3.0.Final/drools-docs/html_single/index.html
[2] https://geosmart.github.io/2016/08/22/Drools%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E7%AC%94%E8%AE%B0/

entry.title: Azkaban жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗе’ҢжҸ’д»¶е®һзҺ°
entry.content:
Azkabanз®Җд»Ӣ

Azkaban was implemented at LinkedIn to solve the problem of Hadoop job dependencies. We had jobs that needed to run in order, from ETL jobs to data analytics products.
Initially a single server solution, with the increased number of Hadoop users over the years, Azkaban has evolved to be a more robust solution.

Azkaban жҳҜз”ұLinkedlnе…¬еҸёдёәдәҶи§ЈеҶіhadoop дҪңдёҡд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„дҫқиө–иҖҢе®һзҺ°зҡ„гҖӮеӣ дёәжңүдёҖдәӣETLдҪңдёҡд»ҘеҸҠж•°жҚ®еҲҶжһҗдә§е“ҒйңҖиҰҒжҢүз…§дёҖе®ҡзҡ„йЎәеәҸеҺ»жү§иЎҢгҖӮ
йҡҸзқҖhadoopз”ЁжҲ·зҡ„йҖҗе№ҙеўһеҠ пјҢAzkabanд»ҺдёҖдёӘз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„жңҚеҠЎи§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲеҸ‘еұ•жҲҗдёәдёҖдёӘжӣҙеҠ еҒҘеЈ®йІҒжЈ’зҡ„ж–№жЎҲгҖӮ

azkabanжһ¶жһ„еҲҶжһҗ

 Azkabanзҡ„зі»з»ҹжһ¶жһ„йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•дё»иҰҒз”ұдёүдёӘз»„д»¶з»„жҲҗпјҡ

  • WebServer пјҡжҸҗдҫӣAPIпјҢжҸҗдҫӣеҲҶеҸ‘дҪңдёҡгҖҒи°ғеәҰдҪңдёҡе’Ңзӣ‘жҺ§жҠҘиӯҰзӯүеҠҹиғҪпјӣ
  • Executor пјҡеҜ№WebServer жҡҙйңІ API пјҢжҸҗдҫӣжү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡзҡ„еҠҹиғҪпјҢж”ҜжҢҒдҪңдёҡжҸ’д»¶пјӣ
  • MySQL пјҡж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁпјҢе®һзҺ°Web е’Ң Execд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„ж•°жҚ®е…ұдә«е’ҢйғЁеҲҶзҠ¶жҖҒзҡ„еҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ

Azkaban WebServer

 еҜ№azkaban WebServerзҡ„еҗ„дёӘеҠҹиғҪиҜҰз»Ҷд»Ӣз»ҚеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

жҸҗдҫӣAPIи°ғз”Ё

 еңЁazkaban-webserverе·ҘзЁӢдёӯпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙйқһеёёжё…жҷ°ең°зңӢеҲ°еҜ№еӨ–жҡҙйңІзҡ„ServletпјҢе…¶дёӯжңҖдё»иҰҒзҡ„еҮ дёӘжҳҜпјҡ

  • ExecutorServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣз«ӢеҚіжү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡгҖҒеҸ–ж¶ҲдҪңдёҡжөҒгҖҒжҡӮеҒңдҪңдёҡжөҒгҖҒиҺ·еҸ–жөҒжҲ–иҠӮзӮ№ж—Ҙеҝ—зӯүжҺҘеҸЈ
  • ScheduleServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣи®ҫзҪ®и°ғеәҰгҖҒи®ҫзҪ®SlaжҠҘиӯҰи§„еҲҷгҖҒиҺ·еҸ–и°ғеәҰдҝЎжҒҜзӯүжҺҘеҸЈ
  • HistoryServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣжҹҘзңӢдҪңдёҡжөҒжү§иЎҢеҺҶеҸІзҡ„жҺҘеҸЈ
  • ProjectManagerServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣдёҠдј йЎ№зӣ®zipеҢ…гҖҒдёӢиҪҪйЎ№зӣ®zipеҢ…гҖҒеҲ йҷӨйЎ№зӣ®гҖҒиҺ·еҸ–жөҒзҡ„DAGзӯүжҺҘеҸЈ

    еҲҶеҸ‘дҪңдёҡ

 ExecutorManager дё»иҰҒжүҝжӢ…иҝҷйғЁеҲҶзҡ„еҠҹиғҪпјҢжүҖжңүзұ»еһӢзҡ„дҪңдёҡпјҲеҢ…жӢ¬з«ӢеҚіжү§иЎҢе’Ңи°ғеәҰжү§иЎҢпјү,йғҪдјҡйҖҡиҝҮsubmitExecutableFlow(ExecutableFlow exflow, String userId)иҝҷдёӘж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢжҸҗдәӨгҖӮ

 еңЁиҜҘж–№жі•дёӯпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҡеҰӮжһңжҳҜеӨҡжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢе…Ҳж”ҫиҝӣеҲҶеҸ‘йҳҹеҲ—дёӯпјҢз„¶еҗҺйҖҡиҝҮзәҝзЁӢе®ҡж—¶еҸ–еҮәе®һдҫӢпјҲprocessQueuedFlowsпјүпјҢйҖүжӢ©жҹҗдёӘжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№д№ӢеҗҺпјҢеҶҚйҖҡиҝҮdispatchж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢжү§иЎҢеҲҶеҸ‘пјҲselectExecutorAndDispatchFlowпјүпјӣеҰӮжһңжҳҜеҚ•жү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢе°ұз«ӢеҚіи°ғз”Ёdispatchж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢеҲҶеҸ‘гҖӮз”ҹдә§зҺҜеўғдёҖиҲ¬йҮҮз”ЁеӨҡиҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸгҖӮж ёеҝғд»Јз ҒеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

if (isMultiExecutorMode()) {   //еӨҡиҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸпјҢж”ҫиҝӣйҳҹеҲ—пјҢзӯүеҫ…зәҝзЁӢиҪ®иҜў
    //Take MultiExecutor route
    executorLoader.addActiveExecutableReference(reference);
    queuedFlows.enqueue(exflow, reference);
} else {                       //еҚ•иҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸпјҢзӣҙжҺҘи°ғз”Ёdispatchж–№жі•жү§иЎҢ
    // assign only local executor we have
    Executor choosenExecutor = activeExecutors.iterator().next();
    executorLoader.addActiveExecutableReference(reference);
    try {
        dispatch(reference, exflow, choosenExecutor);
    } catch (ExecutorManagerException e) {
        executorLoader.removeActiveExecutableReference(reference.getExecId());
            throw e;
    }
}

 д»ҺдёҠиҫ№зңӢеҲ°жү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢйғҪз»ҸиҝҮдәҶdispatchж–№жі•гҖӮеӣ дёәWeb е’ҢExecд№Ӣй—ҙжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮmysqlиҝӣиЎҢж•°жҚ®е…ұдә«зҡ„пјҢеӨ§йғЁеҲҶзҡ„ж•°жҚ®йғҪеңЁdispatchд№ӢеүҚйў„е…ҲеҶҷиҝӣдәҶmysqlгҖӮжүҖд»ҘdispatchиҝӣиЎҢдҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘зҡ„йҖ»иҫ‘йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҢе°ұжҳҜз®ҖеҚ•ең°йҖҡиҝҮHTTPиҜ·жұӮдј йҖ’е®һдҫӢзҡ„execIdзӯүдҝЎжҒҜпјҢе…¶дҪҷжүҖйңҖиҰҒзҡ„ж•°жҚ®йғҪйҖҡиҝҮж•°жҚ®еә“иҜ»еҶҷе®ҢжҲҗдј йҖ’гҖӮ

и°ғеәҰдҪңдёҡ

 и°ғеәҰдҪңдёҡжҳҜи°ғеәҰзі»з»ҹзҡ„жңҖйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„еҠҹиғҪд№ӢдёҖпјҢд№ҹжҳҜAzkabanйҮҢзӣёеҜ№еӨҚжқӮзҡ„дёҖдёӘжЁЎеқ—гҖӮи°ғеәҰжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮScheduleManagerеҜ№еӨ–жҡҙйңІпјҢеҜ№еә”зқҖзҡ„з»“жһ„жҳҜScheduleпјӣеҜ№еҶ…жҳҜйҖҡиҝҮTriggerManagerжқҘе®һзҺ°пјҢеҜ№еә”зқҖзҡ„з»“жһ„жҳҜTriggerгҖӮ

 жүҖжңүзҡ„и°ғеәҰдҝЎжҒҜйғҪйҖҡиҝҮScheduleManager.scheduleFlowдј е…Ҙ,еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°дј е…ҘеҸӮж•°еҢ…еҗ«дәҶйЎ№зӣ®idгҖҒйЎ№зӣ®еҗҚеӯ—гҖҒжөҒеҗҚеӯ—гҖҒз¬¬дёҖж¬Ўи°ғеәҰж—¶й—ҙжҲігҖҒж—¶еҢәгҖҒи°ғеәҰе‘ЁжңҹгҖҒдёӢдёҖж¬Ўжү§иЎҢж—¶й—ҙгҖҒжҸҗдәӨж—¶й—ҙгҖҒжҸҗдәӨдәәгҖӮеҜ№дәҺдёҖдёӘи°ғеәҰжқҘиҜҙпјҢжңҖе…ій”®зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜж— йқһжҳҜз¬¬дёҖж¬Ўи°ғеәҰж—¶й—ҙе’Ңи°ғеәҰе‘ЁжңҹгҖӮ

public Schedule scheduleFlow(final int scheduleId, final int projectId,
      final String projectName, final String flowName, final String status,
      final long firstSchedTime, final DateTimeZone timezone,
      final ReadablePeriod period, final long lastModifyTime,
      final long nextExecTime, final long submitTime, final String submitUser)

 д»ҺscheduleFlow еҫҖдёӢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°и°ғз”ЁдәҶTriggerBasedScheduleLoader.insertScheduleгҖӮиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•йҮҢиҫ№е…ҲжҳҜе°ҶScheduleиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗдәҶTriggerпјҢз„¶еҗҺе°ҶTriggerж”ҫеҲ°дәҶTriggerManagerйҮҢиҫ№гҖӮscheduleToTriggerж–№жі•еҶҷзҡ„йқһеёёз®ҖжҙҒе·§еҰҷпјҢиҜ»иҖ…еҸҜиҮӘиЎҢйүҙиөҸпјҢжӯӨеӨ„дёҚдҪңз»ҶиҮҙеҲҶжһҗгҖӮ

 @Override
  public void insertSchedule(Schedule s) throws ScheduleManagerException {
    Trigger t = scheduleToTrigger(s);
    try {
      triggerManager.insertTrigger(t, t.getSubmitUser());
      s.setScheduleId(t.getTriggerId());
    } catch (TriggerManagerException e) {
      throw new ScheduleManagerException("Failed to insert new schedule!", e);
    }
  }

 жҲ‘д»¬еңЁз»§з»ӯзңӢзңӢTriggerиў«еЎһеҲ°TriggerManagerеҒҡдәҶдәӣе•ҘгҖӮд»ҺдёӢиҫ№еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢе…ҲжҳҜи°ғз”ЁtriggerLoaderеҶҷиҝӣж•°жҚ®еә“пјҢз„¶еҗҺе°ұж”ҫеҲ°дәҶдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢrunnerThreadдёӯеҺ»иҪ®иҜўдәҶгҖӮ

public void insertTrigger(Trigger t) throws TriggerManagerException {
    synchronized (syncObj) {
      try {
        triggerLoader.addTrigger(t);
      } catch (TriggerLoaderException e) {
        throw new TriggerManagerException(e);
      }
      runnerThread.addTrigger(t);
      triggerIdMap.put(t.getTriggerId(), t);
    }
  }

 жҺҘдёӢжқҘе°ұжҳҫиҖҢжҳ“и§ҒдәҶпјҢиҝҷдёӘзәҝзЁӢTriggerScannerThread runnerThread е®ҡжңҹжЈҖжҹҘTriggerжҳҜеҗҰеә”иҜҘи§ҰеҸ‘пјҲonTriggerTriggerпјүжҲ–иҖ…з»ҲжӯўпјҲonTriggerExpireпјүгҖӮ

 Triggerи§ҰеҸ‘зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷе°ұдјҡи°ғз”ЁиҮӘе·ұзҡ„action.doAction()пјҢи°ғеәҰд»»еҠЎзҡ„Triggerзҡ„actionдёҖиҲ¬йғҪжҳҜExecuteFlowActionпјҢе…¶doActionж–№жі•дё»иҰҒеҒҡдәҶдёӨдёӘдәӢжғ…пјҢз¬¬дёҖдёӘжҳҜжһ„е»әжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢExecutableFlowпјҢз¬¬дәҢдёӘжҳҜеҰӮжһңиҜҘи°ғеәҰи®ҫзҪ®дәҶжҠҘиӯҰи§„еҲҷпјҢеҲҷжһ„е»әSlaTriggerпјҢе№¶е°Ҷtriggerж”ҫиҝӣзәҝзЁӢrunnerThread йҮҢгҖӮ

 жһ„е»әжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺпјҢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°и°ғз”ЁдәҶexecutorManager.submitExecutableFlow(exflow, submitUser) иҝӣиЎҢдҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘пјҢиҝҷж ·еӯҗпјҢе°ұи·ҹдёҠж–ҮжҸҗеҲ°зҡ„дҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘ж®ҠйҖ”еҗҢеҪ’гҖӮдёӢиҫ№дёҚеҶҚеҲҶжһҗгҖӮ

WebServerжҖ»з»“

 дёӢиҫ№з”ЁдёҖеј еӣҫз®ҖеҚ•жҖ»з»“д»Јз ҒжөҒзЁӢпјҡ

Azkaban Executor

 еҜ№Azkaban Executorзҡ„еҗ„дёӘеҠҹиғҪиҜҰз»Ҷд»Ӣз»ҚеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

жҸҗдҫӣ API и°ғз”Ё

вҖғвҖғAzkaban3.0еҗҺе°ұејҖе§Ӣж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№йғЁзҪІгҖӮеҚ•дёӘжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жҜ”иҫғз®ҖеҚ•пјҢеҜ№webжҡҙйңІзҡ„APIд№ҹжҜ”иҫғе°‘пјҢдё»иҰҒжҳҜпјҡ

  • ExecutorServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣжү§иЎҢгҖҒеҸ–ж¶ҲгҖҒжҡӮеҒңгҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—жҹҘиҜўзӯүжҺҘеҸЈгҖӮ

жү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡ

 дёҠиҫ№жҸҗеҸҠеҲ°WebServerйҖҡиҝҮdispatchж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢдҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘гҖӮиҝҷйҮҢз®ҖеҚ•зңӢдёӢжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жҺҘж”¶еҲ°дҪңдёҡжү§иЎҢиҜ·жұӮд№ӢеҗҺзҡ„жөҒзЁӢжҳҜжҖҺж ·зҡ„гҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еңЁExecutorServletдёӯзңӢеҲ°жүҖжңүзҡ„жү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡиҜ·жұӮйғҪз»ҸиҝҮhandleAjaxExecuteж–№жі•пјҢиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•з®ҖеҚ•ең°е°Ҷе®һдҫӢе”ҜдёҖзҡ„execIdдј йҖ’з»ҷFlowRunnerManagerпјҡ

private void handleAjaxExecute(HttpServletRequest req,
      Map<String, Object> respMap, int execId) throws ServletException {
    try {
      flowRunnerManager.submitFlow(execId);
    } catch (ExecutorManagerException e) {
      e.printStackTrace();
      logger.error(e);
      respMap.put(RESPONSE_ERROR, e.getMessage());
    }
  }

 FlowRunnerManager йҖҡиҝҮsubmitFlowж–№жі•жҸҗдәӨе·ҘдҪңжөҒеҺ»жү§иЎҢгҖӮе…ҲжҳҜжһ„е»әжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢExecutableFlowпјҢз„¶еҗҺеҮҶеӨҮжү§иЎҢзӣ®еҪ•setupFlow(flow)пјҢз„¶еҗҺз”ҹжҲҗFlowRunnerпјҢз„¶еҗҺжҸҗдәӨеҲ°зәҝзЁӢжұ еҺ»иҝҗиЎҢexecutorService.submit(runner)гҖӮпјҲд»Јз ҒйўҮй•ҝпјҢз•ҘиҝҮпјү

 FlowRunnerжң¬иә«е®һзҺ°дәҶRunnableпјҢе…¶runж–№жі•йҮҢиҫ№и°ғз”ЁдәҶ runFlowж–№жі•пјҢrunFlowж–№жі•еҶ…е®№еҰӮдёӢгҖӮж–№жі•йҮҢжҢүз…§Flowзҡ„еұӮж¬Ўз»“жһ„д»Ҙе®ҪеәҰдјҳе…Ҳзҡ„йЎәеәҸи®ҝй—®DAGеӣҫзҡ„жҜҸдёҖдёӘjobпјҢе№¶йҖҗдёӘjobжҸҗдәӨжү§иЎҢгҖӮ

private void runFlow() throws Exception {
    logger.info("Starting flows");
    runReadyJob(this.flow);
    updateFlow();
    while (!flowFinished) {
      synchronized (mainSyncObj) {
        if (flowPaused) {
          try {
            mainSyncObj.wait(CHECK_WAIT_MS);
          } catch (InterruptedException e) {
          }
          continue;
        } else {
          if (retryFailedJobs) {
            retryAllFailures();
          } else if (!progressGraph()) {
            try {
              mainSyncObj.wait(CHECK_WAIT_MS);
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
    executorService.shutdown();
    updateFlow();
    logger.info("Finished Flow");
  }

 еҜ№дәҺеҚ•дёӘjobпјҢжңҖеҗҺжһ„йҖ дёҖдёӘJobRunnerеҺ»жү§иЎҢжү§иЎҢиҝҷдёӘдҪңдёҡпјҢжҜҸдёӘJobRunnerд№ҹжҳҜе®һзҺ°дәҶRunnableгҖӮ

 private JobRunner createJobRunner(ExecutableNode node) {
    File path = new File(execDir, node.getJobSource());

    JobRunner jobRunner =
        new JobRunner(node, path.getParentFile(), executorLoader,
            jobtypeManager);
    if (watcher != null) {
      jobRunner.setPipeline(watcher, pipelineLevel);
    }
    if (validateUserProxy) {
      jobRunner.setValidatedProxyUsers(proxyUsers);
    }

    jobRunner.setDelayStart(node.getDelayedExecution());
    jobRunner.setLogSettings(logger, jobLogFileSize, jobLogNumFiles);
    jobRunner.addListener(listener);

    if (JobCallbackManager.isInitialized()) {
      jobRunner.addListener(JobCallbackManager.getInstance());
    }
    configureJobLevelMetrics(jobRunner);
    return jobRunner;
  }

 жҜҸдёӘjobRunnerеңЁжү§иЎҢзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢйғҪеҺ»жҸ’д»¶жЁЎеқ—йҮҢиҫ№еҜ»жүҫеҜ№еә”зҡ„жҸ’д»¶жқҘиҝӣиЎҢjobзҡ„зұ»еһӢеҠ иҪҪгҖӮжҜҸз§Қjobзұ»еһӢйғҪжңүеҜ№еә”зҡ„runж–№жі•гҖӮжүҖжңүе°ұжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮеҸҚе°„еҺ»и°ғз”Ёеҗ„дёӘжҸ’д»¶зұ»зҡ„runж–№жі•еҺ»жү§иЎҢеҗ„дёӘjobгҖӮAzkabanзҡ„жҸ’д»¶зұ»еһӢеҢ…жӢ¬й»ҳи®Өзұ»еһӢпјҲscriptгҖҒpythonгҖҒjavaгҖҒcmd зӯүпјүд»ҘеҸҠazkaban-pluginйЎ№зӣ®дёӢзҡ„дёҖдәӣиҮӘе®ҡд№үзұ»еһӢпјҲhiveгҖҒmrгҖҒsparkзӯүпјүгҖӮдёӢдёҖдёӘз« иҠӮдјҡиҜҰз»Ҷд»Ӣз»ҚжҸ’д»¶зҡ„е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶгҖӮ

 try {
        job = jobtypeManager.buildJobExecutor(this.jobId, props, logger);
      } catch (JobTypeManagerException e) {
        logger.error("Failed to build job type", e);
        return false;
      }

Azkaban Plugin

жҸ’д»¶жңәеҲ¶зҡ„е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

 Azkabanзҡ„жҸ’д»¶жңәеҲ¶дҪҝеҫ—еҸҜд»Ҙжү§иЎҢеҗ„з§ҚеӨҚжқӮзұ»еһӢзҡ„дҪңдёҡпјҢе№¶дё”е®һзҺ°дәҶи°ғеәҰеҠҹиғҪе’ҢдҪңдёҡзұ»еһӢзҡ„жқҫиҖҰеҗҲгҖӮдҫӢеҰӮ пјҢеҜ№дәҺMRзұ»еһӢе’ҢSparkзұ»еһӢзҡ„жҸ’д»¶пјҢзұ»з»§жүҝе…ізі»еӣҫеҰӮдёӢгҖӮ

 жҜҸз§ҚжҸ’д»¶дҪңдёҡйғҪдјҡеҚ•зӢ¬иө·дёҖдёӘиҝӣзЁӢеҺ»жү§иЎҢгҖӮе…¶дёӯProcessJobдё»иҰҒиҒҢиғҪе°ұжҳҜж–°е»әиҝӣзЁӢ,е№¶жү§иЎҢжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„е‘Ҫд»ӨcommandпјӣJavaProcessJobз»§жүҝиҮӘе®ғпјҢдё”е°Ҷcommandе‘Ҫд»Өзү№еҢ–дёә javaпјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜж–°е»әдёҖдёӘjavaиҝӣзЁӢпјӣе…¶д»–зҡ„hadoopжҸ’д»¶еҸҲеҗ„иҮӘз»§жүҝиҮӘJavaProcessJobгҖӮ
 еҰӮжһңиҰҒиҮӘе·ұе®һзҺ°жҸ’д»¶зұ»пјҢеҸӘиҰҒз»§жүҝJavaProcessJobзұ»пјҢе№¶еңЁжҸ’д»¶зұ»зҡ„runж–№жі•йҮҢпјҢжҢҮе®ҡж–°е»әзҡ„javaиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„дё»зұ»зӯүдҝЎжҒҜпјҢеҚіеҸҜгҖӮ

еҹәдәҺHiveServer2зҡ„AzkabanжҸ’д»¶зҡ„е®һзҺ°жҖқи·Ҝ

 дәҶи§ЈдәҶжҸ’д»¶жңәеҲ¶зҡ„е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶеҗҺпјҢжҲ‘д»¬е°қиҜ•е®һзҺ°дёҖдёӘеҹәдәҺHiveServer2зҡ„AzkabanжҸ’д»¶гҖӮ

HiveServer & HiveSever2

 е…ҲжқҘд»Ӣз»ҚHiveServerпјҢеҺҹеҗҚжҳҜThrift serverгҖӮHiveServer жҳҜдёҖдёӘжңҚеҠЎз«ҜпјҢе…Ғи®ёиҝңзЁӢе®ўжҲ·з«ҜйҖҡиҝҮиҜ·жұӮжҸҗдәӨhiveдҪңдёҡжҲ–иҖ…иҺ·еҸ–дҪңдёҡз»“жһңгҖӮHiveSeverжҳҜеҹәдәҺThriftжЎҶжһ¶е®һзҺ°зҡ„пјҢдҪҶеҗҺжқҘзҡ„HiveServer2д№ҹжҳҜеҹәдәҺThriftжЎҶжһ¶пјҢжүҖд»Ҙе‘ҪеҗҚдёҠд»ҺThrift ServerжӣҙеҗҚдёәHiveServer.
 HiveServer2иҰҒжҜ”HiveSeverжӣҙеҠ дјҳз§ҖпјҢж”ҜжҢҒй«ҳе№¶еҸ‘е’Ңе®үе…Ёи®ӨиҜҒгҖӮHiveServerе·Із»ҸдёҚиў«жҺЁиҚҗдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ
 д»”з»Ҷз ”з©¶Azkabanзҡ„HiveжҸ’д»¶зҡ„д»Јз ҒпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘзҹҘйҒ“пјҢAzkabanжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮHive ClientжқҘжҸҗдәӨHiveдҪңдёҡзҡ„пјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜдёӢеӣҫдёӯзҡ„CLIж–№ејҸгҖӮиҝҷз§Қж–№ејҸзҡ„й—®йўҳиҝҳжҳҜжҢәеӨҡзҡ„пјҢз”ұдәҺзӣҙжҺҘз»•иҝҮдәҶHiveServer2пјҢжүҖд»ҘдёҚж”ҜжҢҒй«ҳе№¶еҸ‘е’Ңз»ҶзІ’еәҰзҡ„жқғйҷҗжҺ§еҲ¶зӯүпјҢеӯҳеңЁеҫҲеӨҡйҡҗжӮЈгҖӮ
