}

е…·дҪ“е®һзҺ°

 жңүдәҶдёҠиҝ°зҡ„еҹәзЎҖпјҢеҹәдәҺHiveServer2зҡ„AzkabanжҸ’д»¶зҡ„е®һзҺ°е°ұжё…жҷ°дәҶгҖӮ

  • е®һзҺ°з»§жүҝJavaProcessJobзҡ„HadoopHiveJobзұ»пјҢе®һзҺ°runж–№жі•пјҢе№¶жҢҮе®ҡж–°е»әзҡ„JavaиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„дё»зұ»,еҰӮдёӢгҖӮ
public static final String HADOOP_SECURE_HIVE_WRAPPER = "azkaban.jobtype.HadoopSecureHiveWrapper";
//жӯӨеӨ„зңҒз•ҘNиЎҢ

 @Override
  protected String getJavaClass() {
    if (jobProps.containsKey(JAVA_CLASS)) return jobProps.get(JAVA_CLASS);
    if (hasKeytab && !shouldProxy) { 
      return HadoopSecureHiveWrapper2.class.getName();
    }
    return HADOOP_SECURE_HIVE_WRAPPER;
  }
  • е®һзҺ°HadoopSecureHiveWrapper зұ»пјҢзұ»зҡ„еҠҹиғҪе°ұжҳҜж–°е»әдёҖдёӘJDBCй“ҫжҺҘпјҢжү§иЎҢsqlпјҢе№¶дё”ејӮжӯҘиҪ®иҜўиҜўй—®ж—Ҙеҝ—гҖӮд»Јз ҒжҜ”иҫғз®ҖеҚ•еҶ—й•ҝпјҢиҝҷйҮҢе°ұдёҚиҙҙдәҶгҖӮ

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷ

[1]https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/Hive/HiveServer2+Overview
[2]https://hive.apache.org/
[3]https://github.com/azkaban/azkaban-plugins
[4]AZејҖеҸ‘ж–ҮжЎЈпјҡhttp://azkaban.github.io/azkaban/docs/latest/#overview
[5]ејәеӯҗе“Ҙзҡ„жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗпјҡhttps://my.oschina.net/qiangzigege/blog/653198
[6]azkabanжәҗз Ғпјҡ git clone https://github.com/azkaban/azkaban.git

entry.title: GradleиҮӘе®ҡд№үжү“еҢ…йЎ№зӣ®tarеҢ…
entry.content:
gradle иҮӘе®ҡд№үжү“еҢ…йЎ№зӣ®tarеҢ…

жң¬ж–Үдё»иҰҒжҳҜжғід»Ӣз»ҚеҰӮдҪ•дҪҝз”Ёgradleз®ЎзҗҶjavaйЎ№зӣ®пјҢе№¶е®һзҺ°иҮӘе®ҡд№үжү“еҢ…йғЁзҪІtarеҢ…зҡ„е®Ңж•ҙиҝҮзЁӢгҖӮдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„жү“еҢ…йЎ№зӣ®жҳҜдёҖдёӘspringboot йЎ№зӣ®пјҢе…¶д»–java йЎ№зӣ®еҗҢзҗҶйҖӮз”ЁгҖӮ

е…ҲжқҘзңӢдёӢиҝҷдёӘspring bootйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„зӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„пјҡ

.
|-- build.gradle
|-- gradle
|   `-- wrapper
|       `-- gradle-wrapper.properties
|-- gradlew
|-- gradlew.bat
`-- src
    |-- main
    |   |-- java   
    |   `-- resources
    |       |-- bin
    |       |   |-- start.sh
    |       |   `-- stop.sh
    |       |-- dev
    |       |   |-- application.properties
    |       |   `-- log4j.properties
    |       |-- online
    |       |   |-- application.properties
    |       |   `-- log4j.properties
    `-- test

еҰӮдёҠжҳҜдёҖдёӘе…ёеһӢзҡ„JavaйЎ№зӣ®пјҢжңүжәҗз Ғзӣ®еҪ•src/main/java пјҢжңүиө„жәҗзӣ®еҪ• src/main/resourcesпјҢиө„жәҗдёӢжңүи„ҡжң¬зӣ®еҪ•binпјҢд»ҘеҸҠеӨҡдёӘзҺҜеўғзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶пјҲdev && onlineпјүпјҢйҷӨеӨ–иҝҳжңүtest жЁЎеқ—гҖӮ

дёӢиҫ№й’ҲеҜ№иҝҷд№ҲдёҖдёӘйЎ№зӣ®пјҢеҰӮдҪ•зј–еҶҷbuild.gradle ж–Үд»¶пјҢд»ҺиҖҢе®һзҺ°иҮӘе®ҡд№үжү“еҢ…йғЁзҪІtarеҢ…гҖӮtarеҢ…и§ЈеҺӢеҗҺжңҹжңӣзҡ„зӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

.
|-- bin
|   |-- start.sh
|   `-- stop.sh
|-- conf
|   |-- application.properties
|   `-- log4j.properties
|-- currentpid
|-- lib
`-- logs
    `-- console.log

зӣҙжҺҘеҜ№з…§ жҲҗеһӢзҡ„ build.gradle иҝӣиЎҢи®Іи§Ј:

buildscript {
    ext {
        springBootVersion = '1.5.6.RELEASE'
    }
    repositories {     // жҢҮе®ҡд»“еә“
        mavenLocal()       
        jcenter()
    }
    dependencies {
        classpath("org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-gradle-plugin:${springBootVersion}")
    }
}

// еЈ°жҳҺдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„жҸ’д»¶
apply plugin: 'java'
apply plugin: 'eclipse'
apply plugin: 'org.springframework.boot'
apply plugin: 'distribution'   //жү“еҢ…tarеҢ…з”ЁеҲ°зҡ„жҸ’д»¶

version = '0.0.1-SNAPSHOT'
sourceCompatibility = 1.7    //JDKзүҲжң¬

repositories {
    mavenCentral()
}

// жҢҮе®ҡйЎ№зӣ®зҡ„з»“жһ„
sourceSets {
    main {
        java {
            srcDirs 'src/main/java'
        }
    }
}
//еҲӨж–ӯ buildе‘Ҫд»ӨжҳҜеҗҰжҢҮе®ҡеұһжҖ§ profileгҖӮ
//дҫӢеҰӮ gradle buildTar -xtest -Pprofile=online

ext {
    if (project.hasProperty('profile')) {
        profile = project['profile']
    } else {
        profile = "dev"
    }
    println "profile:" + profile
}
// task з”ЁжқҘж–°е»әдёҖдәӣзӣ®еҪ•пјҢзӣ®еҪ•дҪҚдәҺbuild/packageдёӢ
task createDirs() << {
    file('build/package/lib').mkdirs()
    file('build/package/bin').mkdirs()
    file('build/package/logs').mkdirs()
    file('build/package/conf').mkdirs()
}
//task з”ЁжқҘеӨҚеҲ¶buildеҮәжқҘзҡ„дё»jarеҢ…
task copyLibs(type: Copy) {
    from('build/libs')
    into('build/package/lib')
}
//task з”ЁжқҘеӨҚеҲ¶й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶
task copyConf(type: Copy) {
    println 'copy conf from src/main/resources/'+profile
    from('src/main/resources/'+profile)
    into('build/package/conf')
}
//task з”ЁжқҘеӨҚеҲ¶binдёӢзҡ„и„ҡжң¬гҖӮиҝҷйҮҢзҡ„fileModeе№¶жІЎжңүз”ҹж•ҲпјҢеҺҹеӣ дёҚиҜҰ
task copyBin(type: Copy) {
    from('src/main/resources/bin')
    into('build/package/bin')
    fileMode 0744
}
// task з”ЁжқҘеӨҚеҲ¶еҗҜеҠЁжүҖдҫқиө–зҡ„jarеҢ…
task copyDep(type: Copy) {
    from configurations.runtime
    into 'build/package/lib'
}
//жҠҠдёҠиҝ°зҡ„taskдёІиҒ”иө·жқҘ
task prepareFile(dependsOn: [
        'createDirs',
        'copyLibs',
        'copyConf',
        'copyBin',
        'copyDep'
]){}
//жҢҮе®ҡжү“еҢ…зҡ„tarеҢ…зҡ„еҗҚеӯ—пјҢд»ҘеҸҠж–Үд»¶жқҘжәҗзӣ®еҪ•
distributions {
    monitor {
        baseName = 'azkaban-monitor'
        contents {
            from { 'build/package' }
        }
    }

}
//йЎ№зӣ®жүҖдҫқиө–зҡ„jarеҢ…
dependencies {
    compile('org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-web')
    compile('org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-devtools')
    compile('org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-configuration-processor')
    compile('org.springframework.data:spring-data-jpa')
    compile('org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-data-jpa')
    compile group: 'log4j', name: 'log4j', version: '1.2.17'
    compile group: 'org.slf4j', name: 'slf4j-api', version: '1.7.21'
    compile group: 'org.apache.httpcomponents', name: 'httpcore', version: '4.3.1'
    compile group: 'org.apache.httpcomponents', name: 'httpclient', version: '4.3.1'
    compile group: 'commons-configuration', name: 'commons-configuration', version: '1.8'
    compile group: 'net.sf.jopt-simple', name: 'jopt-simple', version: '4.9'
    compile group: 'mysql', name: 'mysql-connector-java', version: '5.1.41'
    compile group: 'org.apache.commons', name: 'commons-jexl', version: '2.1.1'
    compile group: 'org.mybatis.spring.boot', name: 'mybatis-spring-boot-starter', version: '1.3.0'
    compile group: 'org.apache.curator', name: 'curator-recipes', version: '4.0.0'
    compile group: 'com.alibaba', name: 'fastjson', version: '1.2.33'

    testCompile('org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-test')
}

//distribution жҸ’д»¶зҡ„зү№жҖ§пјҢд»ҘDistTarз»“е°ҫ
monitorDistTar.dependsOn  'prepareFile'
monitorDistTar.compression = Compression.GZIP
monitorDistTar.extension = 'tar.gz'

//е®ҡд№үдёҖдёӘtaskпјҢе…Ҳbuild з„¶еҗҺеҶҚжү“еҢ…tarеҢ…
task buildTar(dependsOn: [
        'build',
        monitorDistTar
]){}

entry.title: Java зәҝзЁӢжұ иҜҰи§Ј
entry.content:
Java зәҝзЁӢжұ 

Java зәҝзЁӢжұ жЁЎеһӢзҡ„е…ій”®еҮ дёӘзұ»е’ҢжҺҘеҸЈеҢ…жӢ¬пјҡExecutorпјҢExecutorsпјҢExecutorServiceпјҢThreadPoolExecutorпјҢFutureпјҢCallable

ExecutorService жҺҘеҸЈ

   жүҖжңүзҡ„зәҝзЁӢжұ е®һзҺ°зұ»йғҪз»§жүҝдәҺExecutorService жҺҘеҸЈпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬ThreadPoolExecutorгҖӮеңЁдҪҝз”ЁзәҝзЁӢжұ зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢе…¶е®һд№ҹжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮиҝҷдёӘжҺҘеҸЈеҠЁжҖҒз»‘е®ҡеҗ„дёӘзәҝзЁӢжұ е®һдҫӢиҝӣиЎҢи°ғз”ЁпјҢеёёз”Ёзҡ„жҺҘеҸЈж–№жі•еҢ…жӢ¬пјҡ

void execute(Runnable command);
<T> Future<T> submit(Callable<T> task);
void shutdown();
boolean awaitTermination(long timeout, TimeUnit unit)

ThreadPoolExecutor

иҝҷдёӘзұ»жҳҜеҗ„з§ҚзәҝзЁӢжұ зұ»зҡ„зҲёзҲёжҲ–е№ІзҲ№,жүҖжңүзҡ„еёёи§Ғзҡ„зәҝзЁӢжұ зұ»йғҪжҳҜд»Һд»–жҙҫз”ҹеҮәжқҘгҖӮжҖҺд№Ҳжҙҫз”ҹзҡ„е‘ўпјҹжҲ‘д»¬жқҘзңӢдёӢд»–зҡ„жһ„йҖ ж–№жі•пјҡ

public ThreadPoolExecutor(int corePoolSize,
                              int maximumPoolSize,
                              long keepAliveTime,
                              TimeUnit unit,
                              BlockingQueue<Runnable> workQueue)

иҝҷйҮҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸӘзңӢиҝҷдёӘдә”дёӘеҸӮж•°зҡ„жһ„йҖ ж–№жі•пјҲиҝҳжңүдёӘ6еҸӮж•°ж–№жі•пјүпјҡ

corePoolSize ж ёеҝғзәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸпјҢеҢ…еҗ«з©әй—ІзәҝзЁӢ
maximumPoolSize жңҖеӨ§зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸ
keepAliveTime з©әй—Ізҡ„зәҝзЁӢеӯҳжҙ»ж—¶й—ҙ
unit ж—¶й—ҙеҚ•дҪҚ
workQueue зәҝзЁӢзј“еӯҳйҳҹеҲ—пјҢд»…дҝқеӯҳ executeж–№жі•жҸҗдәӨзҡ„зәҝзЁӢ

иҜҰз»Ҷзҡ„еҗ«д№үзӣҙжҺҘж‘ҳжҠ„еҲ«дәәзҡ„жҖ»з»“пјҡж №жҚ® ThreadPoolExecutor жәҗз ҒеүҚйқўеӨ§ж®өзҡ„жіЁйҮҠпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҮәпјҢеҪ“иҜ•еӣҫйҖҡиҝҮ excute ж–№жі•и®ІдёҖдёӘ Runnable д»»еҠЎж·»еҠ еҲ°зәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯж—¶пјҢжҢүз…§еҰӮдёӢйЎәеәҸжқҘеӨ„зҗҶпјҡ

еҰӮжһңзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸе°‘дәҺ corePoolSizeпјҢеҚідҪҝзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯжңүз©әй—ІзәҝзЁӢпјҢд№ҹдјҡеҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„зәҝзЁӢжқҘжү§иЎҢж–°ж·»еҠ зҡ„д»»еҠЎпјӣ

еҰӮжһңзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸеӨ§дәҺзӯүдәҺ corePoolSizeпјҢдҪҶзј“еҶІйҳҹеҲ— workQueue жңӘж»ЎпјҢеҲҷе°Ҷж–°ж·»еҠ зҡ„д»»еҠЎж”ҫеҲ° workQueue дёӯпјҢжҢүз…§ FIFO зҡ„еҺҹеҲҷдҫқж¬Ўзӯүеҫ…жү§иЎҢпјҲзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯжңүзәҝзЁӢз©әй—ІеҮәжқҘеҗҺдҫқж¬Ўе°Ҷзј“еҶІйҳҹеҲ—дёӯзҡ„д»»еҠЎдәӨд»ҳз»ҷз©әй—Ізҡ„зәҝзЁӢжү§иЎҢпјүпјӣ

еҰӮжһңзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸеӨ§дәҺзӯүдәҺ corePoolSizeпјҢдё”зј“еҶІйҳҹеҲ— workQueue е·Іж»ЎпјҢдҪҶзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸе°ҸдәҺ maximumPoolSizeпјҢеҲҷдјҡеҲӣе»әж–°зҡ„зәҝзЁӢжқҘеӨ„зҗҶиў«ж·»еҠ зҡ„д»»еҠЎпјӣ

еҰӮжһңзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸзӯүдәҺдәҶ maximumPoolSizeпјҢжңү 4 з§ҚжүҚеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҲиҜҘжһ„йҖ ж–№жі•и°ғз”ЁдәҶеҗ«жңү 6 дёӘеҸӮж•°зҡ„жһ„йҖ ж–№жі•пјҢе№¶е°ҶжңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘжһ„йҖ ж–№жі•дёә RejectedExecutionHandler зұ»еһӢпјҢе®ғеңЁеӨ„зҗҶзәҝзЁӢжәўеҮәж—¶жңү 4 з§Қж–№ејҸпјҢиҝҷйҮҢдёҚеҶҚз»ҶиҜҙпјҢиҰҒдәҶи§Јзҡ„пјҢиҮӘе·ұеҸҜд»Ҙйҳ…иҜ»дёӢжәҗз ҒпјүгҖӮ

жҖ»з»“иө·жқҘпјҢд№ҹеҚіжҳҜиҜҙпјҢеҪ“жңүж–°зҡ„д»»еҠЎиҰҒеӨ„зҗҶж—¶пјҢе…ҲзңӢзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸжҳҜеҗҰеӨ§дәҺ corePoolSizeпјҢеҶҚзңӢзј“еҶІйҳҹеҲ— workQueue жҳҜеҗҰж»ЎпјҢжңҖеҗҺзңӢзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸжҳҜеҗҰеӨ§дәҺ maximumPoolSizeгҖӮ

Executors

ExecutorsжҳҜдёҖдёӘе·ҘеҺӮзұ»пјҢйҮҢиҫ№з»ҷжҲ‘д»¬жҸҗдҫӣдәҶеҮ дёӘзәҝзЁӢжұ зҡ„е·ҘеҺӮж–№жі•пјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ

public static ExecutorService newCachedThreadPool() {
        return new ThreadPoolExecutor(0, Integer.MAX_VALUE,
                                      60L, TimeUnit.SECONDS,
                                      new SynchronousQueue<Runnable>());
}

public static ExecutorService newFixedThreadPool(int nThreads) {
        return new ThreadPoolExecutor(nThreads, nThreads,
                                      0L, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS,
                                      new LinkedBlockingQueue<Runnable>());
}

public static ExecutorService newSingleThreadExecutor() {
        return new FinalizableDelegatedExecutorService
            (new ThreadPoolExecutor(1, 1,
                                    0L, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS,
                                    new LinkedBlockingQueue<Runnable>()));
}

public static ScheduledExecutorService newScheduledThreadPool(int corePoolSize) {
        return new ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor(corePoolSize);
}

.........д»ҘдёӢз•ҘжҺүNдёӘж–№жі•.........

Executors.newCachedThreadPool

з«Ӣй©¬зңӢдёӢиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•зҡ„и°ғз”Ёзҡ„жҳҜе“ӘдёӘжһ„йҖ еҮҪж•°пјҡ

new ThreadPoolExecutor(0, Integer.MAX_VALUE,
                                      60L, TimeUnit.SECONDS,
                                      new SynchronousQueue<Runnable>());

еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢж ёеҝғзәҝзЁӢж•°дёә0пјҢз©әй—ІзәҝзЁӢеӯҳжҙ»ж—¶й•ҝжҳҜ60sпјҢе°ұжҳҜиҜҙдёҖж—ҰжҹҗдёӘзәҝзЁӢз©әй—ІдёӢжқҘи¶…иҝҮ60з§’пјҢд»–е°ұдјҡд»Һжұ дёӯжӢҝжҺүгҖӮеҸҰеӨ–SynchronousQueue жҳҜдёҖдёӘдёҚзј“еӯҳе…ғзҙ зҡ„йҳҹеҲ—пјҢдёҖж—ҰжңүRunnable йҖҡиҝҮexecuteжҸҗдәӨиҝӣжқҘпјҢд»–з«ӢеҚідј йҖ’з»ҷзәҝзЁӢжұ еҺ»еҜ»жүҫз©әй—ІзәҝзЁӢеҺ»жү§иЎҢпјҢеҰӮжһңжІЎжңүз©әй—ІзәҝзЁӢпјҢеҲҷж–°е»әдёҖдёӘгҖӮ

еғҸдёӢиҫ№иҝҷж®өжөӢиҜ•д»Јз ҒпјҢеӣ дёәжҜҸйҡ”21з§’жүҚжҸҗдәӨдёҖдёӘsleep20 з§’зҡ„runnableпјҢжүҖд»ҘпјҢзәҝзЁӢжұ дёӯзҡ„е”ҜдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢдёҚж–ӯең°иў«еҫ—еҲ°еӨҚз”ЁгҖӮ

public class ExecutorTest {

    private static ExecutorService service;

    static class SleepTask extends Thread {
        @Override
        public void run() {
            try {
                Thread.sleep(20000);
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {                
            }
            System.out.println(Thread.currentThread().getName() + " sleep 20 s ");
        }
    }


    public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException {
        service = Executors.newCachedThreadPool();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            service.execute(new SleepTask());
            Thread.sleep(21000);
        }
         // иҝҷйҮҢиҰҒдҪҝеҫ—дё»зәҝзЁӢзӯүеҫ…зәҝзЁӢжұ з»“жқҹ
        service.shutdown();
        while (!service.awaitTermination(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS)) ;
    }
}

иҫ“еҮәпјҡ
pool-1-thread-1 sleep 20 s 
pool-1-thread-1 sleep 20 s 
pool-1-thread-1 sleep 20 s 
pool-1-thread-1 sleep 20 s 
pool-1-thread-1 sleep 20 s 
pool-1-thread-1 sleep 20 s 
(д»ҘдёӢз•Ҙ)

Executors.newFixedThreadPool

е…ҲзңӢи°ғз”Ёзҡ„жһ„йҖ ж–№жі•пјҡ

public static ExecutorService newFixedThreadPool(int nThreads) {
        return new ThreadPoolExecutor(nThreads, nThreads,
                                      0L, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS,
                                      new LinkedBlockingQueue<Runnable>());
}

жһ„йҖ ж–№жі•еҸӮж•°жҳҜпјҢcorePoolSize == maximumPoolSize == nThreadsпјҢзәҝзЁӢз©әй—Іж—¶й•ҝдёә0sпјҢйҳҹеҲ—дёәж— з•Ң(Integer.MAX)зҡ„е…Ҳиҝӣе…ҲеҮәйҳ»еЎһйҳҹеҲ—гҖӮ

иҝҷдёӘж„ҸжҖқе°ұжҳҜпјҢзәҝзЁӢдёҚдјҡиў«еӨҚз”ЁпјҢexecuteжҸҗдәӨдёҖдёӘrunnableпјҢе°ұж–°е»әдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢеҺ»жү§иЎҢд»–пјҢзәҝзЁӢз”Ёе®Ңе°ұй”ҖжҜҒгҖӮеҪ“зәҝзЁӢж•°йҮҸеӨ§дәҺ corePoolSize пјҢе°ұж”ҫеҲ°йҳҹеҲ—йҮҢзј“еӯҳиө·жқҘпјҢзҹҘйҒ“жңүз©әй—Ізҡ„дҪҚзҪ®и®©еҮәжқҘгҖӮ

Executors.newSingleThreadExecutor

зәҝзЁӢжұ з©әй—ҙдёә1пјҢжІЎжңүз©әй—Іж—¶й—ҙгҖӮиҝҷдёӘеҫҲз®ҖеҚ•пјҢз•ҘиҝҮгҖӮи·ҹnewFixedThreadPool(1)зұ»дјјгҖӮ

  public static ExecutorService newSingleThreadExecutor() {
        return new FinalizableDelegatedExecutorService
            (new ThreadPoolExecutor(1, 1,
                                    0L, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS,
                                    new LinkedBlockingQueue<Runnable>()));
    }

Executors.newScheduledThreadPool

иҝҷдёӘзәҝзЁӢжұ зҡ„дҪҝз”Ёе§ҝеҠҝи·ҹдёҠиҫ№з•ҘжңүдёҚеҗҢпјҢе…ҲзңӢжһ„йҖ ж–№жі•и°ғз”Ёпјҡ

public static ScheduledExecutorService newScheduledThreadPool(int corePoolSize) {
        return new ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor(corePoolSize);
}
 //жңҖз»Ҳи°ғз”ЁдәҶиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•пјҡ
public ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor(int corePoolSize) {
        super(corePoolSize, Integer.MAX_VALUE, 0, NANOSECONDS,
              new DelayedWorkQueue());
}

еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢcorePoolSizeеҸҜд»ҘжҢҮе®ҡпјҢmaximumPoolSize ж— з©·еӨ§пјҢз©әй—Іж—¶й—ҙдёә0пјҢйҳҹеҲ—дҪҝз”Ёзҡ„ж”ҜжҢҒе»¶ж—¶иҺ·еҸ–е…ғзҙ зҡ„ж— з•Ңйҳ»еЎһйҳҹеҲ—гҖӮеңЁи°ғз”Ёзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢйңҖиҰҒдҪҝз”ЁScheduledExecutorService иҝҷдёӘжҺҘеҸЈжқҘеҠЁжҖҒз»‘е®ҡпјҢжүҚиғҪеҸ‘жҢҘзңҹжӯЈзҡ„дҪңз”ЁгҖӮ
жҜ”еҰӮ :
scheduleAtFixedRate иҝҷдёӘж–№жі•пјҢе…Ғи®ёcommand з¬¬дёҖж¬Ўе»¶иҝҹ initialDelayдёӘж—¶й—ҙеҚ•дҪҚжүҚејҖе§Ӣжү§иЎҢпјҢз¬¬дәҢж¬Ўе»¶иҝҹinitialDelay+period дёӘж—¶й—ҙеҚ•дҪҚжүҚејҖе§ӢпјҢз¬¬дёүж¬Ўе»¶иҝҹеҲ°initialDelay+period*2 дёӘж—¶й—ҙеҚ•дҪҚжүҚејҖе§ӢгҖӮжҜҸж¬ЎеўһеҠ period дёӘж—¶й—ҙеҚ•дҪҚгҖӮдҪҶдёҚе…Ғи®ёе№¶еҸ‘пјҢеүҚдёҖдёӘжү§иЎҢжІЎз»“жқҹпјҢеҗҺз»§зҡ„жү§иЎҢдјҡиў«жҺЁиҝҹгҖӮи§ҒиҢғдҫӢгҖӮжөӢиҜ•з»“жһңиЎЁжҳҺпјҢжҜҸйҡ”5s е·ҰеҸіжүҚдјҡжү§иЎҢдёҖж¬ЎгҖӮ

public ScheduledFuture<?> scheduleAtFixedRate(Runnable command,
                                                  long initialDelay,
                                                  long period,
                                                  TimeUnit unit);

scheduleWithFixedDelay иҝҷдёӘж–№жі•пјҢе…Ғи®ёcommandз¬¬дёҖж¬Ўе»¶иҝҹ initialDelayдёӘж—¶й—ҙеҚ•дҪҚжүҚејҖе§Ӣжү§иЎҢпјҢеҗҺз»§зҡ„жҜҸдёҖж¬ЎйғҪиҰҒеңЁеүҚдёҖж¬Ўз»“жқҹеҗҺпјҢе»¶иҝҹperiodдёӘж—¶й—ҙеҚ•дҪҚжүҚејҖе§Ӣжү§иЎҢгҖӮе°ҶиҢғдҫӢйҮҢзҡ„жіЁйҮҠиЎҢеҺ»жҺүпјҢжөӢиҜ•з»“жһңз¬ҰеҗҲиҜҘжҸҸиҝ°гҖӮ

иҢғдҫӢпјҡ

public class ExecutorTest {

    private static ScheduledExecutorService service;

    static class SleepTask extends Thread {
        @Override
        public void run() {
            System.out.println(Thread.currentThread().getName() + " start ");
            try {
                Thread.sleep(5000);
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            }
            System.out.println(Thread.currentThread().getName() + " finished ");
        }
    }


    public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException {
        service = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(5);
        service.scheduleAtFixedRate(new SleepTask(), 1, 1, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
       // service.scheduleWithFixedDelay(new SleepTask(),1,1,TimeUnit.SECONDS);
    }
}
}

Callable && Future

  дёҠйқўйғҪжҳҜеңЁи®Ёи®әз”ЁзәҝзЁӢжұ жү§иЎҢRunnableеҜ№иұЎпјҢиҝҳжңүеҸҰеӨ–дёҖдёӘе®һзҺ°дәҶ Callable жҺҘеҸЈзҡ„еҜ№иұЎгҖӮе®һзҺ°дәҶ Callable жҺҘеҸЈзҡ„еҜ№иұЎдјҡжңүиҝ”еӣһеҖјпјҢдҪҶжҳҜRunnableеҜ№иұЎиҝ”еӣһеҖјдёәnullгҖӮе№¶дё” Callable зҡ„ call()ж–№жі•еҸӘиғҪйҖҡиҝҮ ExecutorService зҡ„ submit(Callable task) ж–№жі•жқҘжү§иЎҢпјҢе№¶дё”иҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘ FutureпјҢжҳҜиЎЁзӨәд»»еҠЎзӯүеҫ…е®ҢжҲҗзҡ„ FutureгҖӮ
  еҪ“е°ҶдёҖдёӘ Callable зҡ„еҜ№иұЎдј йҖ’з»ҷ ExecutorService зҡ„ submit ж–№жі•пјҢеҲҷиҜҘ call ж–№жі•иҮӘеҠЁеңЁдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢдёҠжү§иЎҢпјҢе№¶дё”дјҡиҝ”еӣһжү§иЎҢз»“жһң Future еҜ№иұЎгҖӮеҗҢж ·пјҢе°Ҷ Runnable зҡ„еҜ№иұЎдј йҖ’з»ҷ ExecutorService зҡ„ submit ж–№жі•пјҢеҲҷиҜҘ run ж–№жі•иҮӘеҠЁеңЁдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢдёҠжү§иЎҢпјҢе№¶дё”дјҡиҝ”еӣһжү§иЎҢз»“жһң Future еҜ№иұЎпјҢдҪҶжҳҜеңЁиҜҘ Future еҜ№иұЎдёҠи°ғз”Ё get ж–№жі•пјҢе°Ҷиҝ”еӣһ nullгҖӮ
  дёҠиҢғдҫӢпјҡ

public class ExecutorTest {

    private static ExecutorService service;

    static class SleepTask implements Callable<String> {
        @Override
        public String call() throws Exception {
            return Thread.currentThread().getName()+" is finished.";
        }
    }


    public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException, ExecutionException {
        service = Executors.newCachedThreadPool();
        Future<String> future = service.submit(new SleepTask());
        System.out.println(future.get());
    }
}

entry.title: JVMжҖ§иғҪзӣ‘жҺ§е·Ҙе…·жҖ»з»“
entry.content:
жңҖиҝ‘еңЁжё©ж•…гҖҠж·ұе…ҘзҗҶи§ЈJavaиҷҡжӢҹжңәгҖӢ,еҜ№з¬¬еӣӣз« зҡ„е·Ҙе…·иҝӣиЎҢз¬”и®°и®°еҪ•пјҢеӨҮеҝҳгҖӮ

jps

з”ЁжқҘжҹҘзңӢжӯЈеңЁиҝҗиЎҢзҡ„иҷҡжӢҹжңәиҝӣзЁӢпјҢеҠҹиғҪеҚ•дёҖдҪҶй«ҳйў‘зҡ„е°Ҹе·Ҙе…·гҖӮдҪҝз”ЁеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

hadoop@hzbxs-bigdata16:~$ jps
40759 AzkabanWebServer
41031 AzkabanExecutorServer
11860 Jps

вҖғз¬¬дёҖеҲ—жҳҜLVMID(Local Virtual Machine Identifier)пјҢжң¬ең°иҷҡжӢҹжңәиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„LVMIDе°ұжҳҜж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢIDпјӣз¬¬дәҢеҲ—жҳҜиҝӣзЁӢеҗҜеҠЁзҡ„дё»зұ»гҖӮ
вҖғjpsзҡ„еёёз”ЁйҖүйЎ№жңүпјҡ

йҖүйЎ№ з”ЁйҖ”
-m иҫ“еҮәиҷҡжӢҹжңәиҝӣзЁӢеҗҜеҠЁж—¶дј йҖ’з»ҷдё»зұ»main()еҮҪж•°зҡ„еҸӮж•°
-v иҫ“еҮәиҷҡжӢҹжңәиҝӣзЁӢеҗҜеҠЁж—¶JVMеҸӮж•°

jstat

вҖғз”ЁжқҘеңЁиҷҡжӢҹжңәиҝҗиЎҢдёӯзӣ‘и§Ҷеҗ„з§ҚиҝҗиЎҢзҠ¶жҖҒдҝЎжҒҜпјҢжҳҜиҝҗиЎҢжңҹе®ҡдҪҚиҷҡжӢҹжңәжҖ§иғҪй—®йўҳзҡ„йҰ–йҖүе·Ҙе…·гҖӮж јејҸеҰӮдёӢпјҡ jstat -

дёӢиҫ№жҳҜдҪҝз”ЁиҢғдҫӢпјҢjstat -gc 40759 2000 5 пјҢиЎЁзӨәжҹҘиҜўиҝӣзЁӢ40759зҡ„Javaе Ҷжғ…еҶөпјҢжҹҘиҜў5ж¬ЎпјҢй—ҙйҡ”2000msпјҡ

hadoop@hzbxs-bigdata16:~$ jstat -gc  40759 2000 5 
Warning: Unresolved Symbol: sun.gc.generation.2.space.0.capacity substituted NaN
Warning: Unresolved Symbol: sun.gc.generation.2.space.0.used substituted NaN
 S0C    S1C    S0U    S1U      EC       EU        OC         OU       PC     PU    YGC     YGCT    FGC    FGCT     GCT

512.0  512.0   0.0   128.0  18432.0   3045.8   149504.0   90560.0     пҝҪ      пҝҪ      2433   12.128   5      0.475   12.603
512.0  512.0   0.0   128.0  18432.0   3045.8   149504.0   90560.0     пҝҪ      пҝҪ      2433   12.128   5      0.475   12.603
512.0  512.0   0.0   128.0  18432.0   3045.8   149504.0   90560.0     пҝҪ      пҝҪ      2433   12.128   5      0.475   12.603
512.0  512.0   0.0   128.0  18432.0   3050.5   149504.0   90560.0     пҝҪ      пҝҪ      2433   12.128   5      0.475   12.603

дё»иҰҒйҖүйЎ№жҜ”иҫғеӨҡпјҢеҮәдәҶдёҠиҫ№зҡ„-gcпјҢдёӢиҫ№еҶҚд»Ӣз»Қ -gcutilпјҢиҫ“еҮәзҡ„еҶ…е®№е’Ң-gcеҹәжң¬зӣёеҗҢпјҢдҪҶжҳҜдё»иҰҒе…іжіЁз©әй—ҙеҚ з”Ёе…ЁйғЁз©әй—ҙзҡ„жҖ»зҷҫеҲҶжҜ”гҖӮеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

hadoop@hzbxs-bigdata16:~$ jstat -gcutil  40759 2000 5 
Warning: Unresolved Symbol: sun.gc.generation.2.space.0.capacity substituted NaN
Warning: Unresolved Symbol: sun.gc.generation.2.space.0.used substituted NaN
Warning: Unresolved Symbol: sun.gc.generation.2.space.0.capacity substituted NaN
  S0     S1     E      O         P     YGC     YGCT    FGC    FGCT     GCT   
 31.25   0.00  43.46  60.57      пҝҪ   2428   12.108     5    0.475   12.582
 31.25   0.00  43.46  60.57      пҝҪ   2428   12.108     5    0.475   12.582
 31.25   0.00  43.46  60.57      пҝҪ   2428   12.108     5    0.475   12.582
 31.25   0.00  43.46  60.57      пҝҪ   2428   12.108     5    0.475   12.582
 31.25   0.00  43.46  60.57      пҝҪ   2428   12.108     5    0.475   12.582

еҗ„еҢәеҗ«д№үиҜҰи§Ғд№Ұзҡ„еүҚеҮ з« пјҡS0 S1 д»ЈиЎЁдёӨдёӘSurvivorеҢәпјҢEд»ЈиЎЁEdenеҢәпјҲж–°з”ҹд»ЈпјүпјҢOд»ЈиЎЁOldеҢәпјҲиҖҒе№ҙд»Јпјү,Pд»ЈиЎЁпјҲж°ёд№…д»ЈпјүпјҢYGC(Minor GC,Young GCеҸ‘з”ҹж¬Ўж•°пјүпјҢYGCTпјҲиҖ—ж—¶пјү,FGC(Full GCеҸ‘з”ҹж¬Ўж•°пјүпјҢFGCTпјҲиҖ—ж—¶пјүпјҢGCTпјҲGC жҖ»иҖ—ж—¶пјү

jinfo

вҖғз”ЁдәҺжҳҜе®һж—¶жҹҘзңӢе’Ңдҝ®ж”№иҷҡжӢҹжңәеҗ„йЎ№еҸӮж•°гҖӮж„ҹи§үдёҚеҘҪз”ЁпјҢз®ҖеҚ•Markз®—дәҶпјҡ

hadoop@hzbxs-bigdata16:~$ jinfo -flag CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction 40759
-XX:CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction=-1

jmap

з”ЁдәҺз”ҹжҲҗе ҶиҪ¬еӮЁеҝ«з…§пјҲд№ҹе°ұжҳҜHeapdumpж–Үд»¶пјү
дёӢиҫ№д»…д»Ӣз»Қеёёз”Ёзҡ„-dumpеҸӮж•°пјҡ

hadoop@hzbxs-bigdata16:~$ jmap -dump:file=mydump.bin,format=b 40759
Dumping heap to /home/hadoop/mydump.bin ...
Heap dump file created
hadoop@hzbxs-bigdata16:~$ ls mydump.bin 
mydump.bin

еҜјеҮәbinж–Үд»¶пјҢз”Ё еҶ…еӯҳеҲҶжһҗе·Ҙе…·жү“ејҖпјҢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°йқһеёёиҜҰе°Ҫзҡ„дҝЎжҒҜгҖӮе·Ҙе…·еҸҜд»ҘеҺ»eclipseе®ҳзҪ‘дёӢиҪҪпјҲEclipse Memory Analyzerпјү,еҸҜд»ҘдёӢиҪҪжҸ’д»¶жЁЎејҸжҲ–иҖ…жҳҜзӢ¬з«ӢиҪҜд»¶жЁЎејҸпјҢе»әи®®еҗҺиҖ…гҖӮ

jstack

вҖғ з”ЁдәҺз”ҹжҲҗиҷҡжӢҹжңәеҪ“еүҚж—¶еҲ»зҡ„зәҝзЁӢе Ҷж ҲдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮиҝҷдёӘе·Ҙе…·жҳҜе®ҡдҪҚзәҝзЁӢжӯ»й”ҒгҖҒжӯ»еҫӘзҺҜзӯүзӯүеҗ„з§ҚеҚЎйЎҝй—®йўҳзҡ„еҲ©еҷЁгҖӮдҪҝз”Ёйқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҢеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

hadoop@hzbxs-bigdata16:~$ jstack 21024 >> mystack.log

е°Ҷjstackзҡ„иҫ“еҮәйҮҚе®ҡеҗ‘еҲ°жҲ‘зҡ„ж–Үд»¶mystack.logпјҢз„¶еҗҺе°ұйҡҸж„ҸзңӢпјҢlessгҖҒvimгҖҒnotepadд»»еҗӣйҖүжӢ©гҖӮеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

2017-06-18 16:17:42

entry.title: MySQLзҡ„LimitдјҳеҢ–е’ҢжөҒејҸжҹҘиҜў
entry.content:
йҒҮеҲ°дёҖдёӘйңҖжұӮжҳҜйңҖиҰҒе°Ҷж•ҙдёӘиЎЁзҡ„ж•°жҚ®йҖҗиЎҢиҜ»еҸ–еҮәжқҘиҝӣиЎҢеӨ„зҗҶгҖӮ

дҪҝз”Ё limit

дёҖејҖе§Ӣе®һзҺ°жҳҜдҪҝз”ЁlimitжқҘеҒҡпјҢжҜҸдёӘеҫӘзҺҜз»“жқҹеҗҺе°Ҷoffset+= 100пјҢеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

PreparedStatement pStatement = dm.prepareStatement("SELECT start_time,input_params FROM execution_jobs limit ? , ? ";
pStatement.setInt(offset, 100);
ResultSet rs = pStatement.executeQuery();

иҝҷдёӘж–№жі•еңЁoffsetеҸҳеҫ—и¶ҠжқҘи¶ҠеӨ§д№ӢеҗҺпјҢжҹҘиҜўдјҡйқһеёёзј“ж…ўгҖӮеӣ дёә select * from XXX limit 10000,10; зӣёеҪ“дәҺжү«жҸҸдәҶж»Ўи¶іжқЎд»¶зҡ„еүҚ10000иЎҢд№ӢеҗҺпјҢдёўжҺүпјҢз„¶еҗҺеҶҚиҜ»еҸ–10иЎҢгҖӮжүҖд»ҘжҖ§иғҪдјҡйқһеёёе·®гҖӮ

й’ҲеҜ№limit жҹҘиҜўжҖ§иғҪж…ўзҡ„дјҳеҢ–еҠһжі•жңүеҫҲеӨҡгҖӮдёӢйқўиҜҰз»Ҷд»Ӣз»Қпјҡ

  • еӯҗжҹҘиҜўжі•
    вҖғе…ҲжүҫеҮәз¬¬дёҖжқЎж•°жҚ®пјҢз„¶еҗҺеӨ§дәҺзӯүдәҺиҝҷжқЎж•°жҚ®зҡ„idе°ұжҳҜиҰҒиҺ·еҸ–зҡ„ж•°жҚ®
    вҖғзјәзӮ№пјҡж•°жҚ®еҝ…йЎ»жҳҜиҝһз»ӯзҡ„пјҢеҸҜд»ҘиҜҙдёҚиғҪжңүwhereжқЎд»¶пјҢwhereжқЎд»¶дјҡзӯӣйҖүж•°жҚ®пјҢеҜјиҮҙж•°жҚ®еӨұеҺ»иҝһз»ӯжҖ§
mysql> set profiling=1;                             # ејҖеҗҜprofile
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> pager grep !~-                              #е…ій—ӯstdout
PAGER set to 'grep !~-'
mysql> select exec_id ,project_id from execution_jobs limit 100000,100;
100 rows in set (2.65 sec)

mysql> select exec_id ,project_id from execution_jobs where exec_id >= (select exec_id from execution_jobs  limit 100000,1) limit 100;
100 rows in set (0.52 sec)

mysql> nopager                                   #жү“ејҖstdout
PAGER set to stdout
mysql> show profiles;                          #жҹҘзңӢиҖ—ж—¶
+----------+------------+---------------+----------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Query_ID | Duration   | Logical_reads | Physical_reads | Query                                                                                                                          |
+----------+------------+---------------+----------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|        1 | 2.67572900 |         13337 |            410 | select exec_id ,project_id from execution_jobs limit 100000,100                                                                |
|        2 | 0.53610725 |         13026 |            264 | select exec_id ,project_id from execution_jobs where exec_id >= (select exec_id from execution_jobs  limit 100000,1) limit 100 |                                                                                                       |
+----------+------------+---------------+----------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
3 rows in set (0.01 sec)

  • еҖ’жҺ’иЎЁдјҳеҢ–жі•

    вҖғеҖ’жҺ’иЎЁжі•зұ»дјје»әз«Ӣзҙўеј•пјҢз”ЁдёҖеј иЎЁжқҘз»ҙжҠӨйЎөж•°пјҢз„¶еҗҺйҖҡиҝҮй«ҳж•Ҳзҡ„иҝһжҺҘеҫ—еҲ°ж•°жҚ®
    вҖғзјәзӮ№пјҡеҸӘйҖӮеҗҲж•°жҚ®ж•°еӣәе®ҡзҡ„жғ…еҶөпјҢж•°жҚ®дёҚиғҪеҲ йҷӨпјҢз»ҙжҠӨйЎөиЎЁеӣ°йҡҫ

  • еҸҚеҗ‘жҹҘжүҫдјҳеҢ–жі•
    вҖғеҪ“еҒҸз§»и¶…иҝҮдёҖеҚҠи®°еҪ•ж•°зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢе…Ҳз”ЁжҺ’еәҸпјҢиҝҷж ·еҒҸз§»е°ұеҸҚиҪ¬дәҶ
    вҖғзјәзӮ№пјҡorder byдјҳеҢ–жҜ”иҫғйә»зғҰпјҢиҰҒеўһеҠ зҙўеј•пјҢзҙўеј•еҪұе“Қж•°жҚ®зҡ„дҝ®ж”№ж•ҲзҺҮпјҢе№¶дё”иҰҒзҹҘйҒ“жҖ»и®°еҪ•ж•°пјҢеҒҸз§»еӨ§дәҺж•°жҚ®зҡ„дёҖеҚҠ

  • limitйҷҗеҲ¶дјҳеҢ–жі•
    жҠҠlimitеҒҸз§»йҮҸйҷҗеҲ¶дҪҺдәҺжҹҗдёӘж•°пјҢи¶…иҝҮиҝҷдёӘж•°зӯүдәҺжІЎж•°жҚ®гҖӮ

дҪҝз”ЁMysqlзҡ„жөҒејҸжҹҘиҜў

з”ЁдёҠиҫ№зҡ„еҗ„з§ҚеҠһжі•дјҳеҢ–limitеӣәз„¶еҸҜиЎҢпјҢдҪҶдҪҝз”Ёmysqlзҡ„жөҒжҹҘиҜўжҳҜжӣҙеҠ дјҳи¶Ҡзҡ„е®һзҺ°иҝҷдёӘйңҖжұӮзҡ„еҠһжі•гҖӮ

й»ҳи®Өжғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢJDBCеҺ»ж“ҚдҪңmysqlзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢselectиҜӯеҸҘйғҪжҳҜе°ҶжүҖжңүзҡ„з»“жһңзј“еӯҳеҲ°еҶ…еӯҳдёӯпјҢдҪҶжҳҜйҮҮз”ЁжөҒејҸжҹҘиҜўзҡ„иҜқпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҫзҪ®дёҖдёӘжҠ“еҸ–ж•°еҖјпјҢжҜҸж¬ЎеҸӘиҜ»еҸ–дёҖе°ҸйғЁеҲҶж•°жҚ®гҖӮе®һзҺ°еҠһжі•жҳҜпјҡ

PreparedStatement pStatement = dm.prepareStatement("SELECT exec_id,project_id  FROM execution_jobs", ResultSet.TYPE_FORWARD_ONLY, ResultSet.CONCUR_READ_ONLY);
pStatement.setFetchSize(Integer.MIN_VALUE);   
ResultSet rs = pStatement.executeQuery();

while (rs.next()) {
// do something
пҪқ

иҝҷйҮҢ pStatement.setFetchSize(Integer.MIN_VALUE) дјҡи®©дәәеӣ°жғ‘гҖӮиҝҳжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘзңӢJDBCзҡ„жәҗз Ғпјҡ

/**
 * We only stream result sets when they are forward-only, read-only, and the
 * fetch size has been set to Integer.MIN_VALUE
 *
 * @return true if this result set should be streamed row at-a-time, rather
 * than read all at once.
 */
protected boolean createStreamingResultSet() {
    try {
        synchronized(checkClosed().getConnectionMutex()) {
            return ((this.resultSetType == java.sql.ResultSet.TYPE_FORWARD_ONLY)
                 && (this.resultSetConcurrency == java.sql.ResultSet.CONCUR_READ_ONLY) && (this.fetchSize == Integer.MIN_VALUE));
        }
    } catch (SQLException e) {
        // we can't break the interface, having this be no-op in case of error is ok

        return false;
    }
}

д»Һжәҗз ҒжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢеҸӘжңүforward-only, read-only, fetchsizeдёәInteger.MIN_VALUE дёүиҖ…еҗҢж—¶жҲҗз«ӢпјҢжүҚдјҡејҖеҗҜжөҒжҹҘиҜўж–№ејҸгҖӮеҸҜд»ҘеҸӮиҖғиҝҷйҮҢзҡ„еӣһзӯ”пјҡ
http://stackoverflow.com/questions/20899977/what-and-when-should-i-specify-setfetchsize

entry.title: еҹәдәҺ HiveSever2 зҡ„ Azkaban жҸ’д»¶зҡ„е®һзҺ°жҖқи·Ҝ
entry.content:
е…ій”®еӯ—пјҡHiveSever2гҖҒAzkabanжҸ’д»¶

  жңҖиҝ‘з ”з©¶дәҶдёӢHiveServer2жңүе…ізҡ„еҶ…е®№пјҢе№¶дё”еңЁAzkabanзҡ„жҸ’д»¶жЁЎеқ—е®һзҺ°дәҶеҹәдәҺHiveServer2зҡ„жҸ’д»¶зұ»еһӢдҪңдёҡгҖӮзҺ°еңЁе°ҶиҮӘе·ұдёҖдәӣз»ҸйӘҢжҖ»з»“еҰӮдёӢгҖӮ

HiveServer & HiveSever2

  е…ҲжқҘд»Ӣз»ҚHiveServerпјҢеҺҹеҗҚжҳҜThrift serverгҖӮHiveServer жҳҜдёҖдёӘжңҚеҠЎз«ҜпјҢе…Ғи®ёиҝңзЁӢе®ўжҲ·з«ҜйҖҡиҝҮиҜ·жұӮжҸҗдәӨhiveдҪңдёҡжҲ–иҖ…иҺ·еҸ–дҪңдёҡз»“жһңгҖӮHiveSeverжҳҜеҹәдәҺThriftжЎҶжһ¶е®һзҺ°зҡ„пјҢдҪҶеҗҺжқҘзҡ„HiveServer2д№ҹжҳҜеҹәдәҺThriftжЎҶжһ¶пјҢжүҖд»Ҙе‘ҪеҗҚдёҠд»ҺThrift ServerжӣҙеҗҚдёәHiveServer.
  HiveServer2иҰҒжҜ”HiveSeverжӣҙеҠ дјҳз§ҖпјҢж”ҜжҢҒй«ҳе№¶еҸ‘е’Ңе®үе…Ёи®ӨиҜҒгҖӮHiveServerе·Із»ҸдёҚиў«жҺЁиҚҗдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮдёӢиҫ№жҳҜHiveе®ҳзҪ‘еҺҹж–ҮжҸҸиҝ°пјҡ

HiveServer is an optional service that allows a remote client to submit requests to Hive, using a variety of programming languages, and retrieve results. HiveServer is built on Apache ThriftTM (http://thrift.apache.org/), therefore it is sometimes called the Thrift server although this can lead to confusion because a newer service named HiveServer2 is also built on Thrift. Since the introduction of HiveServer2, HiveServer has also been called HiveServer1. \

HiveServer cannot handle concurrent requests from more than one client. This is actually a limitation imposed by the Thrift interface that HiveServer exports, and canвҖҷt be resolved by modifying the HiveServer code. \

HiveServer2 is a rewrite of HiveServer that addresses these problems, starting with Hive 0.11.0. Use of HiveServer2 is recommended.

AzkabanжҸ’д»¶е®һзҺ°еҺҹзҗҶ

 Azkabanзҡ„hadoopзӣёе…ідҪңдёҡжҸ’д»¶зұ»йғҪжҳҜз»§жүҝиҮӘJavaProcessJobзұ»пјҢJavaProcessJobзұ»жң¬иҙЁдёҠжҳҜдёҖдёӘзӢ¬з«Ӣзҡ„JavaиҝӣзЁӢпјҢиҝӣзЁӢеҶ…и°ғз”ЁClientе®ўжҲ·з«Ҝжү§иЎҢhadoopзӣёе…ідҪңдёҡгҖӮзӨәж„ҸеӣҫеҰӮдёӢпјҡ \

жүҖжңүзҡ„жҸ’д»¶зұ»еһӢйғҪиҰҒе®һзҺ°runж–№жі•е’Ңcancelж–№жі•гҖӮ

еҹәдәҺHiveServer2 зҡ„жҸ’д»¶е®һзҺ°

иҝҷйҮҢзңӢдёӢе…ідәҺhiveServerзҡ„дёҖеј иҖҒеӣҫпјҡ

  д»”з»Ҷз ”з©¶Azkabanзҡ„HiveжҸ’д»¶зҡ„д»Јз ҒпјҢеҸҜд»ҘзҹҘйҒ“пјҢAzkabanжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮHive ClientжқҘжҸҗдәӨHiveдҪңдёҡзҡ„пјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜеӣҫдёӯзҡ„CLIж–№ејҸгҖӮиҝҷз§Қж–№ејҸзҡ„й—®йўҳиҝҳжҳҜжҢәеӨҡзҡ„пјҢз”ұдәҺзӣҙжҺҘз»•иҝҮдәҶHiveServer2пјҢжүҖд»ҘдёҚж”ҜжҢҒй«ҳе№¶еҸ‘е’Ңе®үе…Ёи®ӨиҜҒпјҢеӯҳеңЁеҫҲеӨҡйҡҗжӮЈгҖӮ
  жүҖд»Ҙжңүеҝ…иҰҒејҖеҸ‘еҹәдәҺHiveServer2зҡ„AzkabanжҸ’д»¶гҖӮ
  Azakabanзҡ„е®һзҺ°е·Із»ҸеңЁж–Үз« гҖҠAzkaban LearningгҖӢдёӯжңүз®ҖеҚ•д»Ӣз»ҚпјҢе…¶е®һеҸҜд»Ҙз®ҖеҚ•жЁЎд»ҝHadoopJavaзұ»еһӢдҪңдёҡзҡ„жҸ’д»¶е®һзҺ°пјҢиҝҷйҮҢдёҚдҪңиҝҮеӨҡзҡ„д»Ӣз»ҚгҖӮ

  HiveServer2жҸҗдәӨдҪңдёҡе…¶е®һжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮJDBCж–№ејҸжқҘжҸҗдәӨзҡ„пјҢйӮЈжҲ‘д»¬жқҘзңӢдёӢHiveServer2йғҪжҸҗдҫӣдәҶе“Әдәӣapiпјҡ

  1. еҗҢжӯҘжҸҗдәӨHQL
    ThriftCLIServiceClient.executeStatement(SessionHandle sessionHandle, String statement, Map<String, String> confOverlay) throws HiveSQLException

  2. ејӮжӯҘжҸҗдәӨHQL
    ThriftCLIServiceClient.executeStatementAsync(SessionHandle sessionHandle, String statement, Map<String, String> confOverlay) throws HiveSQLException

  3. иҜ·жұӮж—Ҙеҝ—жҲ–иҖ…з»“жһң
    ThriftCLIServiceClient.fetchResults(OperationHandle opHandle, FetchOrientation orientation, long maxRows, FetchType fetchType) throws HiveSQLException
    (FetchTypeеҲҶдёәFetchType.LOG е’Ң FetchType.QUERY_OUTPUTпјҢеҲҶеҲ«еҜ№еә”ж—Ҙеҝ—е’Ңз»“жһң)

  4. иҜ·жұӮжү§иЎҢзҠ¶жҖҒ
    ThriftCLIServiceClient.getOperationStatus(OperationHandle opHandle) throws HiveSQLException
    (зҠ¶жҖҒеҢ…жӢ¬пјҡINITIALIZED RUNNING FINISHED CANCELED CLOSED ERROR UNKNOWN PENDING)

  5. еҸ–ж¶Ҳжү§иЎҢ
    ThriftCLIServiceClient.cancelOperation(OperationHandle opHandle) throws HiveSQLException

  6. е…ій—ӯеҸҘжҹ„
    ThriftCLIServiceClient.closeOperation(OperationHandle opHandle) throws HiveSQLException
    жҜҸжү§иЎҢе®ҢдёҖжқЎsqlйғҪиҰҒе…ій—ӯеҸҘжҹ„

  йҖҡиҝҮиҝҷдәӣдё°еҜҢзҡ„apiе…¶е®һе·Із»Ҹе®Ңе…Ёи¶іеӨҹе®һзҺ°иҝҷдёӘжҸ’д»¶гҖӮе…·дҪ“зҡ„е®һзҺ°д»Јз ҒдёҚдҫҝдәҺе…¬ејҖпјҢж¬ўиҝҺз§ҒиҒҠе’ЁиҜўгҖӮ

еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷпјҡ

  1. https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/Hive/HiveServer2+Overview
  2. https://hive.apache.org/
  3. https://github.com/azkaban/azkaban-plugins

entry.title: Azkaban Learning
entry.content:
Azkaban

е…ій”®еӯ—пјҡAzkabanз®Җд»ӢгҖҒеӨ§ж•°жҚ®дҪңдёҡи°ғеәҰзі»з»ҹ

иҝҷзҜҮж–Үз« йҖӮеҗҲеҜ№azkabanжңүдёҖе®ҡдәҶи§Јзҡ„дәәйҳ…иҜ»гҖӮе»әи®®е…ҲзІ—иҜ»пјҡ
AZејҖеҸ‘ж–ҮжЎЈпјҡhttp://azkaban.github.io/azkaban/docs/latest/#overview
ејәеӯҗе“Ҙзҡ„жәҗз ҒеҲҶжһҗпјҡhttps://my.oschina.net/qiangzigege/blog/653198
(д»ҘдёӢеҶ…е®№йғЁеҲҶж‘ҳиҮӘдёҠдёӨдёӘй“ҫжҺҘ)

azkabanжәҗз Ғпјҡ git clone https://github.com/azkaban/azkaban.git

Azkaban з®Җд»Ӣ

Azkaban was implemented at LinkedIn to solve the problem of Hadoop job dependencies. We had jobs that needed to run in order, from ETL jobs to data analytics products.
Initially a single server solution, with the increased number of Hadoop users over the years, Azkaban has evolved to be a more robust solution.

Azkaban жҳҜз”ұLinkedlnе…¬еҸёдёәдәҶи§ЈеҶіhadoop дҪңдёҡд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„дҫқиө–иҖҢе®һзҺ°зҡ„гҖӮеӣ дёәжңүдёҖдәӣETLдҪңдёҡд»ҘеҸҠж•°жҚ®еҲҶжһҗдә§е“ҒйңҖиҰҒжҢүз…§дёҖе®ҡзҡ„йЎәеәҸеҺ»жү§иЎҢгҖӮ
йҡҸзқҖhadoopз”ЁжҲ·зҡ„йҖҗе№ҙеўһеҠ пјҢAzkabanд»ҺдёҖдёӘз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„жңҚеҠЎи§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲеҸ‘еұ•жҲҗдёәдёҖдёӘжӣҙеҠ еҒҘеЈ®йІҒжЈ’зҡ„ж–№жЎҲгҖӮ

Azkabanзҡ„зі»з»ҹжһ¶жһ„дё»иҰҒз”ұдёүдёӘз»„д»¶з»„жҲҗпјҡ

  • WebServer пјҡжҡҙйңІAPIпјҢжҸҗдҫӣеҲҶеҸ‘дҪңдёҡе’Ңи°ғеәҰдҪңдёҡеҠҹиғҪпјӣ
  • ExecServer пјҡеҜ№WebServer жҡҙйңІ API пјҢжҸҗдҫӣжү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡзҡ„еҠҹиғҪпјӣ
  • MySQL пјҡж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁпјҢе®һзҺ°Web е’Ң Execд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„ж•°жҚ®е…ұдә«е’ҢйғЁеҲҶзҠ¶жҖҒзҡ„еҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ

еӨҡжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢжӣҙз»ҶиҠӮдёҖзӮ№зҡ„жһ¶жһ„еӣҫеҸҜд»ҘеҰӮдёӢпјҢеӣҫдёӯзңҒз•ҘMySQLж•°жҚ®еә“пјҡ

йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•иҖҢзӣҙи§Ӯ

WebServer

жҡҙйңІAPI

 еңЁazkaban-webserverе·ҘзЁӢдёӯпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙйқһеёёжё…жҷ°ең°зңӢеҲ°еҜ№еӨ–жҡҙйңІзҡ„ServletпјҢе…¶дёӯжңҖдё»иҰҒзҡ„еҮ дёӘжҳҜпјҡ

  • ExecutorServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣз«ӢеҚіжү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡгҖҒеҸ–ж¶ҲдҪңдёҡжөҒгҖҒжҡӮеҒңдҪңдёҡжөҒгҖҒиҺ·еҸ–жөҒжҲ–иҠӮзӮ№ж—Ҙеҝ—зӯүжҺҘеҸЈ
  • ScheduleServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣи®ҫзҪ®и°ғеәҰгҖҒи®ҫзҪ®SlaжҠҘиӯҰи§„еҲҷгҖҒиҺ·еҸ–и°ғеәҰдҝЎжҒҜзӯүжҺҘеҸЈ
  • HistoryServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣжҹҘзңӢдҪңдёҡжөҒжү§иЎҢеҺҶеҸІзҡ„жҺҘеҸЈ
  • ProjectManagerServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣдёҠдј йЎ№зӣ®zipеҢ…гҖҒдёӢиҪҪйЎ№зӣ®zipеҢ…гҖҒеҲ йҷӨйЎ№зӣ®гҖҒиҺ·еҸ–жөҒзҡ„DAGзӯүжҺҘеҸЈ

еҲҶеҸ‘дҪңдёҡ

 ExecutorManager дё»иҰҒжүҝжӢ…иҝҷйғЁеҲҶзҡ„еҠҹиғҪпјҢжүҖжңүзұ»еһӢзҡ„дҪңдёҡпјҲеҢ…жӢ¬з«ӢеҚіжү§иЎҢе’Ңи°ғеәҰжү§иЎҢпјү,йғҪдјҡйҖҡиҝҮsubmitExecutableFlow(ExecutableFlow exflow, String userId)иҝҷдёӘж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢжҸҗдәӨгҖӮ

 еңЁиҜҘж–№жі•дёӯпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҡеҰӮжһңжҳҜеӨҡжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢе…Ҳж”ҫиҝӣеҲҶеҸ‘йҳҹеҲ—дёӯпјӣеҰӮжһңжҳҜеҚ•иҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢз«ӢеҚіи°ғз”Ёdispatchж–№жі•иҝӣиЎҢеҲҶеҸ‘гҖӮ

if (isMultiExecutorMode()) {
    //Take MultiExecutor route
    executorLoader.addActiveExecutableReference(reference);
    queuedFlows.enqueue(exflow, reference);
} else {
    // assign only local executor we have
    Executor choosenExecutor = activeExecutors.iterator().next();
    executorLoader.addActiveExecutableReference(reference);
    try {
        dispatch(reference, exflow, choosenExecutor);
    } catch (ExecutorManagerException e) {
        executorLoader.removeActiveExecutableReference(reference.getExecId());
            throw e;
    }
}

 еңЁеӨҡжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢиў«ж”ҫиҝӣеҲҶеҸ‘йҳҹеҲ—гҖӮйҳҹеҲ—дјҡиў«зәҝзЁӢ QueueProcessorThread е®ҡж—¶еӨ„зҗҶгҖӮ

    /* Method responsible for processing the non-dispatched flows */
    private void processQueuedFlows(long activeExecutorsRefreshWindow,
      int maxContinuousFlowProcessed) throws InterruptedException,
      ExecutorManagerException {
      long lastExecutorRefreshTime = 0;
      Pair<ExecutionReference, ExecutableFlow> runningCandidate;
      int currentContinuousFlowProcessed = 0;

      while (isActive() && (runningCandidate = queuedFlows.fetchHead()) != null) {
        ExecutionReference reference = runningCandidate.getFirst();
        ExecutableFlow exflow = runningCandidate.getSecond();

        long currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis();

        // if we have dispatched more than maxContinuousFlowProcessed or
        // It has been more then activeExecutorsRefreshWindow millisec since we
        // refreshed
        if (currentTime - lastExecutorRefreshTime > activeExecutorsRefreshWindow
          || currentContinuousFlowProcessed >= maxContinuousFlowProcessed) {
          // Refresh executorInfo for all activeExecutors
          refreshExecutors();
          lastExecutorRefreshTime = currentTime;
          currentContinuousFlowProcessed = 0;
        }

        /**
         * <pre>
         *  TODO: Work around till we improve Filters to have a notion of GlobalSystemState.
         *        Currently we try each queued flow once to infer a global busy state
         * Possible improvements:-
         *   1. Move system level filters in refreshExecutors and sleep if we have all executors busy after refresh
         *   2. Implement GlobalSystemState in selector or in a third place to manage system filters. Basically
         *      taking out all the filters which do not depend on the flow but are still being part of Selector.
         * Assumptions:-
         *   1. no one else except QueueProcessor is updating ExecutableFlow update time
         *   2. re-attempting a flow (which has been tried before) is considered as all executors are busy
         * </pre>
         */
        if(exflow.getUpdateTime() > lastExecutorRefreshTime) {
          // put back in the queue
          queuedFlows.enqueue(exflow, reference);
          long sleepInterval =
            activeExecutorsRefreshWindow
              - (currentTime - lastExecutorRefreshTime);
          // wait till next executor refresh
          sleep(sleepInterval);
        } else {
          exflow.setUpdateTime(currentTime);
          // process flow with current snapshot of activeExecutors
          selectExecutorAndDispatchFlow(reference, exflow, new HashSet<Executor>(activeExecutors));
        }

        // do not count failed flow processsing (flows still in queue)
        if(queuedFlows.getFlow(exflow.getExecutionId()) == null) {
          currentContinuousFlowProcessed++;
        }
      }
    }

  selectExecutorAndDispatchFlow ж–№жі•е…ҲжҳҜйҖүжӢ©жү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№пјҲйҖүжӢ©иҠӮзӮ№зҡ„е®һзҺ°жҜ”иҫғжңүж„ҸжҖқпјүпјҢйҖүеҘҪиҠӮзӮ№еҗҺжңҖз»Ҳд№ҹжҳҜи°ғз”ЁдәҶdispatchиҝӣиЎҢдҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘гҖӮ

/* process flow with a snapshot of available Executors */
    private void selectExecutorAndDispatchFlow(ExecutionReference reference,
      ExecutableFlow exflow, Set<Executor> availableExecutors)
      throws ExecutorManagerException {
      synchronized (exflow) {
        Executor selectedExecutor = selectExecutor(exflow, availableExecutors);
        if (selectedExecutor != null) {
          try {
            dispatch(reference, exflow, selectedExecutor);
          } catch (ExecutorManagerException e) {
            logger.warn(String.format(
              "Executor %s responded with exception for exec: %d",
              selectedExecutor, exflow.getExecutionId()), e);
            handleDispatchExceptionCase(reference, exflow, selectedExecutor,
              availableExecutors);
          }
        } else {
          handleNoExecutorSelectedCase(reference, exflow);
        }
      }
    }

  еӣ дёәWeb е’ҢExec д№Ӣй—ҙжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮmysqlиҝӣиЎҢж•°жҚ®е…ұдә«зҡ„пјҢжүҖд»ҘdispatchиҝӣиЎҢдҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘зҡ„йҖ»иҫ‘йқһеёёз®ҖеҚ•пјҢе°ұжҳҜз®ҖеҚ•ең°йҖҡиҝҮHTTPиҜ·жұӮдј йҖ’execIdзӯүдҝЎжҒҜпјҢе…¶дҪҷжүҖйңҖиҰҒзҡ„ж•°жҚ®йғҪйҖҡиҝҮж•°жҚ®еә“иҜ»еҶҷе®ҢжҲҗгҖӮ

и°ғеәҰдҪңдёҡ

  и°ғеәҰдҪңдёҡжҳҜи°ғеәҰзі»з»ҹзҡ„жңҖйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„еҠҹиғҪд№ӢдёҖпјҢд№ҹжҳҜAzkabanйҮҢзӣёеҜ№еӨҚжқӮзҡ„дёҖдёӘжЁЎеқ—гҖӮи°ғеәҰжҳҜйҖҡиҝҮScheduleManagerеҜ№еӨ–жҡҙйңІпјҢеҜ№еә”зқҖзҡ„з»“жһ„жҳҜScheduleпјӣеҜ№еҶ…жҳҜйҖҡиҝҮTriggerManagerжқҘе®һзҺ°пјҢеҜ№еә”зқҖзҡ„з»“жһ„жҳҜTriggerгҖӮ

  жүҖжңүзҡ„и°ғеәҰдҝЎжҒҜйғҪйҖҡиҝҮScheduleManager.scheduleFlowдј е…Ҙ,еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°дј е…ҘеҸӮж•°еҢ…еҗ«дәҶйЎ№зӣ®idгҖҒйЎ№зӣ®еҗҚеӯ—гҖҒжөҒеҗҚеӯ—гҖҒз¬¬дёҖж¬Ўи°ғеәҰж—¶й—ҙжҲігҖҒж—¶еҢәгҖҒи°ғеәҰе‘ЁжңҹгҖҒдёӢдёҖж¬Ўжү§иЎҢж—¶й—ҙгҖҒжҸҗдәӨж—¶й—ҙгҖҒжҸҗдәӨдәәгҖӮеҜ№дәҺдёҖдёӘи°ғеәҰжқҘиҜҙпјҢжңҖе…ій”®зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜж— йқһжҳҜз¬¬дёҖж¬Ўи°ғеәҰж—¶й—ҙе’Ңи°ғеәҰе‘ЁжңҹгҖӮ

public Schedule scheduleFlow(final int scheduleId, final int projectId,
      final String projectName, final String flowName, final String status,
      final long firstSchedTime, final DateTimeZone timezone,
      final ReadablePeriod period, final long lastModifyTime,
      final long nextExecTime, final long submitTime, final String submitUser)

  д»ҺscheduleFlow еҫҖдёӢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°и°ғз”ЁдәҶTriggerBasedScheduleLoader.insertScheduleгҖӮиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•йҮҢиҫ№е…ҲжҳҜе°ҶScheduleиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗдәҶTriggerпјҢз„¶еҗҺе°ҶTriggerж”ҫеҲ°дәҶTriggerManagerйҮҢиҫ№гҖӮscheduleToTriggerж–№жі•еҶҷзҡ„йқһеёёз®ҖжҙҒе·§еҰҷпјҢиҜ»иҖ…иҮӘиЎҢз ”з©¶пјҢжӯӨеӨ„дёҚдҪңз»ҶиҮҙеҲҶжһҗгҖӮ

 @Override
  public void insertSchedule(Schedule s) throws ScheduleManagerException {
    Trigger t = scheduleToTrigger(s);
    try {
      triggerManager.insertTrigger(t, t.getSubmitUser());
      s.setScheduleId(t.getTriggerId());
    } catch (TriggerManagerException e) {
      throw new ScheduleManagerException("Failed to insert new schedule!", e);
    }
  }

   жҲ‘д»¬еңЁз»§з»ӯзңӢзңӢTriggerиў«еЎһеҲ°TriggerManagerеҒҡдәҶдәӣе•ҘгҖӮд»ҺдёӢиҫ№еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢе…ҲжҳҜи°ғз”ЁtriggerLoaderеҶҷиҝӣж•°жҚ®еә“пјҢз„¶еҗҺе°ұж”ҫеҲ°дәҶдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢrunnerThreadдёӯеҺ»гҖӮ

public void insertTrigger(Trigger t) throws TriggerManagerException {
    synchronized (syncObj) {
      try {
        triggerLoader.addTrigger(t);
      } catch (TriggerLoaderException e) {
        throw new TriggerManagerException(e);
      }
      runnerThread.addTrigger(t);
      triggerIdMap.put(t.getTriggerId(), t);
    }
  }

   жҺҘдёӢжқҘе°ұжҳҫиҖҢжҳ“и§ҒдәҶпјҢиҝҷдёӘзәҝзЁӢTriggerScannerThread runnerThread е®ҡжңҹжЈҖжҹҘTriggerжҳҜеҗҰеә”иҜҘи§ҰеҸ‘пјҲonTriggerTriggerпјүжҲ–иҖ…з»ҲжӯўпјҲonTriggerExpireпјүгҖӮ

    private void checkAllTriggers() throws TriggerManagerException {
      long now = System.currentTimeMillis();

      // sweep through the rest of them
      for (Trigger t : triggers) {
        try {
          scannerStage = "Checking for trigger " + t.getTriggerId();

          boolean shouldSkip = true;
          if (shouldSkip && t.getInfo() != null && t.getInfo().containsKey("monitored.finished.execution")) {
            int execId = Integer.valueOf((String) t.getInfo().get("monitored.finished.execution"));
            if (justFinishedFlows.containsKey(execId)) {
              logger.info("Monitored execution has finished. Checking trigger earlier " + t.getTriggerId());
              shouldSkip = false;
            }
          }
          if (shouldSkip && t.getNextCheckTime() > now) {
            shouldSkip = false;
          }

          if (shouldSkip) {
            logger.info("Skipping trigger" + t.getTriggerId() + " until " + t.getNextCheckTime());
          }

          if (logger.isDebugEnabled()) {
            logger.info("Checking trigger " + t.getTriggerId());
          }
          if (t.getStatus().equals(TriggerStatus.READY)) {
            if (t.triggerConditionMet()) {
              onTriggerTrigger(t);
            } else if (t.expireConditionMet()) {
              onTriggerExpire(t);
            }
          }
          if (t.getStatus().equals(TriggerStatus.EXPIRED) && t.getSource().equals("azkaban")) {
            removeTrigger(t);
          } else {
            t.updateNextCheckTime();
          }
        } catch (Throwable th) {
          //skip this trigger, moving on to the next one
          logger.error("Failed to process trigger with id : " + t.getTriggerId(), th);
        }
      }
    }

   Triggerи§ҰеҸ‘зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷе°ұдјҡи°ғз”ЁиҮӘе·ұзҡ„action.doAction()пјҢи°ғеәҰд»»еҠЎзҡ„Triggerзҡ„actionдёҖиҲ¬йғҪжҳҜExecuteFlowActionпјҢе…¶doActionж–№жі•еҰӮдёӢгҖӮж–№жі•дё»иҰҒеҒҡдәҶдёӨдёӘдәӢжғ…пјҢз¬¬дёҖдёӘжҳҜжһ„е»әжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢExecutableFlowпјҢз¬¬дәҢдёӘжҳҜеҰӮжһңиҜҘи°ғеәҰи®ҫзҪ®дәҶжҠҘиӯҰи§„еҲҷпјҢеҲҷжһ„е»әSlaTriggerгҖӮ

   жһ„е»әжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺпјҢеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°и°ғз”ЁдәҶexecutorManager.submitExecutableFlow(exflow, submitUser) иҝӣиЎҢдҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘пјҢиҝҷж ·еӯҗпјҢе°ұи·ҹдёҠж–ҮжҸҗеҲ°зҡ„дҪңдёҡеҲҶеҸ‘ж®ҠйҖ”еҗҢеҪ’гҖӮдёӢиҫ№дёҚеҶҚеҲҶжһҗгҖӮ

  @Override
  public void doAction() throws Exception {
    if (projectManager == null || executorManager == null) {
      throw new Exception("ExecuteFlowAction not properly initialized!");
    }

    Project project = projectManager.getProject(projectId);
    if (project == null) {
      logger.error("Project to execute " + projectId + " does not exist!");
      throw new RuntimeException("Error finding the project to execute "
          + projectId);
    }

    Flow flow = project.getFlow(flowName);
    if (flow == null) {
      logger.error("Flow " + flowName + " cannot be found in project "
          + project.getName());
      throw new RuntimeException("Error finding the flow to execute "
          + flowName);
    }

    ExecutableFlow exflow = new ExecutableFlow(project, flow);
    exflow.setSubmitUser(submitUser);
    exflow.addAllProxyUsers(project.getProxyUsers());

    if (executionOptions == null) {
      executionOptions = new ExecutionOptions();
    }
    if (!executionOptions.isFailureEmailsOverridden()) {
      executionOptions.setFailureEmails(flow.getFailureEmails());
    }
    if (!executionOptions.isSuccessEmailsOverridden()) {
      executionOptions.setSuccessEmails(flow.getSuccessEmails());
    }
    exflow.setExecutionOptions(executionOptions);

    try {
      executorManager.submitExecutableFlow(exflow, submitUser);
      logger.info("Invoked flow " + project.getName() + "." + flowName);
    } catch (ExecutorManagerException e) {
      throw new RuntimeException(e);
    }

    // deal with sla
    if (slaOptions != null && slaOptions.size() > 0) {
      int execId = exflow.getExecutionId();
      for (SlaOption sla : slaOptions) {
        logger.info("Adding sla trigger " + sla.toString() + " to execution "
            + execId);
        SlaChecker slaFailChecker =
            new SlaChecker("slaFailChecker", sla, execId);
        Map<String, ConditionChecker> slaCheckers =
            new HashMap<String, ConditionChecker>();
        slaCheckers.put(slaFailChecker.getId(), slaFailChecker);
        Condition triggerCond =
            new Condition(slaCheckers, slaFailChecker.getId()
                + ".isSlaFailed()");
        // if whole flow finish before violate sla, just expire
        SlaChecker slaPassChecker =
            new SlaChecker("slaPassChecker", sla, execId);
        Map<String, ConditionChecker> expireCheckers =
            new HashMap<String, ConditionChecker>();
        expireCheckers.put(slaPassChecker.getId(), slaPassChecker);
        Condition expireCond =
            new Condition(expireCheckers, slaPassChecker.getId()
                + ".isSlaPassed()");
        List<TriggerAction> actions = new ArrayList<TriggerAction>();
        List<String> slaActions = sla.getActions();
        for (String act : slaActions) {
          if (act.equals(SlaOption.ACTION_ALERT)) {
            SlaAlertAction slaAlert =
                new SlaAlertAction("slaAlert", sla, execId);
            actions.add(slaAlert);
          } else if (act.equals(SlaOption.ACTION_CANCEL_FLOW)) {
            KillExecutionAction killAct =
                new KillExecutionAction("killExecution", execId);
            actions.add(killAct);
          }
        }
        Trigger slaTrigger =
            new Trigger("azkaban_sla", "azkaban", triggerCond, expireCond,
                actions);
        slaTrigger.getInfo().put("monitored.finished.execution",
            String.valueOf(execId));
        slaTrigger.setResetOnTrigger(false);
        slaTrigger.setResetOnExpire(false);
        logger.info("Ready to put in the sla trigger");
        triggerManager.insertTrigger(slaTrigger);
        logger.info("Sla inserted.");
      }
    }
  }

   дёӢиҫ№з”ЁдёҖеј еӣҫз®ҖеҚ•жҖ»з»“

ExecServer

жҡҙйңІRestful API

  Azkaban3.0еҗҺе°ұејҖе§Ӣж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№йғЁзҪІгҖӮеҚ•дёӘжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жҜ”иҫғз®ҖеҚ•пјҢеҜ№webжҡҙйңІзҡ„APIд№ҹжҜ”иҫғе°‘пјҢдё»иҰҒжҳҜпјҡ

  • ExecutorServlet дё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣжү§иЎҢгҖҒеҸ–ж¶ҲгҖҒжҡӮеҒңгҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—жҹҘиҜўзӯүжҺҘеҸЈгҖӮ

жү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡ

  иҝҷйҮҢз®ҖеҚ•зңӢдёӢжү§иЎҢиҠӮзӮ№жү§иЎҢдёҖдёӘдҪңдёҡзҡ„жөҒзЁӢжҳҜжҖҺж ·зҡ„гҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еңЁExecutorServletдёӯзңӢеҲ°жүҖжңүзҡ„жү§иЎҢдҪңдёҡиҜ·жұӮйғҪз»ҸиҝҮhandleAjaxExecuteж–№жі•пјҢиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•з®ҖеҚ•ең°е°Ҷжү§иЎҢidдј йҖ’з»ҷFlowRunnerManagerпјҡ

private void handleAjaxExecute(HttpServletRequest req,
      Map<String, Object> respMap, int execId) throws ServletException {
    try {
      flowRunnerManager.submitFlow(execId);
    } catch (ExecutorManagerException e) {
      e.printStackTrace();
      logger.error(e);
      respMap.put(RESPONSE_ERROR, e.getMessage());
    }
  }

  FlowRunnerManager йҖҡиҝҮsubmitFlowж–№жі•жҸҗдәӨе·ҘдҪңжөҒеҺ»жү§иЎҢгҖӮе…ҲжҳҜжһ„е»әжү§иЎҢе®һдҫӢExecutableFlowпјҢз„¶еҗҺеҮҶеӨҮжү§иЎҢзӣ®еҪ•setupFlow(flow)пјҢз„¶еҗҺз”ҹжҲҗFlowRunnerпјҢз„¶еҗҺжҸҗдәӨеҲ°зәҝзЁӢжұ еҺ»иҝҗиЎҢexecutorService.submit(runner)гҖӮ

 public void submitFlow(int execId) throws ExecutorManagerException {
    // Load file and submit
    if (runningFlows.containsKey(execId)) {
      throw new ExecutorManagerException("Execution " + execId
          + " is already running.");
    }

    ExecutableFlow flow = null;
    flow = executorLoader.fetchExecutableFlow(execId);
    if (flow == null) {
      throw new ExecutorManagerException("Error loading flow with exec "
          + execId);
    }

    // Sets up the project files and execution directory.
    setupFlow(flow);

    // Setup flow runner
    FlowWatcher watcher = null;
    ExecutionOptions options = flow.getExecutionOptions();
    if (options.getPipelineExecutionId() != null) {
      Integer pipelineExecId = options.getPipelineExecutionId();
      FlowRunner runner = runningFlows.get(pipelineExecId);

      if (runner != null) {
        watcher = new LocalFlowWatcher(runner);
      } else {
        watcher = new RemoteFlowWatcher(pipelineExecId, executorLoader);
      }
    }

    int numJobThreads = numJobThreadPerFlow;
    if (options.getFlowParameters().containsKey(FLOW_NUM_JOB_THREADS)) {
      try {
        int numJobs =
            Integer.valueOf(options.getFlowParameters().get(
                FLOW_NUM_JOB_THREADS));
        if (numJobs > 0 && (numJobs <= numJobThreads || ProjectWhitelist
                .isProjectWhitelisted(flow.getProjectId(),
                    WhitelistType.NumJobPerFlow))) {
          numJobThreads = numJobs;
        }
      } catch (Exception e) {
        throw new ExecutorManagerException(
            "Failed to set the number of job threads "
                + options.getFlowParameters().get(FLOW_NUM_JOB_THREADS)
                + " for flow " + execId, e);
      }
    }

    FlowRunner runner =
        new FlowRunner(flow, executorLoader, projectLoader, jobtypeManager);
    runner.setFlowWatcher(watcher)
        .setJobLogSettings(jobLogChunkSize, jobLogNumFiles)
        .setValidateProxyUser(validateProxyUser)
        .setNumJobThreads(numJobThreads).addListener(this);

    configureFlowLevelMetrics(runner);

    // Check again.
    if (runningFlows.containsKey(execId)) {
      throw new ExecutorManagerException("Execution " + execId
          + " is already running.");
    }

    // Finally, queue the sucker.
    runningFlows.put(execId, runner);

    try {
      // The executorService already has a queue.
      // The submit method below actually returns an instance of FutureTask,
      // which implements interface RunnableFuture, which extends both
      // Runnable and Future interfaces
      Future<?> future = executorService.submit(runner);
      // keep track of this future
      submittedFlows.put(future, runner.getExecutionId());
      // update the last submitted time.
      this.lastFlowSubmittedDate = System.currentTimeMillis();
    } catch (RejectedExecutionException re) {
      throw new ExecutorManagerException(
          "Azkaban server can't execute any more flows. "
              + "The number of running flows has reached the system configured limit."
              + "Please notify Azkaban administrators");
    }
  }

   FlowRunnerжң¬иә«д№ҹз»§жүҝдёҺRunnableпјҢе…¶runж–№жі•йҮҢиҫ№и°ғз”ЁдәҶ runFlowж–№жі•пјҢж–№жі•еҶ…е®№еҰӮдёӢгҖӮж–№жі•йҮҢжҢүз…§ж ‘зҡ„еұӮж¬Ўз»“жһ„йҖҗеұӮи®ҝй—®DAGеӣҫзҡ„жҜҸдёҖдёӘjobпјҢйҖҗдёӘеҺ»жҸҗдәӨжү§иЎҢгҖӮ

private void runFlow() throws Exception {
    logger.info("Starting flows");
    runReadyJob(this.flow);
    updateFlow();

    while (!flowFinished) {
      synchronized (mainSyncObj) {
        if (flowPaused) {
          try {
            mainSyncObj.wait(CHECK_WAIT_MS);
          } catch (InterruptedException e) {
          }

          continue;
        } else {
          if (retryFailedJobs) {
            retryAllFailures();
          } else if (!progressGraph()) {
            try {
              mainSyncObj.wait(CHECK_WAIT_MS);
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    logger.info("Finishing up flow. Awaiting Termination");
    executorService.shutdown();

    updateFlow();
    logger.info("Finished Flow");
  }

   еҜ№дәҺеҚ•дёӘjobпјҢжңҖеҗҺжһ„йҖ дёҖдёӘJobRunnerеҺ»жү§иЎҢд№ӢгҖӮ

private void runExecutableNode(ExecutableNode node) throws IOException {
    // Collect output props from the job's dependencies.
    prepareJobProperties(node);

    node.setStatus(Status.QUEUED);
    JobRunner runner = createJobRunner(node);
    logger.info("Submitting job '" + node.getNestedId() + "' to run.");
    try {
      executorService.submit(runner);
      activeJobRunners.add(runner);
    } catch (RejectedExecutionException e) {
      logger.error(e);
    }
    ;
  }

 private JobRunner createJobRunner(ExecutableNode node) {
    // Load job file.
    File path = new File(execDir, node.getJobSource());

    JobRunner jobRunner =
        new JobRunner(node, path.getParentFile(), executorLoader,
            jobtypeManager);
    if (watcher != null) {
      jobRunner.setPipeline(watcher, pipelineLevel);
    }
    if (validateUserProxy) {
      jobRunner.setValidatedProxyUsers(proxyUsers);
    }

    jobRunner.setDelayStart(node.getDelayedExecution());
    jobRunner.setLogSettings(logger, jobLogFileSize, jobLogNumFiles);
    jobRunner.addListener(listener);

    if (JobCallbackManager.isInitialized()) {
      jobRunner.addListener(JobCallbackManager.getInstance());
    }

    configureJobLevelMetrics(jobRunner);

    return jobRunner;
  }

  жҜҸдёӘjobRunnerеңЁжү§иЎҢзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢйғҪеҺ»жҸ’д»¶жЁЎеқ—йҮҢиҫ№еҜ»жүҫеҜ№еә”зҡ„жҸ’д»¶жқҘиҝӣиЎҢjobзҡ„зұ»еһӢеҠ иҪҪгҖӮжҜҸз§Қjobзұ»еһӢйғҪжңүеҜ№еә”зҡ„runж–№жі•гҖӮжңҖеҗҺе°ұжҳҜи°ғз”Ёrunж–№жі•еҺ»жү§иЎҢjobгҖӮеҗ„з§ҚдёҚеҗҢзұ»еһӢзҡ„jobеҸҜд»ҘеҸӮиҖғazkabanй»ҳи®Өзҡ„jobзұ»еһӢд»ҘеҸҠ azkaban-pluginе·ҘзЁӢйҮҢиҫ№е®һзҺ°зҡ„дёҖдәӣhadoopзӣёе…ідҪңдёҡзұ»еһӢгҖӮ

 try {
        job = jobtypeManager.buildJobExecutor(this.jobId, props, logger);
      } catch (JobTypeManagerException e) {
        logger.error("Failed to build job type", e);
        return false;
      }
